20000.event: A sword cry heralds a child born with a sword heart at Taixu Sect's thirteen peaks.

20001.event: At five, wielding a wooden sword, he accidentally manifests spiritual energy and becomes the sect leader's final disciple.

20002.event: At fifteen, he builds his foundation and sword intent; at the sword trial, he conquers twelve arenas, gaining fame.

20003.event: The Demon Abyss stirs, the righteous alliance launches an expedition; he follows his master to war.

20004.event: He slays a demon general with his sword but is ambushed; his dao companion dies to save him.

20005.event: Secluded in meditation, he takes a deviant path in swordsmanship, creating the 'Seven-Absolute Heart-Severing Sword', greatly advancing his power.

20006.event: Heart demon tribulation breaks his dao heart, sword intent backlashes, cultivation lost, lifespan ends, he dies in his cave.

20007.event: Forcing through the Nascent Soul tribulation, entwined by heart tribulation and heavenly tribulation, his sword breaks and he dies.

20008.event: Born in a mortal herb shop, in swaddling clothes he often smells medicinal herbs, naturally close to plants.

20009.event: He obtains a fragmentary scroll 'Collection of Herbs', self-teaches to recognize hundreds of herbs, showing alchemical talent.

20010.event: Encountering a plague, he uses crude alchemy to save the villagers, exhausting family wealth.

20011.event: Spending all family assets to exchange for an ancient cauldron, he embarks on the path to seek immortality.

20012.event: Heaven and earth spiritual energy stirs abnormally; many secret realms appear.

20013.event: Accidentally entering a secret realm, he obtains an alchemy recipe from a former dynasty, breaks through to foundation establishment.

20014.event: He fails to refine the Ascending Origin Pill, pill tribulation destroys the cauldron, and he dies.

20015.event: Transforming the mortal into enlightenment, using heaven and earth as a furnace, he creates the 'Natural Dao of Alchemy'.

20016.event: The pill completes nine cycles, golden core perfected, drawing the Nascent Soul tribulation.

20017.event: He achieved Nascent Soul after tribulation, died, leaving the Scripture of Alchemy.

20018.event: Born with past-life wisdom, eyes contain spiritual light, the sea of consciousness hides fragments of former life memories.

20019.event: Accidentally triggering a past-life seal, I unlocked the first sea of consciousness and comprehended the Reincarnation Manual.

20020.event: Foundation set. Past life insights enable swift cultivation but provoke sect suspicion.

20021.event: The ancient secret realm 'Samsara Sea' stirs abnormally, suspected of a precious treasure appearing.

20022.event: Enter the Samsara Sea, seek the treasure 'Nirvana Pearl' buried in a past life, cultivation surges to Golden Core.

20023.event: Past-life enemy senses the aura, sets an ambush, fatally wounded, falls on the return journey.

20024.event: Conceal name and identity, recultivate the inner method, merge insights from two lifetimes, create the 'Three Lifespan Unification Art'.

20025.event: Nascent Soul tribulation arrives, past-life karma becomes a heart demon attacking, barely survive.

20026.event: Divine Transformation perfect, comprehend the cycle of reincarnation, ascend to the immortal realm.

20027.event: Born in the righteous sect 'Tai Xu Sect', excellent spiritual root, placed with high hopes.

20028.event: Cultivate the 'Tai Xu Pure Qi Art', progress swiftly, acclaimed as 'Little Tai Xu'.

20029.event: Descend the mountain for training, fall in love with the demon cult saintess, face obstruction from the sect.

20030.event: Sect forces the killing of the saintess, angrily defects from the sect, falls into demon path.

20031.event: Righteous-demonic war erupts, countless small sects are swept up.

20032.event: Framed by demon cultivators, besieged by righteous, surviving nine deaths but caught in heaven's net, dies exhausted.

20033.event: Seclude and cultivate deeply, self-create 'Ice Heart Demon Path', suppress heart demons, recast the foundation.

20034.event: By chance save a mortal child, realize 'even demons have their way', gradually restore the dao-heart.

20035.event: Pursued by both sects, he died with a smile: 'No heart, no demon.'

20036.event: Born in a nameless mountain village, parents both mortals, simple meals, unaware of immortal path.

20037.event: Encounter a wandering Taoist, who tests and finds spiritual root, gifts a fragment of 'Carefree Wander'.

20038.event: Self-cultivate to Foundation Establishment, roam the four directions, make a living by fortune-telling and divination.

20039.event: Dynasty changes, war flames spread across the wild, retreat into deep mountains.

20040.event: Built a hut in deep mountains, cultivated spiritual plants, befriended beasts, and comprehended the way of nature.

20041.event: Unintentionally rescued a severely injured cultivator, became close friends, and received insights on formations.

20042.event: After a friend's death, he left seclusion but couldn't resolve love, heart demons grew, and he died.

20043.event: Traveled the mortal world, resolved karma, achieved peace of mind, and broke through to Core Formation.

20044.event: When lifespan was about to end, drank wine on a snowy peak and passed away with a smile.

20045.event: Born a mortal farmer, a wandering cultivator found his rare spiritual root and brought him to a sect.

20046.event: Entered the Tai Xu sect, practiced orthodox profound arts, was exceptionally intelligent, and greatly favored by the masters.

20047.event: Eager for success, he snuck into forbidden land to learn demonic art, was caught, suffered meridian reversal, and died.

20048.event: Drifted in the world, the demonic backlash deepened, but cultivation greatly advanced, and temperament became increasingly paranoid.

20049.event: Taken in by demonic magnate Xuanming Ancestor, given blood pills to stabilize foundation, becoming his minion.

20050.event: Served a demon lord, killed countless, wore murderous aura as armor, ruled a region, but his Dao heart shattered.

20051.event: The righteous-demonic war erupts; a former sect mate's sacrifice shocks my heart and ripples my still Dao heart.

20052.event: He defected on the battlefield, wounded the demon lord, but demonic energy snapped his meridians, he fell and died.

20053.event: Mortally wounded on a nameless cliff, he smiled, true to his heart despite the demonic path.

20054.event: Born in a herbal medicine shop, room filled with fragrance, cry clear and bright, as if destined for plants.

20055.event: Acquired half of Green Wood Alchemy Sutra, used mortal fire, blew furnaces, then understood wood essence's wonder.

20056.event: Refined spirit-gathering powder, befriended a few scattered cultivators, exchanged for spiritual materials, and first glimpsed the threshold of alchemy.

20057.event: Acquiring an ancient furnace, he spent ten years refining Foundation pills, gaining fame and sect attention.

20058.event: Coveted by Biliuo Sect for pill formula, chased, furnace seized, meridians severed, died in a barren mountain.

20059.event: Restarted alchemy with a broken furnace, simplified it, understood the alchemist's heart, and made Nascent Infant pills, shaking the region.

20060.event: He refined the Nine-Turn Golden Elixir, heaven and earth changed, and amid thunder and fire he ascended.

20061.event: After ten years of seclusion, he wrote Dan Xin Lu to guide future generations.

20062.event: Born ordinary except for starry eyes, his weak spiritual root made the clan lament.

20063.event: He secretly cultivates his past life's method from dream memories, drawing qi undetected by his clan.

20064.event: He traveled to the Southern Domain, found his past life's cave, broke the barrier, and gained elixirs, artifacts, and notes.

20065.event: During foundation building, a past-life blood curse erupted, destroying the dao base with mind-devouring illusions and scattering a remnant soul.

20066.event: During Core Formation tribulation, nine lightning strikes from his past life shattered his core and spirit, leaving only ashes.

20067.event: After reaching Nascent Soul, he roamed the mortal world, met his reincarnated Dao partner, and resolved karmic debts.

20068.event: He achieved Divine Transformation, dissolved the celebration, retired to mountains, left: 'Great Dao is simple, forget cunning.'

20069.event: On Qingqiu Mountain, a white fox bore a silver cub, innocent and naive.

20070.event: After eating a thousand-year vermillion fruit, I gained wisdom and, gazing at the moon, comprehended the path of cultivation.

20071.event: Surrounded by hunters, it cunningly escaped, healed in a ravine, and vowed never to be killed.

20072.event: With crossbone refined for human speech, it barely fled Foundation Establishment cultivator's attempt to capture it as spirit beast.

20073.event: After three days of thunderfire, she transformed beautifully but her cracked demon core caused her to die meditating on Qingqiu.

20074.event: As conflict escalated, it joined the Demon Beast Alliance, fought, brokered peace, and gained prestige.

20075.event: At the Celestial Fox realm, I gained the Nine-Tailed Ancestor's legacy, fixed my demon core, and reached Return to Simplicity.

20076.event: With merits complete, auspicious clouds carried its body, and it sensed the guiding light of the demon realm; yet, concerned.

20077.event: Born into the Murong clan of Dongshan, with ancestors all being great formation masters.

20078.event: He invented the Small Maze Formation, won the youth contest, and gained fame across three commanderies.

20079.event: His family was massacred for guarding an ancient formation diagram; he escaped with the formation disk, but was severely wounded.

20080.event: Traveled the world incognito, observed various sects' mountain-protecting formations, mastered them thoroughly, and created several trapping and killing formations.

20081.event: Linked formations trapped and killed blood feud enemies; dying, they revealed a demonic mastermind, plunging into another killing calamity.

20082.event: Joined the Righteous Alliance, studied formation restraint of demonic energy, became chief formation master.

20083.event: In the righteous-demonic battle, a master sacrificed his blood essence to annihilate the demon army and died smiling.

20084.event: Born holding a jade slip with faint sword marks, cried like sword chimes, astonishing villagers.

20085.event: Age seven, playing in a mountain stream, found an ancient sword, recalled past life memories, started sword training.

20086.event: Understood a piece of Taixu Sword Art, formed sword qi, intent soared, catching nearby sects' attention.

20087.event: Joined the Sword Sect, was taken as a personal disciple by the sect master due to fast sword Dao comprehension.

20088.event: He swept Golden Core peers at the sect competition, found a past-life sword fragment, fused it for power but worsened.

20089.event: Barely suppressed inner demons during Nascent Soul breakthrough, survived but with hidden dangers.

20090.event: Traveled the world seeking a way to restrain inner demons; at an ancient battlefield, comprehended the reincarnation sword intent, cut.

20091.event: I set up the Reincarnation Sword Array as my past self appears, severing karma with one strike.

20092.event: Achieved divine transformation, became Reincarnation Sword Venerable, founded a sect, passed down sword Dao of severing cause and effect.

20093.event: He opened heaven's gate with his sword, but Dao backlash killed him, leaving sword intent.

20094.event: He was born into a righteous family with heavenly signs, a clear cry, and a demonic-sound-resistant soul.

20095.event: His sect destroyed by demons, he escaped alone, secretly recruited by the Immortal Alliance as a spy.

20096.event: Faked identity and joined the Black Lotus Demon Sect, valued for outstanding talent, taught the 'Heart-Devouring Demon Art'.

20097.event: Nearly caught while first stealing intel in the demon sect's forbidden zone, I killed in self-defense and tainted my soul.

20098.event: To gain higher-ups' trust, he joined demon invasions, saw slaughter, broke his Dao heart, and disintegrated.

20099.event: I fell in love with a demon sect cultivator, endured a love tribulation, chose the mission, and devised a plan to keep her safe.

20100.event: Exposed spy sealed his mind after soul-search, becoming a puppet.

20101.event: A demon puppet regained consciousness from a Dao heart fragment, escaping to righteousness as half-demon, half-human.

20102.event: On the battlefield, he detonated his demonic core, severely wounding the Demon Lord, and was posthumously named 'Dark Spy'.

20103.event: You were born to mortal artisans, your loud cry bringing joy to the family.

20104.event: In a cave you found a jade slip, probed it, obtained the array solution, studied day and night.

20105.event: During a mortal war, you protected a village with basic arrays, earning fame and becoming a rogue cultivator's nominal disciple.

20106.event: You cracked second restriction, comprehended 'Nine-Bend Yellow River' formation, used it to trap and kill a fake-dan beast.

20107.event: You spent three years building a formation, aged to white hair, and died smiling upon completion.

20108.event: Touching the Dao of Formations, you refined with array patterns, merged with star tracks, and began array cultivation.

20109.event: To resist demon tide, you set up Zhou Tian Star Array, exhausting cultivation and perishing with it into stardust.

20110.event: At life's end, you died meditating in the formation, becoming an array spirit guarding it forever.

20111.event: Born to a fox demon mother and mortal hunter father, strange birth phenomena drew demon and human calamities.

20112.event: Righteous cultivators killed your parents; bullied village children triggered demonic berserk rage.

20113.event: Fled to the mountains, ate a century-old Vermillion Fruit, awakened demon veins, but violent power severed his meridians, killing him.

20114.event: Watched demon beasts forge bodies with blood essence, copied to create Defying Fate Art, merging human and demon powers.

20115.event: Roamed the cultivation world, was repeatedly hunted due to half-demon identity, counter-killed pursuers, gaining a fierce reputation.

20116.event: In demon secret realm, obtained ancient demon inheritance, body equal to demon king, but blood backlashed, foundation collapsed, fell.

20117.event: He achieved Demon Bone Golden Body, pioneered dual cultivation, and founded a sect for half-demons.

20118.event: Cultivating his body to perfection, he survived the Nine-Nine Thunder Tribulation and achieved an indestructible form, earning heavenly recognition.

20119.event: Charged alone to save besieged half-demon disciples, died exhausted. Demon bones became mountains, guarding the land.

20120.event: Born into a Daoist alchemy family's side branch with sluggish spiritual veins, elders cold-shouldered him as unfit.

20121.event: A rusted alchemy furnace in the back mountain released a will after blood binding.

20122.event: He gained fame refining a Beauty Pill, but the furnace drained his lifespan, killing him in his prime.

20123.event: He assassinated cultivators for alchemy materials, degenerated into a demonic rogue, poisoned, besieged, and perished in a furnace explosion.

20124.event: Made a pill saving a Nascent Soul elder, won his patronage, joined a major sect, but furnace demands worsened.

20125.event: He forcibly refined a Divine Transformation Pill, causing tribulation. Celestial fire drained his lifespan, and he burned out.

20126.event: With his life spent, he sacrificed himself to forge a forbidden pill, causing a brutal scramble.

20127.event: Nine stars aligned, spiritual energy surged, even mortals awakened spiritual roots, cultivators rejoiced.

20128.event: The void split, Sumeru emerged; you rushed into an ancient treasure realm with countless cultivators, fought fiercely, and perished.

20129.event: Demonic mist from the Nine Abyss infected you, turning you into a fallen puppet.

20130.event: The Heavenly Talisman Sect's new talisman flooded spirit stones, crashing prices and ruining the wealthy.

20131.event: The Cloud Soaring and Blood Fiend sects fought a millennium-long war over ascension slots. You were caught and perished.

20132.event: The damaged Heavenly Dao's tribulation lightning killed most, and survivors lost their Dao base.

20133.event: Demons used inner demons to break through. The weak-willed were possessed, becoming mindless followers. The cultivation world was anxious.

20134.event: Mount Kunlun collapsed revealing Fuxi's remains. His descendants could receive ancient god inheritance, attracting greedy people.

20135.event: Dual cultivation appears; you and your partner share power, but emotional tribulations require caution.

20136.event: You fought divine monsters for the fruit of longevity, but were overwhelmed and died.

20137.event: Sensing the demon tide's shift, Heaven induces a trial during your meditation, making your Dao waver and causing self-destruction.

20138.event: A crack from the nine heavens poured immortal energy, granting enlightenment but risking soul devouring.

20139.event: Surging spiritual energy speeds your cultivation, but a hidden demon makes you fall into demonic deviation and die.

20140.event: You joined the war against the Great Calamity and unfortunately fell at the hands of an extraterrestrial demon.

20141.event: You entered an ancient golden immortal's cave, glimpsed an opportunity, but triggered a restriction that destroyed your soul.

20142.event: You buy a pill from a nameless alchemist whose improved ancient recipe doubles effect at half cost, advancing your cultivation.

20143.event: The Demon Emperor died in the heavenly tribulation; countless demons mourned, breached barriers, and you fell in the northern slaughter.

20144.event: Nine stars aligned, Heavenly Dao cracked; cultivators sought reincarnation to prove Primordial Chaos.

20145.event: Earth's dragon energy vanished; sacred lands became mortal. Cultivators feared, some meditated to death, others fled to the stars.

20146.event: A mortal dynasty forged divine weapons and attacked with a million soldiers; you fell in the assault.

20147.event: The Dao Ancestor preached at Kunlun Ruins, bringing heavenly flowers, golden lotuses, and cleared bottlenecks.

20148.event: A crimson moon for three days turned the world red; madness consumed you, kin turned against kin, emotions became purgatory.

20149.event: Light from East Sea's Guixu heralded a Primal Chaos treasure; sacred realms mobilized, you fell, demons flourished.

20150.event: Demon Lord Li Tian Du created the Dao of Devouring Immortals, gaining followers while the righteous path was powerless.

20151.event: You bought a fake Nine Revolutions pill, but it cured your long-standing bad breath.
20151.postEvent: The medicine peddler fled; unsure whether to laugh or cry, you stroked your forehead in self-mockery.

20152.event: While meditating on a cliff, a monkey stole your pouch; a three-day chase revealed a hidden Foundation Establishment Pill.
20152.postEvent: Understanding human nature, the spirit monkey scratched its head in shame as you smiled and let it go.

20153.event: Idly reading a mortal book, you recited an incantation, drawing heavenly energy that unexpectedly broke through a bottleneck.
20153.postEvent: You recited it repeatedly but to no effect, like a fleeting dream.

20154.event: A stranger wept, claiming you were her past-life husband, so you hid for three months.
20154.postEvent: When her Dao heart regained clarity, she left apologetically. By then, you were terrified of every shadow.

20155.event: You stumbled into an ancient cultivator's cave; obscene words hid lost swordsmanship, and learning it slightly injured your Dao heart.
20155.postEvent: Thereafter, every time you used this sword art, you felt the obscenities echo in your ears, greatly disturbing you.

20156.event: Watching a tribulation, residual lightning struck you, scorching your hair but granting lightning affinity.
20156.postEvent: You showed up with a burnt head and face, while others teased you relentlessly.

20157.event: You discoursed Dao with an old pine while drunk; it became sentient and gave you three pine nuts.
20157.postEvent: After consuming the pine nuts, your dantian felt slightly warm, as if harboring new life.

20158.event: At a mortal tavern, your lavish order sparked suspicion, then a spell singed the cloth, causing laughter.
20158.postEvent: The shopkeeper blushed and waived the bill. You fled in disgrace and didn't dare enter the city for days.

20159.event: Your artifact spirit leaves without reason and returns two days later carrying a greasy bun to repay your feeding kindness.
20159.postEvent: The warm steamed bun left you speechless, so you placed it on your desk as an offering.

20160.event: During a sect competition, a stray arrow pierced your chest, causing you to fall and lose all cultivation.
20160.postEvent: Amidst the crowd's shock, your death became a cautionary tale among your fellow disciples.

20161.event: Encountering a quarreling mortal couple, you found the wife's fox spirit claim was body odor and gave medicine.
20161.postEvent: The couple thanked you profusely and gifted you an ancestral celadon bowl.

20162.event: While secluded, a centipede spirit entered your cave and brought you herbs daily for over a month.
20162.postEvent: After the centipede spirit left, you gazed at the pile of spirit herbs, feeling a sense of loss.

20163.event: Forcing a Dao name change to 'Supreme Lord Lingxiao', you were mocked for three years, tainting your Dao heart.
20163.postEvent: Whenever you heard that name, you felt your face burn, yet you couldn't change it back.

20164.event: You pick up an ancient bronze mirror; your reflection winks, claiming daily makeup grants immortal fate.
20164.postEvent: Half-believing, you ultimately found it absurd and sank the mirror into a deep pool.

20165.event: A mad Daoist forced you to learn Toad Breathing; it makes you croak but lengthens your breath.
20165.postEvent: The Daoist said "green hills remain, waters flow forever" then vanished, never to return.

20166.event: After losing three Go games to a talking mushroom, your skill improved, but your odd smiles alarmed disciples.

20167.event: Drinking Centennial Spirit Honey gave you diarrhea for three days, but it cleansed your marrow and strengthened your foundation.
20167.postEvent: From then on, you steered clear of any spirit honey.

20168.event: During tribulation, lightning hit a bathing demon, who chased you 300 li, improving your movement but ruining boots.

20169.event: In seclusion, a jade child brought a Heavenly Court bill demanding spirit stones or fortune cut.
20169.postEvent: You obediently paid the spirit stones, and afterward, you hid whenever you saw colorful clouds.

20170.event: During cultivation, you hallucinated drinking with Taotie. Next day, your spirit herbs and stones were gnawed empty, teeth hardened.

20171.event: I found a monk's self-cultivation book, practiced its precepts, and became righteous, but peers found me dull and less carefree.
20171.postEvent: You realized: Being too serious is also a heart demon.

20172.event: Pushed into an appearance contest, you won third place and a mirror, then obsessed over your looks, ignoring cultivation.
20172.postEvent: You murmured to the mirror: 'A good shell is ultimately illusory.' Yet you couldn't resist looking.

20173.event: Strolling, you step on a talking ganoderma spirit; after haggling, you pay Foundation Nurturing Pills.
20173.postEvent: Afterward, you treated roadside plants with courtesy.

20174.event: In an ancient cave, you found a skeleton with unsent love letters, felt profound loss, and your Dao heart stirred.
20174.postEvent: You burned the love letters at the cave entrance; the green smoke curled up, as if with a sigh.

20175.event: You fused Qi Circulation with 'Little Donkey' nursery rhyme to create the Donkey Bray Art, startling enemies.
20175.postEvent: From then on, you earned the nickname 'Divine Donkey True Man' in the sect.

20176.event: Sweet rain turned your hair emerald green for three months. You wore a bamboo hat.
20176.postEvent: After three months, the green hair faded, and you unexpectedly found a slight increase in affinity with plants.

20177.event: You befriended your shadow, a harmless spirit; it shares yin power and scares thieves.
20177.postEvent: From then on, your shadow was deeper and more lively than others.

20178.event: After eating unripe cinnabar, your qi reversed and meridians burned, so you inverted and unlocked Reverse Circulation.
20178.postEvent: Afterward, you occasionally stood on your head, recalling the mystery of that moment.

20179.event: A three-inch infant in your golden core demands daily Enlightenment Tea, boosting your comprehension.

20180.event: You ate an Illusion Herb, making your face young but bones old; disciples asked for beauty secrets, amused.

20181.event: You bought a fake meteorite, threw it in a furnace, and it exploded into ancient star sand, earning a profit.

20182.event: Practiced Turtle Breath, mistaken dead, placed in coffin. Broke out after three days, startling disciples and clearing your Dao-heart.

20183.event: A pearl gave you a beautiful dream; after ten years, you broke the illusion and gained insight into the Dao.
20183.postEvent: However, after ten years of dreamlike reality, the heart and nature were slightly stained with attachment.

20184.event: Fell off a cliff while debating, hung on a pine seven days, learned Pine Wind Sword Skill, then smiled.

20185.event: Stumbled into a mortal opera, played a woman, moved the crowd, adding worldly warmth to my Dao-heart.

20186.event: You mistook Seven Emotions Powder for Heart-Clearing Dew, then cried and laughed, running around the mountain, which untied heart knots.

20187.event: Struck by lightning while meditating, he understood animals and argued with sparrows about rain.

20188.event: Got a future self's flying sword message warning not to eat lunch, ate anyway, choked, it was a prank.

20189.event: You created Sleeping Immortal Skill, slept three years, dreamed the rudiments but forgot upon waking, feeling lost.

20190.event: Met a hookless fisherman who gave you a spirit fish. Eating it improved your bone structure.

20191.event: Stood on head for three years in an inverted dimension. After returning, practiced upside down; disciples copied.
20191.postEvent: Though somewhat comical, the physique grew stronger.

20192.event: Reciting a transformation incantation backwards dissolved the body into flowers; the soul became a peach immortal shedding petals each spring.

20193.event: At the ritual, the baby grabbed a charred branch over scholarly items, a lightning-struck relic that would later trigger karma.

20194.event: At two, a three-legged golden toad bit you; later learned it was a spirit beast, granting spiritual sensitivity.

20195.event: A child's babble 'Dao friend' sealed an ancient spirit in a stone, taken by a passing expert.

20196.event: Mother fed you a fasting pill as candy; three days without hunger but vomiting, unintentionally cleansing your meridians.

20197.event: Born under bright moonlight, a baby gazed silently; the condition healed by age three, but the moon drew their heart.

20198.event: During the first birthday feast, a crane sang songs intoxicating all, and the baby giggled before the crane fell silent.

20199.event: While learning to walk, fell into a spirit spring, emerging with jade-white skin, but thereafter feared water.

20200.event: At your birth, blood rain fell because a powerful being failed tribulation, leaving a red mark on your brow.

20201.event: At five, a red carp by the river warned against immortality, then vanished; the mystery lingered.

20202.event: I accompanied parents to an immortal sect; an elder mistook them for reincarnated acquaintances, gave a stone later found ordinary.

20203.event: At birth, a demon wind swirled the baby three times and set it down. The child later floated in sleep.

20204.event: A Taoist at a first birthday banquet said the child's fate was extraordinary, laughed, vanished, saying 'Just a joke.'

20205.event: Ate a seven-colored fungus at three, body smelled seven days, attracting bees. Pharmacist said it doubled your plant affinity.

20206.event: During a ceremony, a spirit rat stole a golden lock, leaving a lasting fear of spirit beasts.

20207.event: At age {age}, chasing a golden squirrel, you stumbled into an unknown peach grove and ate a peach.
20207.postEvent: That night your stomach rumbled like thunder, and your farts carried the scent of peaches, lasting three days.

20208.event: While drowsy in class, a golden 'Dao' entered your brow, and you recited the Dao De Jing backward.
20208.postEvent: After three days, the spiritual light faded, but the Dao De Jing's essence took root, easing future Dao comprehension.

20209.event: A neighbor's tabby cat claimed you were a reincarnated immortal emperor, but only spoke to demand food.

20210.event: You found an ancient jade slip by the creek, heard 'fart cultivation,' but three days' effort brought mockery, no gain.

20211.event: A wandering Taoist claimed you had immortal destiny, then fled with banquet money, leaving a fake manual.

20212.event: With your mother at the market, you bought a walking sugar piglet that frolicked all day, then melted and you sat on it.

20213.event: In a storm, lightning struck an old locust tree; you found floating charcoal that writes without ink.

20214.event: Missing school, you had to copy scriptures 100 times; an immortal finished in your dream, but handwriting reeked of alcohol.

20215.event: You fed your katydid dew; it became a demon insect, ate the whole field, and left.

20216.event: While bathing, a silver snake coiled your ankle, spoke of being your past life companion, then vanished from a gourd.

20217.event: Playing hide-and-seek, you hide in a village shrine and find a manual that says farm and cultivate immortality.

20218.event: You saved a frozen crane; it bragged it was an immortal's mount, then crashed into snow.

20219.event: You tried to fly like a sword immortal, climbed the roof, slipped, hit your head, and died.

20220.event: You found a tarnished ring, understood ants, warned villagers, became prophet, but it vanished and ants broke your rice jar.

20221.event: After cultivation, your shadow detached and rolled away; you chased lightly, then it returned.

20222.event: Stumbling on a jade slip with yam roasting methods, you filled the valley with fragrance and attracted dancing cranes.
20222.postEvent: Afterward, your skills in artifact refining and fire control also improved.

20223.event: At a lone peak, you taught squirrels Go with divine sense; they scratched heads. Your Dao heart felt light returning.

20224.event: On your birthday, blue smoke of hometown incense carried descendant prayers; you stood still long.

20225.event: Spiritual gourd seeds sprouted a chubby babbling child; you nurtured him with dew, adding warmth.
20225.postEvent: That gourd kid often sneaks into the elixir room, but you often can't help smiling.

20226.event: Purple grass in a crevice emitted spicy morning odor; its dew improved eyesight, earning you the nickname Venerable Smoke-Breeze.

20227.event: You saw a wedding; the groom was a child you'd given money. You left a spirit stone and departed.

20228.event: Your destined flying sword hummed a mortal tune at midnight; on full moons you danced, rounding your sword intent.

20229.event: Your crane learned Go, pestered you; you went easy on its terrible play, amused.

20230.event: Meditating at Mount Cangwu's stele, you learned a tofu method; you made spirit jade tofu and sold it for wealth.
20230.postEvent: The sect tested it and designated this tofu as a banquet delicacy.

20231.event: After three years cultivating Azure Sky Dragon Art, you got a golden loach pet that attracts female cultivators.
20231.postEvent: The loach was good at acting cute, so you got to know a few Daoist friends because of it.

20232.event: A mosquito bowed; you dreamt of a guest teaching 'Mosquito Thunder,' and could then summon mosquitoes.

20233.event: A scroll pulled your soul into its sky; you picked stars. The scroll became paper, but your divine sense sharpened.
20233.postEvent: Afterward, when you observed the stars, you often had flashes of inspiration.

20234.event: Your friend's hairpin shattered; a green parrot flew out, calling your nickname and chattering about embarrassing past.
20234.postEvent: Every year on the anniversary of your friend's death, the parrot would be silent for a whole day.

20235.event: Your orchid mutated; at age {age}, it shakes leaves and calls you 'Ancestor' in a child's voice, no spiritual energy.
20235.postEvent: This useless, delicate flower disturbs cultivation and needs daily spiritual spring water.

20236.event: While meditating, you extended your divine sense and could clearly hear the clamor of countless ants in an anthill ten.
20236.postEvent: Since then, every elixir you brewed felt watched and had an odd earthy taste.

20237.event: A stone rolls from the cliff, claims Great Sage's kin, insists you take a plain stone as life treasure to seal fate.
20237.postEvent: The stone only drew a daily wisp of your spiritual power, lay motionless for decades, but you couldn't discard it.

20238.event: You and a long-lost friend carved a mountain into a Go board, played for decades, then laughed and parted.

20239.event: A Nascent Soul cultivator obsesses over a marble game, forcing juniors to play; losers copy scriptures 100 times.
20239.postEvent: Disciples complained endlessly, yet spirit stone marbles became popular toys—a strange tale.

20240.event: A blind seer says your past life was a salted fish; eat stinky tofu daily or your luck flees.
20240.postEvent: You believed him, found a mortal shop, ate it daily, and your Dao heart harmonized.

20241.event: A heavenly book said 'What are you looking at?' Shattering my Dao heart, I became a lifeless husk.

20242.event: Your sentient flying sword sings horribly when drawn, causing enemies to rout before battle.
20242.postEvent: You gradually became accustomed to this sword's accompaniment, even feeling that fighting without the song was not satisfying enough.

20243.event: An old pine tree's gold pinecones turned to wood, mocking cultivators during its fake tribulation.
20243.postEvent: You saw through it and laughed; the pine spirit winked and later threw pinecones at your cave.

20244.event: Instead of lightning, the tribulation clouds dropped a scroll announcing the Thunder Department's team building rescheduled, postponing the ordeal.
20244.postEvent: Holding the silk scroll, unsure whether to laugh or cry, you await the delayed lightning tribulation.

20245.event: Cultivation error gave me a third arm for scratching itches; I was nicknamed Three-Armed Loose Cultivator.

20246.event: My spirit saw my name smeared in the Book of Life and Death. A ghost said I should be dead.

20247.event: A time agent punishes you for disrupting history by repairing outhouse cracks until fixed.
20247.postEvent: Resentfully accepting punishment, you glimpsed mortal life's myriad states, steadying your Dao heart.

20248.event: You accidentally made a truth-telling bronze mirror that daily criticizes you, making you want to smash it.

20249.event: An eight-tailed fox offered a fox tail whisk for 300 years of my life. I laughed at the absurd price.
20249.postEvent: Seeing you silent, the fox spirit left its whisk, which the next day turned into fur filling the cave.

20250.event: Cultivating true essence, my inner force raged, my flying sword scrawling Big Turtle on the wall, stunning me.
20250.postEvent: I learned it was the lingering will of a three-hundred-year-dead cultivator, still childlike.

20251.event: Invited to a Nascent Soul assembly, you expected Dao talk, but cultivators argued over ganoderma leaves and left upset.
20251.postEvent: I left and met a Golden Core cultivator asking directions; I found it unexpectedly cordial.

20252.event: I bought useless Foundation pills from a Golden Core vendor due to misjudging his root bone, then laughed at myself.
20252.postEvent: Given casually to a rogue cultivator, that pill helped him break through, creating interesting karma.

20253.event: A broken kite on my sword tip; I returned it to a crying child who called me 'Immortal Grandpa.'
20253.postEvent: You quietly erased the child's memory and drifted away, but felt a trace of warmth in your heart.

20254.event: Stumbling into a singing mushroom realm, you slept forever, your soul becoming flower fertilizer.
20254.postEvent: Later disciples found only a giant mushroom overshadowing the sky with faint ballads; none dared approach.

20255.event: Playing chess with a Peng demon, I attacked when it retracted a move, triggering an illusion array trapping us both.
20255.postEvent: Three days later, the array eye dissolved; you and the Peng demon smiled bitterly, losing face but not lifebound energy.

20256.event: A future letter warned: don't eat the vermilion fruit or you'll fart three years. I saw it and didn't buy.
20256.postEvent: Years later, you heard the cultivator ate the fruit, got endless farts, and was mocked. You felt secretly lucky.

20257.event: My Nascent Soul stole a drink in a mortal tavern, was hit by a talisman, and fled in embarrassment.
20257.postEvent: The worst part was being caught by a guard disciple in disheveled clothes, reeking of alcohol, instantly losing all dignity.

20258.event: Your clone gained sentience, almost won a tournament, so you recalled it and got scolded for absurdity.
20258.postEvent: When the clone was retrieved, it still shouted 'Unfair,' making the disciples present unable to suppress their smiles.

20259.event: My umbrella gathered lightning orbs like lanterns; I enjoyed strolling with it on rainy nights.
20259.postEvent: Disciples privately gossiped 'the ancestor is getting stranger,' but you pretended not to hear.

20260.event: I preached to a stone for 100 years; it said 'You preached wrong.
20260.postEvent: I later learned the stone was an Error Stone awakened by a sage to test the Dao's authenticity.

20261.event: My worshipped master vanished; he was a radish spirit. I lost half my spirit stones.

20262.event: A heart demon played Go with me, stealing memories. I forgot my best sword technique but gained new insights starting.
20262.postEvent: That heart demon later dissolved into nothingness within my memories, leaving only the remnants of a chess game.

20263.event: I raised a cricket on spiritual grain, brought it to a sect tournament, was scolded by an elder, and retreated.
20263.postEvent: A patrol crane snatched my cricket; I moped for three days, mocked by my Dao partner.

20264.event: My spiritual crane demanded spirit rice daily. I grew accustomed; it added worldly life to my solitary path.

20265.event: A flying sword demanded payment for a 200-year-old debt; I recalled and repaid.

20266.event: My spirit saw its detached shadow applying makeup. It was a remnant soul energized by moonlight; it dissipated after seven.

20267.event: Seeing an old man laugh after losing all in dice, I realized my century of cultivation lacked his ease, and my Dao heart gained clarity.

20268.event: I refined a pill with heavenly dew instead of rootless water.
20268.postEvent: Later, I gave it to a close friend who cultivated music, receiving a jar of century-old spiritual brew in return.

20269.event: A white ape taught me breathing art; I grew golden hairs, impervious to swords but strange.

20270.event: An old friend's three-day debate on Qi vs. heaven left your mind in turmoil; seven days in seclusion cleared it.

20271.event: I picked a white flower from scorched wood; its fragrance lingered for three months.

20272.event: A box contained a note saying 'Cultivate to Nascent Soul for my smile.

20273.event: During Nascent Soul tribulation, a past-life friend's heart demon dissolved when a drinking debt was repaid via cookbook.
20273.postEvent: The tribulation lightning also weakened by thirty percent, and I crossed it safely.

20274.event: I ate a fruit, became invisible; my sword spirit struck me, confused by blood appearing from nowhere.

20275.event: Meditating on a cliff, I watched ants for seven days, breaking a centuries-old bottleneck.

20276.event: Mortals built a temple honoring me as Matchmaker; I secretly protected love matches after they ignored my dream warning.

20277.event: A golden toad asked for spirit stones, promising karma; it ate, belched a colorful cloud, and hopped away.
20277.postEvent: Afterwards, my Dao heart often carried a hint of carefree joy.

20278.event: While meditating, I felt a fox tail sprouting at my spine, then my divine sense expanded.

20279.event: I saw cultivators in Verdant Mist Valley arguing over chicken-or-egg, using magic to evolve chaos into life for three days.
20279.postEvent: I silently took a detour, feeling both annoyed and amused.

20280.event: Morning blood-letter envelope warned against tea, but you had already drunk the spirit tea, leaving a plum blossom stain.
20280.postEvent: In the following days, your luck inexplicably improved.

20281.event: In the bamboo forest, you saw your name carved in your own handwriting on a stalk.
20281.postEvent: You caressed the bamboo for a long time, your divine thought suddenly dazed, as if understanding yet not.

20282.event: While refining pills, a voice told me to add Cold Marrow; the result was amber sugar beans instead of pills.
20282.postEvent: Uncertain whether to laugh or cry, you gave them to sectmates; all who ate said they were delicious.

20283.event: Bought a pill that summoned a thundercloud when speaking. Sect mates laughed; I dared not speak for three days.
20283.postEvent: After the pill's effect wore off, you felt your Dao heart slightly astringent.

20284.event: A Daoist tricked me into learning a fasting art; after seven days of hunger, I realized I was fooled.

20285.event: Your sword trembles like a sneeze, flips you into mud; your junior sister snickers.

20286.event: After the storm, a puddle reflected you winking and making a V-sign, then vanished.
20286.postEvent: After this, each mirror glance showed your reflection half a breath behind.

20287.event: The sect's spirit crane recited a poem about the yellow crane, then flew into the sky.

20288.event: Deep in an abandoned cave, a dry well echoes a child's voice reciting your childhood cultivation chant.
20288.postEvent: You straightened up, feeling as if an age had passed.

20289.event: A monkey stole my pouch; after a chase, it hung the pouch with a flower and chattered at me.
20289.postEvent: When you checked your belongings, several spirit fruits were missing and a few pine nuts added.

20290.event: While meditating, your dantian felt hot, but your stomach rumbled—you were just hungry.

20291.event: A qi blast from dual cultivation destroyed the roof; we were punished to repair it without spells.

20292.event: At a debate, you yawned, slighted the Dao, lost, and copied the Dao Classic 100 times.

20293.event: A jade slip showed a Daoist teaching frogs addition and subtraction; they croaked in order.

20294.event: Heavenly thunder fluffed your hair into a nest during tribulation, earning you the title 'Curled Cloud True Person'.
20294.postEvent: You looked in the mirror; your immortal grace diminished, yet unique.

20295.event: A faint voice from the furnace suggested phoenix blood, startling you into dropping your seal, extinguishing the fire.

20296.event: While meditating under a stele, red words appeared: 'Meditation fine: 50 spirit stones.' They vanished; you were alone.
20296.postEvent: Three days later, the Affairs Hall deducted 50 spirit stones for unauthorized stele viewing.

20297.event: Your round orange tabby cat spoke, saying "Hungry," and never said anything else.

20298.event: Overnight you learned bird language: sparrows complained eastern pine insects were thin, western locusts fat, so they'd migrate.
20298.postEvent: You smiled, broke a twig, and pointed them to a path of fat insects.

20299.event: In the spirit field, you struck a stone resembling the angry elder; he bought it, gaining you spirit stones.

20300.event: Your beloved wooden sword rusts, you grieve three days, then it glows, rust vanishes, and feels alive.

20301.event: A sunflower seed illusion trapped you in endless chewing, damaging your Dao heart and nearly causing possession.
20301.postEvent: After breaking out, you feel palpitations at the sight of sunflower seeds.

20302.event: On an ancient battlefield, you find a coin; it lands upright, signifying the middle way.
20302.postEvent: Your heart trembles slightly; you put away this neither auspicious nor ominous object.

20303.event: Playing, you gain an extra green plant; at Mao hour, it hums a soothing, unmelodic tune dispelling fatigue.

20304.event: Flying on a sword behind your master, a child's pebble hits you, making your sword-light waver.

20305.event: While bathing in a spirit spring, your reflection blinks and smiles, then vanishes; only the gurgling remains.

20306.event: While practicing Fire Attracting Art, a mistaken word creates fireworks; the sect leader makes you the celebration's laughingstock.

20308.event: Heart demon tribulation shatters your Dao heart, sword intent backlashes, cultivation ruined, you die in pain.

20310.event: A past-life foe senses your aura, ambushes you; outmatched, you fall on a nameless mountain.

20311.event: Betrayed by dark cultivators and hunted by righteous sects, you perished in an ambush, your soul shattered.

20313.event: After your friend dies in tribulation, you lose heart, quit cultivation, and die meditating at their grave a century later.

20314.event: Impatient, you snuck into the forbidden area for the Dark Demon Manual, were caught, crippled, expelled, and died brokenhearted.

20315.event: The Biluo Sect coveted your pill formula, chased you, seized furnace, severed meridians, and buried you. Your Dao ended.

20316.event: During foundation establishment, a blood curse backlashes, causing hallucinations. Though you see through illusions with your Dao heart, your foundation.

20317.event: During the core formation tribulation, lightning bearing the brand of your previous life descends.

20318.event: The transformation tribulation arrives. Thunder-fire burns your body for three days; you finally transform into a stunning beauty.

20319.event: Your family is massacred for guarding an ancient formation map.

20320.event: When breaking through to Nascent Soul, the heart demon tribulation descends.

20321.event: To gain the trust of higher-ups, you participate in a demonic invasion.

20323.event: Invited to arrange a mountain-protecting formation, you work three years, your hair turns white, then die exhausted but smiling.

20324.event: To resist demons, you activate a star array, draining your lifespan. You die, merging with the Dao.

20325.event: Stranded, you eat a century-old fruit, awakening your demonic vein. You grow stronger then explode into demonic plants.

20326.event: In a demon realm, you inherit an ancient demon's power.

20327.event: You refine a beauty pill using herbs but need essence blood. Obsessed, you burn out and dissipate into smoke.

20328.event: To sustain alchemy, you kill cultivators for herbs. Poison weakens you and you die in a siege, leaving nothing.

20329.event: Your forced alchemy of the Divine Pill triggers a tribulation, and the furnace drains your life, turning you to ash.

20330.event: A void opens revealing an ancient treasury. You rush in but suffer fatal injuries and die, leaving treasures uncollected.

20331.event: Crack leaks demonic qi; heart demon destroys cultivation; you become a demon puppet and turn to ashes.

20332.event: Lingyun and Xue Sha sects war over quotas; you and your sect fight to death in Kunlun Void.

20333.event: You draw a bye, then a poisoned arrow hits your arm, making you the tournament's strangest casualty.
20333.postEvent: Everyone sighs. Your name is recorded in the sect's warning records, and later disciples take it as a caution.

20334.event: As infant, you gaze at full moon; syndrome fades by three, yet you yearn for cold moon.

20335.event: Demon wind swirls infant thrice then sets it down; parents see nothing; child later floats while sleeping.

20336.event: A storyteller's xianxia tales inspire you to imitate a sword immortal, but you fall and die, becoming a cautionary tale.

20337.event: Giant mushrooms sing in secret realm; you fall asleep; fungal threads invade; you become fertilizer and earth.
20337.postEvent: After that, a sneezing mushroom cluster appeared, seen as a strange tale by cultivators.

20338.event: Old man demands three white radishes daily; you obey 100 years; he vanishes, note: 'Radish spirit.'
20338.postEvent: Stunned, a century of radish offerings cost half your spirit stones—bitter and amusing.

20339.event: An ancient sword hums, light gathers. A white-robed youth emerges, starry-eyed, innocent.

20340.event: While traveling, an old blacksmith teaches you the mortal sword path: the sword heart is the human heart.

20341.event: You find the Sword Grave, hearing ten thousand swords wailing.

20342.event: In the Sword Grave, an ancient sword immortal's soul teaches you the profound Surging Swan Nine Swords.

20343.event: Your perfected sword intent nearly ascends you, but a heart demon tribulation damages your sword heart and halts cultivation.

20344.event: Breaking through tribulation, stepping into Nascent Soul, the startling sword intent shakes the nine provinces.

20345.event: The previous master's reincarnation fell into demonhood, wielding the sword to commit murder.

20346.event: His cultivation fell to Golden Core; he returned with broken body and sword to Sword Tomb, sacrificed himself to seal sword spirit forever.

20347.event: Born near Sword Tomb with innate Sword Bone, at twelve he entered and got broken sword Frost Snow as master.

20348.event: Wielding Frost Snow, he first entered the martial world, slaying demons and monsters.

20349.event: The Sword Tomb stirred; evil forces coveted the divine sword 'Scorching Heaven'.

20350.event: He comprehended the sword intent of thousands in the Sword Tomb, creating 'Ten Thousand Swords Return to One' to shake.

20351.event: At Nascent Soul, he dueled a demon; exhausted, Frost Snow shattered, soul dissipated; inner demons killed him.

20352.event: After a century in the Sword Tomb, he learned the heart is the sword and rebuilt his Dao heart.

20353.event: On the verge of ascension, he dispersed his cultivation into the Dao, becoming a sword stele guarding the Sword Tomb.

20354.event: A rustic youth. When a plague ravaged, he apprenticed to an old doctor, vowing to heal the world.

20355.event: Alone, he cured diseases with herbs, then rescued a cultivator during tribulation, forging a karmic bond with immortality.

20356.event: The cultivator gave him the Qingnang Immortal Scripture, linking medicine and alchemy to start his cultivation.

20357.event: Through medicine he entered Dao, built foundation, refined Life-Extending Pill, earned fame as Saintly Hand of Dan Medicine.

20358.event: He healed a demonic cultivator, was expelled, and roamed the wilderness with unwavering resolve.

20359.event: He used heavenly lightning to achieve Golden Core, but despair over a short lifespan led to a fatal breakthrough.

20360.event: To extend life, he reverse-refined Heaven-Seizing Pill, incurred backlash. Lost cultivation, white hair, died in his alchemy room.

20361.event: On his deathbed, he inscribed his lifelong medical insights onto bamboo slips, then departed this life.

20362.event: An orphan adopted by a demon sect elder cultivates a soul-devouring art, turning violent.

20363.event: Spared an infant during a massacre, he was deemed a traitor, crippled, and thrown into a death cell.

20364.event: Received the 'Clear Heart Mantra' from an old fiend in prison, dissipated demonic arts, reshaped Dao foundation, and escaped alive.

20365.event: Entered a righteous sect incognito, started as a menial worker, cultivated secretly, but was suspected and ostracized by fellow disciples.

20366.event: In the sect tournament, he defeated three geniuses with demonic arts, then leaped off a cliff to prove his resolve.

20367.event: At the cliff base, a miracle fused good and evil arts, creating Pure World Demon Heart Art, reaching Golden Core.

20368.event: Returned to the demon sect, used new method to enlighten corrupt disciples, dismantled it from within, became Pure World Venerable.

20369.event: In Demon Abyss, he summoned demons to refine heart, achieved Nascent Soul, burned his soul to purify it, perished.

20370.event: A village boy saw an immortal making pills, became obsessed, and imitated them with mud.

20371.event: Orphaned, he foraged alone in deep mountains, ate toxic grass, survived, then a strange fruit transformed his meridians and marrow.

20372.event: Using mortal fire, after many failures, I finally refined the Foundation Establishment Pill and became a rogue cultivator.

20373.event: Traveled widely, traded herbs with demon cultivators, ambushed by sect alchemists, killed them, obtained secret manual.

20374.event: After decades refining a Golden Core, pill poison shortened his life, so he seeks heavenly materials.

20375.event: Found 'Nine-leaf Ganoderma' in a secret realm, refined 'Detoxification Pill', turned disaster into blessing, breakthrough in alchemy.

20376.event: Refined Nine-cycle Immortal Pill; celestial phenomena drew old Nascent Soul monster. I escaped but died from injuries in cave.

20377.event: After fifty years of secluded cultivation, he perfected the Nine-cycle Immortal Pill but failed its heavenly tribulation and dissolved.

20378.event: Born with a sword scar, he cried like steel, caught a heavenly blade, and was taken by an old Daoist.

20379.event: Found an ancient sword in a cave; touching it triggered clanging and a past life vision.

20380.event: Worshipped into Heavenly Sword Sect, manifested a phantom of sword spirit on the Sword Testing Stone, alarmed the elders.

20381.event: After foundation building entered the Sword Cave, realized 'Heart Sword Union', spiritual sense suddenly increased, often dreamed of sword cutting.

20382.event: During Golden Core tribulation, in the heavenly thunder tribulation, the remnant soul of the ancient sword returned to its place.

20383.event: Discovered the former master's mansion, found hidden sword 'Return to Void', its resonance nearly shattered Dao heart, barely kept clarity.

20384.event: During the Nascent Soul tribulation, cutting down the inner demon obsession cracked the Dao foundation and dissipated the soul.

20385.event: Realized oneness with the sword, returned to origin, hoped for divinity, but tribulation mutated.

20386.event: To protect the sect, he drew heavenly tribulation into his sword, shattered it, formed a domain, and slew the outer.

20387.event: Entered the Qingxiao Sword Sect, showing initial sword talent, but with an aloof and proud nature.

20388.event: For using sinister sword techniques on fellow disciples, he was punished to guard the sword tomb for ten years.

20389.event: Deep in the sword tomb, Cangfeng's resonance imparted a Burial Sword Art fragment.

20390.event: I achieved minor sword mastery, causing the tomb's swords to ring, alarming elders who jailed me for suspected forbidden arts.

20391.event: Broke out of prison, betrayed the sect, hunted by fellow disciples, and fled for life.

20392.event: A wandering sword elder guided me, clearing my sword heart, so I hid among mortals to hone it.

20393.event: Returned to Qingxiao Sword Sect, settled karmic ties, defeated three great elders alone, and left the complete sword manual.

20394.event: Founded 'Cangfeng Valley', secluded and transmitted sword, indifferent to worldly affairs, blessing gradually deepened.

20395.event: At the Sword Grave, myriad swords mourned as he attained nirvana, his body a sword monument.

20396.event: Family medical books; parents died of plague, resolved to practice medicine to help the world.

20397.event: Traveled around, met a hermit who gifted the 'Grass and Wood Elixir Classic', began the path of immortality.

20398.event: Refined 'Returning Spring Elixir', saved a city from plague, people offered incense and worship.

20399.event: Fought demon cultivators using Five Poison Metamorphosis Elixir, but its poison backfired, draining life essence and killing me.

20400.event: Refining a golden pill, a tribulation fell, an old monk died to save me, teaching me good and evil karma.

20401.event: Descended to mortal as a doctor, entered the mortal world for training, realized 'the healer's benevolence is the Dao heart'.

20402.event: Opened 'Jishi Hall', refined 'Nine Revolutions Reincarnation Elixir' to save a Nascent Soul true man, renowned in the cultivation world.

20403.event: Dao foundation led to a death in meditation.

20404.event: He ventured into the demon realm to save a friend, but demonic qi corroded his Dao and killed him.

20405.event: He drew heavenly punishment while refining a pill, sacrificed himself, completing it but perishing.

20406.event: The Blood Demon Sect captured him for his innate demon body and made him a demon child.

20407.event: He learned the 'Blood Fiend Art,' killed people to refine souls, and his heart grew cold.

20408.event: He rose as a demon sect star, slaying dozens in a bloody battle, his fame soaring.

20409.event: He met female cultivator 'Ling Shuang' from the Sword Pavilion, and after a battle, feelings arose, secretly developing admiration.

20410.event: He betrayed the sect, eloped with Ling Shuang, was chased by the demon cult, and both died.

20411.event: Ling Shuang died protecting him from a demon sect elder; he fell, mortally wounded, and died silently.

20412.event: He faked his death to escape, dispersed his cultivation and re-cultivated the 'Righteous Qi Art,' hiding among the common folk.

20413.event: He returned to the cultivation world under the name 'Bai Xuan,' secretly assassinating his former demon sect enemies.

20414.event: In his Nascent Soul tribulation, Ling Shuang's shadow nearly caused his fall, but emotion led breakthrough.

20415.event: Besieged by the demon sect, Bai Xuan killed three elders but died exhausted and injured, his Dao extinguished.

20416.event: At Ling Shuang's grave, he shattered his Nascent Soul, turned his obsession into a sword, killed the demon sect leader.

20417.event: He found an ancient cultivator's cave, got a broken furnace and recipe, and absorbed qi.

20418.event: He fumbled to refine a Marrow Cleansing Pill, improved his talent, and began alchemy cultivation.

20419.event: He entered a secret realm for herbs, was attacked by a demonic python, got the ganoderma, but died of uncurable.

20420.event: His golden core formed, pill fragrance drew a small tribulation, and rogue cultivator friends aided him.

20421.event: He created the 'Nine-Cycle Spirit-Concentrating Pill,' which can help people break through bottlenecks, and his fame spread far and wide.

20422.event: He sought the Eastern Sea's fairy mountain for immortals and pill recipes, but the formation repelled him.

20423.event: He exchanged three 'Spirit-Concentrating Pills' for a cave dwelling with rich spiritual qi and established the 'Danxia Valley'.

20424.event: He overcomes the heart demon of alchemy failure and self-destruction during Nascent Soul tribulation by holding true to the Dao.

20425.event: He sought the Ice Stamen in the North Sea, but frost destroyed his Dao foundation, killing him.

20426.event: He sacrificed himself to the furnace to complete the Spirit Transformation Pill, turning to ashes.

20427.event: Radiant clouds and a brow pattern marked his birth; elders proclaimed an artifact spirit descended.

20428.event: He joined the Artifact Refining Sect and studied the Nine Refinements Returning to Origin Art day and night.

20429.event: He caused thousands of artifacts to sing in the competition, and was declared Saint Artifact Heir.

20430.event: First time entering Langya Cave Heaven, his fragment resonates, granting him the Heavenly Creations heritage.

20431.event: He forces the fragment’s power to repel demons, but its backlash shatters his meridians, killing him.

20432.event: He nurtured a fragment with his blood, trained for years, forged the Langya Ring, and reached Golden Core.

20433.event: He wielded the Langya Ring to slay demons in the Abyss Rift, earning the title Artifact Immortal Maiden.

20434.event: He delves into the Abyss, sees ancient artifact remains, and knows the fragment seals the rift.

20435.event: In my final battle with the Demon Lord, my ring shattered, my soul collapsed, and I perished on Cangmang Peak.

20436.event: He sacrifices cultivation to become the seal, she mends the rift; Langya ends, Abyss sealed forever.

20437.event: Born by the Sword Tomb, his cries make swords hum. His grandfather names him Jian Chen, Sword Star.

20438.event: He entered the Sword Tomb and a broken sword flew into his hand like an old friend.

20439.event: He learns the Sword Burial Art from a remnant soul, communing with swords day and night.

20440.event: To protect sword spirits, he triggers formation, repels enemies but suffers backlash. He survives but cultivation is crippled.

20441.event: Disturbance reveals Sword Emperor's tomb; he obtains sword Taichu, acknowledged as master, perfecting his sword arts.

20442.event: Demonic cultivators trap Wei Jianchen for the Taichu sword; he burns his lifespan to kill them, surviving barely weakened.

20443.event: He sacrifices all cultivation to repair the damaged Sword Tomb, dropping to Foundation Establishment.

20444.event: He guarded the Sword Tomb for fifty years with the sword spirit, aged but clear, realizing 'I am the sword.'

20445.event: Tribulation destroys Sword Tomb. Wei Jianchen merges, becomes giant sword shielding region. His figure dissolves; sword becomes Shoujian Peak.

20446.event: Born into a family of medicinal fragrance, his whole body emitted herb scent, and his cry was like a bell.

20447.event: He followed his grandfather to gather herbs, recognized hundreds of plants, and was exceptionally perceptive.

20448.event: During a plague, he helped his grandfather save lives, found the incomplete Qing Nang, and learned medicine as a path.

20449.event: His grandfather died of illness, deeply moved, he vowed to help the world and began wandering.

20450.event: He healed a cultivator, received the Ling Shu Dao Yin Shu, and mastered medicine and martial arts.

20451.event: He ventured south, created Qing Zhang Dan to cure miasma, but was poisoned. He carved formula, died; miasma vanished.

20452.event: A Golden Core cultivator sought his medical skills, but Lu Huairen's medical teachings won the cultivator's protection, founding Xinglin Zhai.

20453.event: Demonic sect stole Qing Zhang Dan. Lu Huairen went to demon realm, countered poison, saved city, turned to ashes.

20454.event: He wrote Xinglin Renxin Jing, combining medicine and cultivation, made public to benefit all scattered cultivators.

20455.event: He saved a cursed Nascent Soul with his last qi via golden needles, smiled and died as apricot blossoms fell.

20456.event: Born on a blood moon night in a demonic sect, with faint demonic patterns in his eyes, he was accepted.

20457.event: He practiced Blood Fiend True Solution; baleful qi eroded his nature, but his spiritual sense remained keen.

20458.event: Ordered to massacre a village, he saw children, his demon heart stirred, so he defied his master and released them.

20459.event: He rebelled against the demonic sect, escaped wounded, was chased by righteous cultivators, fell off a cliff, and died crushed.

20460.event: Rescued by a fishergirl, I go by Ayang, hide in a fishing village, practice Clear Mind Sutra to purge corruption.

20461.event: The demonic sect tracked him down, the fishing village was massacred, the fisherman's daughter died protecting him.

20462.event: He fused Blood Fiend True Solution and Qingxin Mantra into Purifying World Demon Scripture to counter demonic arts.

20463.event: Both righteous and demonic sects came to seize the scripture.

20464.event: The ancient sword gained spirit from heaven and earth, birthing a naive consciousness that breathes sun and moon.

20465.event: Dropped blood to recognize its master by a golden core sword cultivator, blending sword aura, becoming the life-bound flying sword.

20466.event: It followed its master through realms, slaying demons and drinking blood, growing in spirit with hints of emotion.

20467.event: The sword spirit, grieving its master's heart demon failure, wailed, cracked but whole, its spirit drained, falling into deep sleep.

20468.event: After ages of solitude, it transformed into a form, condensing into a cold youth with a face like ice jade.

20469.event: Accidentally entered the mortal world, loved a herb girl, but was shunned for being a spirit, wandering alone.

20470.event: With inner demons haunting me, I was trapped by demon cultivators.

20471.event: Enlightened by a wandering monk, it regained its sword heart, returned to the master's sword tomb, and vowed eternal guard.

20472.event: Ten thousand swords rang in unison as it grasped the Return to Nothingness Sword Intent, its final home.

20473.event: Demon cultivators attacked; the sword tomb self-destructed, its spirit scattering into myriad mourning swords.

20474.event: Born in snow, abandoned at a sword tomb, raised by a white-haired guardian, sword aura linked its fate.

20475.event: Upon entering the Sword Forest, ten thousand swords hummed, awakening the first Sword Guard form: Listening to the Sword.

20476.event: Dusted the first generation's sword monument, wiped the swords. A blood drop awakened the spirit, forming a symbiotic vow.

20477.event: Rogue cultivators attempted to steal swords; the tomb sacrificed itself, its soul joining the formation as a heroic spirit.

20478.event: A human loved a sword's artifact spirit, defying heaven and summoning the heart demon tribulation.

20479.event: The artifact spirit dissipated to protect him; he turned white-haired, sealed his sword, and closed his door.

20480.event: He sacrificed himself, merging his soul into the sword array, becoming a stone statue forever guarding the tomb.

20481.event: Born to apothecaries, he knew herbs by scent before he could read.

20482.event: After his parents died in a plague, he vowed to heal the world, traveling with a basket.

20483.event: Saved a wounded rogue cultivator, got Green Bag Scripture fragment, now half physician, half cultivator guiding qi with needles.

20484.event: Scattered all family wealth to provide medicine for the poor, having nothing left, clothes in tatters, but eyes growing brighter.

20485.event: He tested hundreds of poisons on himself, created Qingzhang Powder, saved a city, and was hailed as a divine physician.

20486.event: He used mortal medicine to balance yin and yang, repelling demonic qi in a plague village, awakening his Dao heart.

20487.event: Found a dead Nascent Soul cultivator, combined his medical insights with his own, creating "Mortal Medicine True Explanation".

20488.event: Merit perfected; a blue luan came; he shed his body, became a medical immortal in the Great Void.

20489.event: Born in war, village burned, parents dead; demon elder took him to Blood River Sect and planted demon seed.

20490.event: Three years in a blood pool forged a Blood Demon Body; mutual slaughter among disciples numbed his heart.

20491.event: Ordered to massacre a family, he awoke to their cries, disobeyed, and hid surviving children.

20492.event: Betrayed sect, pursued by demons; saved by a masked sword cultivator, hid in small town till old age.

20493.event: He married the sword cultivator who saved him, had a daughter, and briefly enjoyed family happiness, warming his Dao heart.

20494.event: After demons killed his wife and daughter, he became a demon, slaughtered pursuers, and wept blood.

20495.event: Utterly despairing, he traveled far to a borderland, secretly protected mortals with demonic arts, and killed no more.

20496.event: He exposed himself to protect the borderlands, shattered his spirit, and became purifying blood rain.

20497.event: Born in a pill shop, the infant, imbued with herb fragrance, actually reached for furnace fragments.

20498.event: He found a broken cauldron; divine sense taught him the Minor Pill Classic intro, inspiring alchemy.

20499.event: He spent all wealth on Qi-Gathering Powder, lost an arm, laughed defiantly, then died as the room burned.

20500.event: After ten years of bitter practice, he made Qi-Gathering Powder, entered Qi Refining, but showed age.

20501.event: He entered Black Abyss for herbs, barely survived, made Foundation Establishment Pill, but damaged root and died.

20502.event: He stumbled upon ancient Danxia's legacy, advancing his alchemy. His Jade Liquid Pill boosted lifespan, shocking scattered cultivators.

20503.event: Sect demanded pill formula; he refused, was hunted. He used Burning Pill, killed enemies, but Golden Core shattered, soul dissipated.

20504.event: After destruction comes creation; use remaining Golden Elixir to refine Nascent Soul Breaking Pill, force Nascent Soul, trigger Heavenly Tribulation.

20505.event: Surviving the Nascent Soul Tribulation brings fame, yet they carve formulas on a nameless cliff and vanish.

20506.event: Find celestial home overseas, achieve ultimate alchemy, ascend as rainbow on Danxia Peak, leaving Dan Jie Cloud Chart praised forever.

20507.event: Heaven and earth's spiritual energy surges, plants grow wildly, beasts stir, cultivators feel breakthroughs, enlightenment comes instantly.

20508.event: Millennium Sword Tomb rises from depths, sword spirits wail bloodily, keeper with lamp; sword-hearted may enter for destiny.

20509.event: Demonic defector establishes sect under blood moon, spreads technique; practitioners gain power then go mad, die, bodies rot, land cursed.

20510.event: A rogue alchemist creates a life-extending elixir, sparking global war over fifty extra years.

20511.event: A traveling healer with silver needles and herbs cures cultivators' inner demons, leaving them refreshed.

20512.event: Chaos in the Heavenly Dao brings lightning tribulations; mortals turn to ash, body and soul lost.

20513.event: An ancient god falls; his divine blood awakens nature, but his cry shakes cultivators' Dao hearts.

20514.event: Trapped in a war between righteous and demonic sects, you die in the wilderness.

20515.event: You break into a deity's cave for treasure, but ancient traps destroy both body and soul.

20516.event: Overnight, awakened artifacts rebel; sects investigate, cultivators flee to mountains, abandoning them.

20517.event: Spiritual energy fades, life becomes poison; the Age of Ending Dharma arrives, and your life ends.

20518.event: You step into an ancient portal, leaving for a vast realm, your fate unknown, your bond severed.

20519.event: Spiritual energy surges overnight, loosening cultivators' bottlenecks, but ancient beasts awaken, mixing opportunity with deadly calamity.

20520.event: The Sword Tomb quakes, swords ring, the Keeper emerges and proclaims the Sword Lord's arrival; sword cultivators flock.

20521.event: You fought in a war; traitor Red Blood defected with the banner; you fell, body shattered.

20522.event: Physician Lin Yun finds the Nine Revolutions Soul Return recipe; news leaks, forces contend, rogue cultivators exploit chaos.

20523.event: Rogue alchemist Gong Yezi's pill of common herbs boosts Foundation Establishment, giving thousands of cultivators hope.

20524.event: An unnamed plague wind from the southern wilds corrupts your cultivation, plunging you into demonic illusion, leading to your demise.

20525.event: As spirit stone veins dried, prices soared, sects monopolized, rogue cultivators suffered, cultivation halted, markets withered.

20526.event: A Nascent Soul sovereign's failed tribulation sank your continent; you and billions perished, blood staining the sky.

20527.event: The ancient Blue Luan Mirror's spirit chose a mortal master, granting eternal youth and divine insight, drawing envy.

20528.event: The Heavenly Craft Sect's grandmaster artificer developed a technique turning iron into flying swords, shaking families and arming rogue cultivators.

20529.event: The Azure Sea's Eye opened, revealing Tai Xu Immortal Mansion. Cultivators flocked for treasures, willing to die.

20530.event: Sword Grave's keeper returned, foretold the Nine Heavens' silence. He gave talismans to avert collapse, but fate was inscrutable.

20531.event: You entered a Taoist temple; a white crane claimed a past-life debt; you gave food, and it flew away.
20531.postEvent: Afterward, passing the temple, a crane shadow watched you, unsettling your mind.

20532.event: A frog's recitation from a lotus leaf cleared your mind during cultivation.
20532.postEvent: Your fellow disciples thought you improved, unaware you made good karma with a frog.

20533.event: Lost sparring, frustrated; then a sparrow pooped on both, and they laughed.
20533.postEvent: The incident became a joke, but it opened your mind and quickened your sword moves.

20534.event: You rescued a crane that brought stones. One glowed on a full moon, clearing a blocked meridian.
20534.postEvent: The red-crowned crane thereafter often accompanied you, and on your path of cultivation, you gained an avian guardian.

20535.event: Found a talisman; infused it, heard snoring. A Golden Core elder compensated you with pills.
20535.postEvent: From then on, whenever you heard snoring, you inexplicably felt reassured, and it was easier to avoid distraction during cultivation.

20536.event: While catching crickets, a cricket spoke, claiming to be a failed Golden Core cultivator, then vanished.
20536.postEvent: After that, each full moon, you heard a cricket chirp near your ear, but found no trace.

20537.event: Eating fluorescent mushrooms from the rice jar caused electric farts that fried a basket of eggs over three days.

20538.event: Tapping a wooden fish in an abandoned temple made it recite a mantra, clearing rain and lighting scriptures.
20538.postEvent: For days, every brushstroke carried a hint of Zen.

20539.event: A green carp held a scroll; at noon, lightning struck the tree, exposing a sword manual.

20540.event: Your urine froze in snow, trapping a silver insect. When it melted, the insect circled you and flew away.

20541.event: A performer's monkey spat in your face, giving you three days of animal speech; your hen complained about stale bran.

20542.event: You hid in an abandoned alchemy furnace; its warm fire gave you a scent attracting spirit butterflies for three days.

20543.event: North Star winked; a mole appeared. A Daoist said it's a star's fate, an omen of chaos but useless.

20544.event: Dream sword in sky; waking, she found sword-shaped grass, pulled it, blood turned it to sword qi.

20545.event: Found a coin, heard waves, fell into a well that turned salty, stunning villagers for half a month.

20546.event: Chased a rabbit into a tree, slammed into it at {age}, fainted, then smelled spiritual energy for a day.

20547.event: Helped father dry rice; crane droppings instantly ripened it, then crane demanded three-tenths.

20548.event: While practicing calligraphy, ink twisted into a poem with a visible last line about becoming the Green Emperor, then scattered.

20549.event: She hid in a coffin during hide-and-seek in a graveyard, then saw ghosts for six months after rescue.

20550.event: At {age}, child faced a locust king that said 'Make way.' Unyielding, it flew around; villagers called him prodigy.

20551.event: For her birthday, got anonymous jade; wearing it, dreamed of weeping woman. Jade broke, dreams ceased; black hair remained.

20552.event: A sloppy Daoist touched a {age}-year-old's skull, said he'd die or be immortal; the child then died of fever.

20553.event: I ate a purple wild berry, my glittering stool lured a yellow dog, and lightning struck it, charring it overnight.

20554.event: A flat stone skipped seven times, turned into a dragon, and vanished into clouds.

20555.event: I plundered a bird's nest, found a warm stone heart, and it hatched into a stone bird that flew away.

20556.event: The dying neighbor asked you to draw water; your aged reflection startled you, spilling it, and she left a recipe—an alchemy primer.

20557.event: A talking crow led me to a cliff, joked, then flew off, revealing a nine-leaf ganoderma.

20558.event: Woke to find hands swapped, distraught till noon, napped; hands returned but each palm had a faint mark.

20559.event: Locust needles fell on village, covered man but didn't pierce. Shaken off, they became seeds. Herbs grew on barren land.

20560.event: While meditating, an old pine whispered that its thousand-year-old fuling spirit would escape using tudun.
20560.postEvent: Dug three feet deep, obtained a strand of fuling spirit, consumed it, and suddenly understood the language of all herbs.

20561.event: Stumbled into an abandoned village where children play with spirit stones, including your lost amulet.
20561.postEvent: Exchanged for a hawthorn stick; the spent spirit stone revived memories, rippling the Dao heart.

20562.event: Your heart demon's golden carp swam into your dantian on a full moon, numbing you for three days as cultivation cycled.
20562.postEvent: I checked ancient texts; the Fish and Dragon Listening to Dharma sign is neither blessing nor curse.

20563.event: At Sword Grave, saw a withered tree bearing sword-shaped fruits. Picked one; it chimed and revealed incomplete sword techniques.
20563.postEvent: After three months, the flying sword was inconsistent but amused the grave-guarding spirit dog that often watched.

20564.event: A white crane carries you to a cloud-spinning woman who gives you a piece for an invisibility cloak.
20564.postEvent: The cloud cloak hides your shadow but distracts opponents when sunlight reveals you.

20565.event: While cultivating, you ate a Dream Mushroom, seeing lifespans above heads, yours '?', then felt melancholic.
20565.postEvent: A mushroom grew in the alchemy room; you refined it into a Longevity Query Pill but dared not take it.

20566.event: For seven days, every word you spoke produced a lotus, forcing a vow of silence.
20566.postEvent: Lotus faded, your words held sandalwood's scent; discussing Dao raised affinity.

20567.event: Lightning struck spiritual tea in your sleeve, creating Thunder Sound Tea that sharpens senses with thunder's echo.
20567.postEvent: Afterward, you often wished for lightning strikes, but such fortune never came again.

20568.event: Met a mad Daoist in a tavern. He carved a sword scar. You studied it and learned Drunken Slash.
20568.postEvent: The sword scar faded by itself after three years, as if it had never existed.
