20569.event: Your three-hundred-year-old spiritual turtle swallowed its core under the full moon, reaching Foundation Establishment.
20569.postEvent: It telepathically asked for spirit stones, so you helplessly called it fellow Daoist.

20570.event: A cultivation mishap disordered your meridians for three days, then opened a hidden one for smoother flow.
20570.postEvent: A medical cultivator exclaimed that you had achieved mastery in 'Mud Skill'.

20571.event: Suddenly spiritual rain fell in your cave, forming the character 'Dao', and your Dao heart stabilized after sitting a day.
20571.postEvent: After the rain, you found your spiritual power had become purer.

20572.event: Entered a battlefield relic. Spirits forced you into a game. You lost nine rounds and learned footwork 'Winning from Defeat'.
20572.postEvent: Since then, your movement has always been crooked, but you always manage to dodge vital points.

20573.event: A squirrel at a celestial debate stuns you with its "Pine Nut Way" by cracking a pine nut per argument.
20573.postEvent: You had to gift it ten jin of spiritual pine nuts to get it to concede.

20574.event: Your shadow sometimes moved alone, once moon-gazed, and brought back moonlight that made your eyes shimmer.
20574.postEvent: It never happened again, but your eye technique seemed to have slightly improved.

20575.event: You accidentally ate Morphing Grass, became a white rabbit for seven days, then learned Rabbit Kicking Eagle.
20575.postEvent: After returning to human form, your leg strength greatly increased, but you still salivated at the sight of carrots.

20576.event: Deep in a mountain, you found a worry-erasing spring, drank, forgot losing spirit stones, then lost them again.
20576.postEvent: You diverted spring water to decorate your cave, but it lasted only as long as an incense stick.

20577.event: Meditating, you saw Gate open and light descend. Your cultivation loosened. A toad absorbed light, spoke, demanded a title.
20577.postEvent: You conferred upon it the title 'Guardian Toad of the Dwelling', but it often stole your elixirs.

20578.event: A gust of wind swept you into a cliff, where the wall was engraved with countless characters for 'regret'.
20578.postEvent: Afterward, your heart demons found it hard to invade.

20579.event: You dreamed of being an eternal lamp in a temple; a vague deity refilled it, granting thirty more years.
20579.postEvent: After waking, you found your lifespan had indeed been extended by thirty years.

20580.event: You entered a realm where roles reversed; a year there was a moment back home, but you gained worldly insights.
20580.postEvent: Your comprehension slightly improved, but you always felt reality was somewhat illusory.

20581.event: You found a token that makes spoken words real for plants, causing overgrowth that nearly floods your cave.
20581.postEvent: The token shattered after three uses.

20582.event: At an auction, you mistakenly bid a single spirit stone on a piece of scrap iron.
20582.postEvent: The sword has no edge, but it can cut through heart demons.

20583.event: For seven days, your steps left green lotuses that bloomed and withered, revealing life's impermanence.
20583.postEvent: Your Dao heart became increasingly carefree.

20584.event: You try fusing Ice Soul and Red Sun, but the explosion turns a hundred zhang to ashes and kills you.
20584.postEvent: Only two intertwined spiritual marks remain on the spot, later called the 'Ice-Fire Tribulation Mark.'

20585.event: On the night of your 490th birthday, you suddenly feel your Nascent Soul stirring.
20585.postEvent: Every full moon the Nascent Soul emerges as a sect spectacle; disciples call you Crane Dance True Man.

20586.event: Mistakenly drawing a remnant soul into the furnace, you forge a transparent sword that calls you 'Mother' for ten years.
20586.postEvent: The Sword Grave keeper identifies this ancient sword Childlike, whose innocent yet invincible intent recognizes its master.

20587.event: After 30 years of seclusion, you find a talking pill that demands three days of Dao discussion before being eaten.
20587.postEvent: The pill becomes clear qi, enters your belly, and grants thirty years of herbal insight.

20588.event: Mistakenly entering a thunder-split realm, you see a barren peach tree and a stone tortoise carved with your regrets.
20588.postEvent: You caress the stone and weep; your tears fall to the ground. The peach tree suddenly bears a fruit.

20589.event: Drunk with a farmer, you draw a talisman on a cow; it grows horns and flies away.
20589.postEvent: The old farmer demands his plow ox; you must give him a golden pill.

20590.event: You find a blank book, meditate on it daily; after 30 years, "Why read?" appears, nearly shaking your Dao heart.
20590.postEvent: Afterward, random market slang appears on the pages every day. You unexpectedly comprehend a sword technique that returns to simplicity.

20591.event: The Heart Demon becomes your dead pet with your shoe; you laugh, ending the tribulation.
20591.postEvent: You then tell everyone the Heart Demon is a silly dog, leaving fellow cultivators amused and exasperated.

20592.event: You tame a beast that only answers to Meow; feed it three jin of spirit fish daily or it disrupts.
20592.postEvent: The Primeval Devourer, a millennium-long scourge, reforms through your Dao heart into the sect's protector, but its habits persist.

20593.event: You argue with three Daoist friends for decades over foot order, then seek the Heavenly Dao.
20593.postEvent: When they return, all four have forgotten the question, but each creates a movement technique, which becomes a humorous tale.

20594.event: A child mistakes a dying meditating monk for a statue, draws a beard, and his laughter extends his life.
20594.postEvent: You accept that child as your last disciple; your life force helps his average talent achieve Nascent Soul.

20595.event: Refining Forget Sorrow Elixir makes plants sigh and your tears bloom ephemeral flowers.
20595.postEvent: A mortal poet writes of a fleeting flower, and you are unknowingly moved.

20596.event: A bronze mirror appears in your cave, showing you in ten thousand years preaching to a squirrel amid ruins.
20596.postEvent: You laugh heartily and exit seclusion. From then on, you act even more casually, yet your cultivation advances instead.

20597.event: At a ceremony, you lose 19 Go games to a tortoise. It says your skill is worse than moss.
20597.postEvent: You have realized the state of carefree moves, making your skill deduction 30% faster.

20598.event: You buy a pill from a demon sect traitor; it sprouts silly grass on your head that spits daily.
20598.postEvent: You keep this grass as a companion; its spittle cures poisons, so you keep it in your hair.

20599.event: You send a mortal a letter by flying sword; it returns with eggs and a note about hen eggs.
20599.postEvent: You smile, set a flying-sword barrier in seclusion, but the egg basket adds mortal life to your Dao heart.

20600.event: At the Sword Grave's edge, a tomb keeper jokes to a humming broken sword, saying the senior needs cheering.
20600.postEvent: You sit telling jokes for three days, then the broken sword grants you a wisp of true sword-guarding intent.

20601.event: Refining heavenly thunder, a sentient koi swims in your meridians, making you spark.
20601.postEvent: Helpless, you have to constantly 'fish' in your meridians, but as a result you master the Thunder Escape technique.

20602.event: For cursing Heaven, lightning makes you live three illusory lives as stone lions. Now everyone looks like schoolboys.
20602.postEvent: After returning, your cultivation skyrockets, but you develop the habit of squatting at the sect's gate.

20603.event: You eat all your pills to end your life, but conflicting forces temper your body, turning your white hair black.
20603.postEvent: Unsure whether to laugh or cry, you must live on, becoming a legend among pill addicts.

20604.event: A soul mends your robe in ruins, then fades, leaving: 'Immortal path long; robe brings peace.'
20604.postEvent: This robe warms your Dao heart, ending complaints about difficult journeys.

20605.event: You dreamed you were a speck of dust, blown by the wind into a sword graveyard, landing on a rusty.
20605.postEvent: You are certain that was a past-life fragment; now every grain of sand in your eyes becomes a sword.

20606.event: At a temple fair, a child mistook you for a god; you played the role and received maltose candy.
20606.postEvent: You chewed the candy as you continued your wandering, feeling that this candy was sweeter than the Nine-Turn Golden Pill.

20607.event: After a century of cultivation, your Dao companion redid your old erotic painting, criticizing its art, loosening your Dao heart.
20607.postEvent: Later generations revered that new picture as the ultimate dual cultivation treasure, but you're too ashamed to admit it.

20608.event: While in meditation, you suddenly felt a twitch in your heart string.
20608.postEvent: Heaven's Way granted merit; the scorched tree sprouted anew. You laughed wryly, questioning karma's simplicity.

20609.event: While meditating, your spiritual energy condensed into a cicada that buzzed three days then vanished, leaving cultivation unchanged.

20610.event: While gathering herbs on a mountain peak, you saw a natural chessboard on a huge rock.
20610.postEvent: Recovered after seven days, but your tongue still occasionally stiffens.

20611.event: During a heavenly tribulation, thunder straightened your beard upward, taking half a year to recover; you were nicknamed Antenna Immortal.

20612.event: After cultivating, you woke up smelling like sandalwood for nine days, attracting annoying bees and butterflies.
20612.postEvent: After nine days, the fragrance fades, and you inexplicably feel more Buddhist.

20613.event: You ate a strange fruit, causing nightly singing that disturbed your sect but attracted spirit magpies.
20613.postEvent: After three months, you gained musical enlightenment but suffered midnight insomnia.

20614.event: In your cave, a doppelgänger emerged from the wall, bowed, vanished. Your left shoe was on your right foot.

20615.event: You rescue an injured fox cub, which then daily brings you the same useless itchweed, leaving you amused.
20615.postEvent: You refined itchy grass into powder, which surprisingly worked well against the bothersome monkeys.

20616.event: You bought the 'Nine Heavens Mysterious Woman Heart Sutra' but it was actually a silkworm raising manual.
20616.postEvent: In anger, you resold it, but someone bought it at a high price, and you made a small profit.

20617.event: While meditating, a strange light reveals your past life as a whisk, and now you feel kinship and clarity when holding one.
20617.postEvent: Touching a duster boosts your comprehension, but disciples mock your foolishness.

20618.event: A mad old Daoist forced you to study Yin Yang Union Qi Record as his destined companion.
20618.postEvent: Practice boosted your movement skills, but your Dao heart is impure, haunted by the old Daoist's chilling face.

20619.event: Flying on your sword, it said your feet stink, shocking you both into a manure pit.
20619.postEvent: Filth clung to you for three months; your smell made fellow disciples flee.

20620.event: A mind demon, as an old nag, wore your patience thin in three days, forging your Dao heart like stone.
20620.postEvent: Afterward, your ears were clear, and instead you felt that all mundane noises were like celestial music.

20621.event: The sect played 'Rainbow Robe Melody', drawing your essence to dance gracefully, stunning everyone.
20621.postEvent: After three days of shame, you learned the Flowing Cloud Sword Style from the dance, improving both body and blade.

20622.event: Mistaking ancient Qingluan dung for a pill, your mouth fouled, stomach churned, then bones crackled and tempered.
20622.postEvent: For the next three months, your breath still carried a fecal fragrance, and all beasts became friendly to you.

20623.event: During tribulation, thunder became a cat; touching it electrocuted you, infusing your meridians.
20623.postEvent: Before the thunder cat dissipated, it left a scroll of 'Imperial Thunder True Solution' in your knowledge sea.

20624.event: During seclusion, a red lingzhi spoke, debated, then turned human, knelt, and became your first disciple as the stone vanished.
20624.postEvent: A plant-spirit disciple cultivates very fast but needs three spirit stones daily.

20625.event: You bought a rogue's sword manual for a month's spirit stones, found it obscene, burned it, but golden runes appeared.
20625.postEvent: You learned the incomplete move 'Ash Sword', which is unexpected.

20626.event: Bitten by a caterpillar in a spirit field, you grew cabbage leaves and could photosynthesize instead of eating.
20626.postEvent: But every time there is a thunderstorm, the leaves attract lightning, causing unbearable suffering.

20627.event: In a secret realm, a black jade slip insulted you; daily arguments led to breaking through an inner demon layer.
20627.postEvent: Three months later, the jade slip quieted down and left a sentence before dissipating: 'You can be taught.'

20628.event: A qi deviation gave you thunderous farts that repel demonic beasts, earning many battle feats.
20628.postEvent: However, during sect gatherings, everyone keeps a distance of three zhang from you, and your reputation spreads far and wide.

20629.event: You bought regret medicine, recalled missing Dao at seventeen, wept, and your heart's knot dissolved.
20629.postEvent: Later, you examined it and found it was just malt sugar pills, but your Dao heart became unexpectedly clear.

20630.event: Practicing out-of-body travel, you found a pangolin in your body; you shared shifts, and it dug up a thousand-year-old ginseng.
20630.postEvent: You learned to dig through mountains, but your nails get muddy and hands tremble incessantly.

20631.event: While refining pills, a Cauldron Elder apparition demanded a past-life debt; you paid, improving the pill's quality.
20631.postEvent: Before dissipating, the Cauldron Elder whispered: 'Remember to pay double next life.'

20632.event: You spent a large sum to buy a 'Binding Immortal Rope'.
20632.postEvent: That hemp rope is impervious to water and fire, and extremely tough.

20633.event: In meditation, your spirit visited an appetite-cultivation realm, brought spirit rice that increased lifespan but required eating, causing weight gain.
20633.postEvent: You became the sect's culinary cultivator. When cooking, thousands of rays of rosy light emanate.

20634.event: A fisherman gave you a trout; its belly held a token, leading you to a broken sword that acknowledged you.
20634.postEvent: You returned seeking the old man, but only his fishing rod hung; the stream mirrored a sword.

20635.event: During meditation, a spirit frog entered your dantian. After three years it left, leaving a sweet taste.
20635.postEvent: After that, you feel a kinship with frogs and often feed them spirit rice.

20636.event: An old ape challenged you to chess; you lost by half a move. It gave you a white stone.
20636.postEvent: The warm, moist white stone glows faintly at night, deepening your understanding.

20637.event: Accidentally entered a hollow tree with a peach orchard, met Qin survivors, tasted a millennium on a leaf, then awoke.
20637.postEvent: Later, when you searched for that tree again, it had long withered.

20638.event: Your shadow stood up on a full moon, turned into a black cat bringing tiles and spirit fruits.
20638.postEvent: That cat needs no feeding; it sleeps on your shoulder, earning the nickname 'Shadow Cat Daoist'.

20639.event: A Daoist warned against flying on a sword; you ignored, slipped, and plunged into a lotus pond.
20639.postEvent: That old Daoist laughed loudly on the shore and then disappeared.

20640.event: A rusty iron lump fell from the sky; after three days it turned to water and seeped into the ground.
20640.postEvent: After that, the plants in that patch of ground grew wildly; even ordinary weeds became low-grade spirit herbs.

20641.event: You ate a stone fruit; for three months you spoke profound gathas. Others thought you enlightened until it faded.
20641.postEvent: Because of this, you closed your door and refused visitors for half a year, too ashamed to see people.

20642.event: While organizing your pouch, you found a shape-shifting garment and hid it in fear.
20642.postEvent: Occasionally, you dream of a woman who smiles at you, and you wake up feeling melancholy.

20643.event: A white fox invited you to a feast under moonlight; you woke in a meadow recalling the moonlight.
20643.postEvent: You found an extra osmanthus branch in your sleeve, which never withered for a thousand years.

20644.event: I bought a broken fan; waving it summoned a fishy wind and flower rain. I sneezed comically.
20644.postEvent: A flower spirit later bought this fan dearly, revealing it was her love token.

20645.event: A lightning bolt struck a neighbor's pine, which grew glowing gourds. I picked one that lit my room.
20645.postEvent: It is said that the gourd can summon wandering souls, so I dared not use it much.

20646.event: I understood bird language; sparrows gossiped constantly. Annoyed, I hid, but they pecked my window. I had to listen.
20646.postEvent: After a long time, I unexpectedly gleaned some worldly wisdom from it, and laughed at myself.

20647.event: Meditating in a stone chamber, a face discussed Dao, laughed, thanked me, emerged as a stone man, bowed, and left.
20647.postEvent: I stared at the hole in the wall, not knowing whether to laugh or cry.

20648.event: Bathing in a mountain spring, the water became a mirror, showing an elder who taught you a sword art.
20648.postEvent: Stunned briefly, I realized the sword intent had truly integrated and laughed at myself.

20649.event: I shook a gold bell, butterflies formed ancient erotic poems; blushing, I hid it.
20649.postEvent: Later, the gold bell mysteriously disappeared, and I felt relieved.

20650.event: A spirit crane circled the delivery room, its cries like music; a white feather fell onto the baby.
20650.postEvent: Later, this feather was sewn into a protective sachet and worn, with a faint luster flowing on it.

20651.event: Baby grabbed a talisman brush at his first birthday test. Father snatched it, but tip was wet; all laughed.
20651.postEvent: From then on, that talisman brush was stored away high, becoming a casual anecdote in the clan.

20652.event: Ate a blue glowing mushroom at two, turned purple, cured by acupuncture, now immune to insects and poisons.
20652.postEvent: The physician sighed, 'This child has absorbed the medicinal power of the 'Purple Mushroom' with a mortal body—an anomaly.'

20653.event: Pushed into a pond at three, I climbed out alone and could swim naturally, always happy near water.
20653.postEvent: The villagers all said this child might be the reincarnation of the Water Lord.

20654.event: A Daoist wanted me as disciple; father chased him with a hoe. He laughed and vanished into fog.

20655.event: While babbling, I said 'Long Life and Far Vision'; my parents bragged until learning I mimicked the neighbor.

20656.event: Age one, high fever. Shamaness said fox spirit favored me, so I worshipped it as godmother. Fever subsided.
20656.postEvent: Thereafter, every year on the fox sprite's birthday, the household would prepare three sacrificial meats.

20657.event: At four, chasing butterflies, I saw a white rainbow and a white-robed sword-flying immortal, and stared long after he'd gone.
20657.postEvent: From that day on, I often pointed at the clouds and said, 'I want to go up there.'

20658.event: At five, the old yellow dog spoke, saying he was a demon king, then died, frightening his family to move.

20659.event: At age two drought, I pointed at dry grass, said 'Water', dug, found spring, was called Jade Child.
20659.postEvent: That spring is still in the village, called 'Child's Finger Spring.'

20660.event: Age three, a horse ran at me, hooves over my head. I was unharmed; it trembled as if apologizing.
20660.postEvent: The horse owner called me 'Immortal Child' and pressed two strings of copper coins to soothe us.

20661.event: At age {age}, after wetting bed, yard soil smelled strange; garden bloomed wildly. Neighbors marveled, mother hushed.

20662.event: At four, fog separated me; I dreamed under a pine of sages discussing Dao and awoke reciting scripture.
20662.postEvent: My father was both surprised and delighted, thinking the ancestors had blessed us.

20663.event: My fifth birthday: a beggar gave me a counterfeit coin warding off water and fire; I always wore it.

20664.event: At one, a fortune teller claimed your noble fate had deadly calamity, sold talisman; it later rotted, revealing scam.
20664.postEvent: As a result, the family ate coarse grains for half a year.

20665.event: Climbing a tree to rob a nest, you fell onto hay, got up with egg in mouth; calf mooed.

20666.event: Spiritual energy became a flute sound in your meridians for three days, relaxing mind and spirit though useless.

20667.event: While herb gathering, you chased a burrowing ginseng to a spring; drinking it cured your fatigue.

20668.event: Sweet dew fell from sky as you founded base; lotus flowers bloomed on your clothes for three days.

20669.event: A snoring stone you found disrupted your meditation and always returned when discarded.

20670.event: You drank Immortal Drunk, slept seven days, and woke feeling fully rejuvenated.

20671.event: While refining pills, your mind wandered; they became colorful clouds, leaving a refreshing fragrance.

20672.event: A heart demon became a childhood wooden horse you played with; it dissipated after half a day.

20673.event: A crane pestered you into a race while sword-flying; it gave you a mosquito-repelling feather after losing.

20674.event: You stumbled into a mountain temple, lost chess to a Daoist earth deity, and swept steps for seven days.

20675.event: A black cat brought a lightning rod before the tribulation, saving you from disaster.

20676.event: While in seclusion, two herbs argued over dew. You separated them; they became a couple and gave you a fruit.

20677.event: You got a future letter saying flee, but nothing happened, then it burned to ash.

20678.event: A fiery red fish appeared in your dantian, warming you. It left, and you understood a trace of Dao rhythm.

20679.event: An ancient sword unsheathed, circled thrice, split a rock, revealing wine; drinking it made you tipsy.

20680.event: During morning meditation, a small dark cloud rained on you and followed for seven days.

20681.event: A talking squirrel stole your spiritual fruits, mocked you, but left three pine nuts that made you light and healthy.

20682.event: You got a wordless pill recipe; blood revealed "Sugar-roasted Chestnuts," attracting hundreds of birds.

20683.event: You dreamed of drinking with swords in a tomb, then woke with greater sword intent and a headache.

20684.event: While practicing, suddenly sneezed, causing true qi to reverse, but accidentally opened an extraordinary meridian, sharpening the ears and eyes.

20685.event: A mad beggar gave you a coin for your soul; three days later, it turned to dust.

20686.event: Ate colorful mushrooms from a spiritual vein; body glowed like a neon lamp for three embarrassing days.

20687.event: Discovering my shadow makes faces, I chased it all night after it fled, and it returned, and now it behaves.

20688.event: An alchemy furnace exploded, fragments forming an iron horse that travels a thousand miles daily but only says Giddyup.

20689.event: An auspicious cloud carried you three days to a herb-filled valley, but after picking, you lost the way back.

20690.event: Meditating at night, you hear celestial music and see frogs in V-formation; unknowing, your Dao heart clears.

20691.event: A blank talisman with a ghostly drawing turned into 'hungry' after spiritual power, so you cooked noodles and it vanished.

20692.event: Met an old fisherman fishing for time with no hook; your sideburns turned black.

20693.event: A phantom ledger in your dantian tracks good and evil. Smiley faces in the good column strengthen your Dao heart.

20694.event: A paper crane led you to childhood calligraphy paper with 'Come home for dinner' on the back.

20695.event: During cultivation, you heard the Dao De Jing in your belly for months, boosting your spiritual awareness.

20696.event: An unorthodox sword cultivator's tassel becomes a brush, and each stroke brims with sword intent and energy.

20697.event: Ate a vermilion fruit, causing intense heat; jumped into cold pool, boiled seven days, then immune to cold and heat.

20698.event: You wake up in a bird's nest atop a tree, a great roc beside you, gazing kindly.

20699.event: You bought a glazed lamp, lit it, saw your past life as a peony, and now love planting flowers more.

20700.event: A meteorite fell with a hot pot recipe. You made it; its fragrance spread ten miles, attracting beasts.

20701.event: While practicing, your sword flew into the clouds and returned with a challenge from your future rival.

20702.event: One day I found I could understand the whispers in the wind—plants gossiping—and peace was gone.

20703.event: Moss on your cave door formed a lifelike alchemy scene, granting viewers slight insight.

20704.event: During the thunder tribulation, a giant face sneezed spiritual rain, and the tribulation dissipated.

20705.event: Cultivation mishap: Nascent Soul shrunk to fist size, sneaked out, returned leading a cloud dog.

20706.event: A child used your fierce portrait as a door god; demon beasts stopped invading.

20707.event: Found a ring full of mortal toys; played all day, feeling childlike joy.

20708.event: The road turned to water; you sank, then a koi carried you ashore, transformed, and apologized.

20709.event: During cultivation, your spiritual root glowed seven colors for 15 minutes. Ancient records call this harmless 'spiritual root blooming.'

20710.event: You tripped on a stone claiming to be a mountain god's son; it drains your qi but shares news.

20711.event: In cultivation emptiness, I saw time as a river of golden lotuses; picking one left fragrance on my palm.

20712.event: Adding curiosity's tear to pill-making made a singing pill granting celestial music buff to speech for three days.

20713.event: Pursued into a cave, you drank tea, fully healed, and pursuers lost their way.

20714.event: In the morning, paper figures greeted me as Upper Immortal—a little spirit's prank.

20715.event: Your flying sword rusted; the blacksmith borrowed it and gave you dark iron in compensation.

20716.event: Dream immortal gave scripture; you remembered 'early to bed, early to rise' and cultivation improved.

20717.event: The spirit mouse in the pouch spoke, claiming to be finance minister, and the spirit stones increased after a month.

20718.event: While meditating, a dragon's sneeze blew you off a cliff into a secret realm with an ancient treasure.

20719.event: Ghost messengers escorting a soul begged you to feed its cat. You did; the spirit cat stayed.

20720.event: A whimsical idea to breathe upside down reversed qi, opening leg meridians for faster running.

20721.event: Found your name in an ancient book's note: you once won a verbal fight with a dog.

20722.event: In a secret realm, you triggered a cosmetic spray, becoming fragrant for months and scaring demon beasts.

20723.event: A thundercloud chose you as its master; pat it to make rain, a portable rainmaker.

20724.event: Bought scrap iron; a century later, its spirit awakened, revealing an ancient divine fragment.

20725.event: That night, she struck a pillar, causing inner demons to destroy her cultivation base, leading to her death.

20726.event: At {age}, she ate sect's immortal beans. A stomach patch grew spiritual vegetables; her burps had spiritual energy.
20726.postEvent: She inexplicably mastered Vegetable Heart Sword Art, its power based on the day's vegetable freshness.

20727.event: During Nascent Soul tribulation, lightning swerved to hit an old locust tree, which transformed and thanked her, insisting on being.
20727.postEvent: Forced to consent, she was ever after followed by a locust spirit that constantly called her 'Mother'.

20728.event: A cultivator discussed Dao for 30 years with her former pet mynah bird, nearly causing her realm to fall.
20728.postEvent: The bird demon left a scroll titled Bird-Words on Dao; after reading it, she gained a bizarre insight.

20729.event: She accidentally activated an ancient jade slip demanding self-castration. An old man later laughed, citing the Sunflower Manual.

20730.event: Hanging upside down three days, she gained sight of holes and foot fungus, repelling all.
20730.postEvent: However, these heavenly eyes proved quite effective in identifying spiritual ore veins and earth veins.

20731.event: Her flying sword hummed the Rebirth Mantra, making graves resonate and attracting underworld messengers for fees.
20731.postEvent: She paid three jin paper money; sword sulked, refused to fly for three days, light dimmed.

20732.event: Born with strange pupils, deemed an ill omen, she became a Taoist's nominal disciple for her spiritual root.

20733.event: The Azure Cloud Sword Sect accepted her as a disciple after a metal spiritual root test, naming her Frost Chill.

20734.event: At Foundation Establishment peak, she challenged three fiends, got ancient sword 'Frost Frost,' and forged her sword and Dao hearts.

20735.event: Secret realm trial, met Su Tang, love at first sight, secretly became Dao companions.

20736.event: Su Tang was killed by enemies, soul lamp extinguished. That night, her story ended in tragedy.

20737.event: Under a blood moon, sacrificed enemy's heart blood to the sword.

20738.event: After a century of slaughter, she founded the Frost Chill Demon Sect with 300 disciples, devouring their primordial spirits.

20739.event: At Nascent Soul perfection, she faced heavenly Dao backlash and heart demons, sealing herself in the sect's underground palace.

20740.event: After a century of meditation, she grasped love demon; tribulation lightning destroyed her body, leaving only obsession.

20741.event: Born mortal in the East, spoke at birth with double pupils; elders deemed her an immortal's reincarnation.

20742.event: Seeing a fragmented ancient book in the clan triggered insight, flooding her mind with past life memories.

20743.event: Guided by a master, she entered the Azure Cloud Ancient Path and found a past-life pouch in a ruined temple.

20744.event: During foundation establishment, recovered memories re-enlightened the Taixu Hunyuan Jing, boosting cultivation.

20745.event: Alone, he perfected his Golden Core, ventured into his past-life forbidden realm, broke its formation, and reclaimed his Yin-Yang Mirror.

20746.event: Nascent Soul perfected, he accepted past enemies' descendants as disciples, intertwining karma to harmonize his Dao heart.

20747.event: The tribulation came, past thunder lingered; using the Liangyi Mirror, he reversed yin and yang and ascended.

20748.event: Nourished by Qingqiu's earth veins, its spirit awakened at one year with starlit eyes.

20749.event: Mistakenly ate vermillion fruit in cave, grew nine tails, triggered first tribulation, barely reached human form.

20750.event: Used demonic power to create rain during drought, worshipped as Fox Immortal, temple built.

20751.event: Encountered a golden core cultivator who wanted to take it as a spiritual pet, fought bitterly and was severely injured.

20752.event: Entering the mortal dynasty as a consort, she stole dragon energy and soared in cultivation.

20753.event: After the dynasty fell, he renounced wealth, built a hut in the mountains, and re-cultivated his demon heart.

20754.event: With merits complete, the third tribulation came; a white fox rushed into thunder, dispelled evil, and ascended gracefully.

20755.event: Father, a border general, learned flag signals under the beacon tower and could trap rabbits with stones.

20756.event: While pursuing enemy troops, mistakenly entered a cave, obtained bamboo slips 'Tianji Bian' which recorded ancient formations of Qimen Dunjia.

20757.event: A mortal used the Yimu Maze Formation to stop 3,000 cavalry; the court enfeoffed him as Marquis Zhenbian.

20758.event: Sensing scarce spiritual energy, used a formation to channel qi and refine the body, finally reaching Qi refining.

20759.event: In ten years, united thirty-six prefectures' earth veins to create a formation repelling foreign enemies for a century.

20760.event: Entered Dao through formations, deduced Tianji Manual, broke through to golden core, drawing homage from masters everywhere.

20761.event: Abyss rift appeared in the demon realm, contamination spread, spent all family wealth to drive a million laborers, laid down.

20762.event: The grand formation lacked a main eye, sacrificed himself into the formation, used his nascent soul Dao body to suppress.

20763.event: At five, he identified herbs in fields and played with a medicine hoe, puzzling villagers.

20764.event: Entered the immortal sect as a handyman, with mixed spiritual roots and only at the third level of Qi Refining.

20765.event: He secretly studied the Herbal Pill Canon, deduced formulas, and made Peiyuan Pills from poor herbs, shocking the alchemy elder.

20766.event: With sect support, he founded the Human Pill Pavilion, mass-produced Foundation Building Pills, boosting disciples, and created Alchemy Peak.

20767.event: He forced a Golden Core breakthrough with Tianyuan Pills, but poison severed his meridians, and he died meditating.

20768.event: Refining Duotian Pills triggered a tribulation; thunder struck, collapsing his body and scattering his soul.

20769.event: At mid Nascent Soul, pill poison erupted, coughing blood; he compiled the Poison Pill Record for posterity.

20770.event: His soul scattered in pill tribulation, body turned to seven-hued jade, scent spread a hundred li, sacred to alchemists.

20771.event: He was born into a cultivation noble family with excellent spiritual roots and became a disciple of Qingyun Sect's elder.

20772.event: Won first place in the sect's minor competition and was awarded a Foundation Building Pill.

20773.event: Became dao companions with a junior sect sister, jointly cultivating the 'Qingyuan Sword Art', with deep affection.

20774.event: The dao companion failed the tribulation and fell, breeding a heart demon, and his temperament changed drastically.

20775.event: Cultivated the forbidden technique 'Blood Demon Scripture' and betrayed Qingyun Sect.

20776.event: Began the demonic path, slaughtered one branch of his former sect, shaking the world.

20777.event: Besieged by seven righteous sects, severely wounded and incurable, ultimately fell in the snowstorms of the Northern Wastes.

20778.event: Cultivated bitterly in the Northern Wastes, achieved great success in demonic arts, and founded the Blood Demon Hall.

20779.event: The heart demon tribulation arrived, divine sense became chaotic, and he slaughtered all disciples of the Blood Demon Hall.

20780.event: Forcibly crossed the Deity Transformation tribulation, the heart demon erupted, his primordial spirit dissipated and he died.

20781.event: At birth, sweet dew fell from the sky, and he was born with a mouthful of innate qi.

20782.event: In a dream, he awakened memories of his past life, realizing that he was the reincarnation of Qingxu True Lord.

20783.event: Entered Taiyi Sect and was accepted as a personal disciple by the sect master, breaking precedent.

20784.event: At 16, established Foundation; at 20, formed Golden Core; shocked the cultivation world.

20785.event: Went to an ancient secret realm to retrieve the previous life's artifact "Starry River Shuttle".

20786.event: Killed Patriarch Xuanming in battle but suffered severe injuries, shattered Dao foundation, then died meditating.

20787.event: Successfully formed Nascent Soul, past life memories returned, Dao heart perfected.

20788.event: Perfected at Divinity Transformation, he felt heaven and earth's call and ascended on radiant clouds to the Immortal World.

20789.event: Born into the Qingqiu Fox Clan, bloodline ordinary.

20790.event: Accidentally ate a thousand-year Vermilion Fruit, spiritual intelligence greatly increased, cultivated "Celestial Fox Breathing Technique".

20791.event: Passed the Transformation Heaven Tribulation, transformed into a young girl, entered Azure Cloud Sect as a menial disciple.

20792.event: Exposed as a yao, she was shunned by disciples and sentenced to guard a mine for ten years.

20793.event: Discovered an ancient yao immortal cave in the mine, obtained the complete "Nine-Tailed Celestial Skill".

20794.event: Formed a yao core, returned to the sect, shocked everyone with strength.

20795.event: Demon tide attacked, protected the sect with her yao body, earned respect.

20796.event: Formed a yao infant, nine tails first appeared, became a regional yao lord.

20797.event: Passed the Ascension Tribulation, all nine tails emerged, tore through void into the Spirit World.

20798.event: In the family's formation pavilion, accidentally touched a residual array yet remained unharmed, revealing talent in the Dao of Formations.

20799.event: Entered Heavenly Formation Sect, broke through a thousand basic arrays in three years.

20800.event: Improved the sect's mountain-protecting grand formation, increasing power by 30%, bestowed the title "Formation Prodigy".

20801.event: At the Golden Core stage, alone cracked the outer layer of the ancient relic "All-Encompassing Star Array", shocking the world.

20802.event: Used Eight Wilderness Six Directions Array to trap and kill demonic elder, crossed tribulation safely to reach Nascent Soul.

20803.event: Pushed to be the leader of the Formation Alliance, authored "Celestial Origin Array Explanation" for posterity.

20804.event: Dying, he used his nascent soul and body to set up Evergreen Grand Array, protecting sect as his soul merged.

20805.event: Born in Danxia Valley, he identified herbs at three and refined a Qi-gathering pill at eight.

20806.event: Became a Danxia disciple, learned true teachings from an elder, and advanced quickly in alchemy.

20807.event: Refined a batch of supreme-grade Foundation Establishment pills, shocking the sect and gaining fame.

20808.event: Captured by demonic cultivators while gathering herbs, he was forced to refine pills in Black Wind Cave.

20809.event: While captive, he grasped the Danxia Ancient Scripture, killed the guards, and fled to the sect.

20810.event: His early alchemy toxins shattered his meridians, exhausted his lifespan, and he died incurably.

20811.event: To save his gravely wounded dao partner, he resolved to refine the lost Nine-Turn Golden Pill.

20812.event: He used blood essence, primordial spirit to make Nine-Turn Golden Pill, saved dao partner, but died drained of life, smiling.

20813.event: Split a waterfall with a wooden sword, earning the name 'Sword Dao Seed'.

20814.event: While sparring, his uncontrolled sword intent damaged his senior brother's meridians, creating a heart demon.

20815.event: Black clouds became heart demon illusions; he slaughtered them, eyes red, and flew away on his sword.

20816.event: Killed three thousand demon beasts, the blood soaked the sword edge, and he realized the 'Blood Sea Sword Domain'.

20817.event: Established a sect in the Demon Abyss, blood banners fluttering, demonic cultivators from all directions came to join.

20818.event: Blood sword broke; he turned body to sword intent, killed three. Intent dissipated; body and dao died, leaving annihilating legend.

20819.event: After a century in seclusion, he emerged with abyssal eyes and sword energy that destroyed the mountain gate.

20820.event: During thunder tribulation, he saw past sins, suffered heart demon backlash, dispersed cultivation, and rebuilt his dao heart.

20821.event: Knowing his death was near, he made a blood array from disciples' sacrifice to summon heavenly tribulation.

20822.event: The nine-nine thunder tribulation annihilated the blood light, and he turned into tribulation ash in the thunder.

20823.event: When he was born in a fishing village, purple mist from the east made elders call him extraordinary.

20824.event: The old Daoist praised the child's soul power and taught him the Tai Xu Nourishing Qi Art.

20825.event: He was stargazing when past life fragments flooded his mind, revealing he was a reincarnated soul.

20826.event: Kneeling farewell to his parents, a lone boat left on a rainy night; his Dao intent hardened.

20827.event: Breaking the forbidden barrier into the cave, past life's handwriting read 'Chong Ming awaits return', then took relics.

20828.event: In the lightning, the past life's dharma image manifested, Dao resonance blended, foundation established as flawless Dao foundation.

20829.event: In debate hall, a phrase revealed golden core's secret, shocking elders, earning title Ming Wei.

20830.event: Facing the sea, sat in meditation for thirty years, suddenly enlightened, the sword emerged like a tide.

20831.event: In heavenly tribulation, past failure's pain returns; he cuts fear, Dao heart purified.

20832.event: When the nascent soul formed, all waters of the four seas flowed backward in worship, heaven and earth changed color.

20833.event: All nine layers of heavenly tribulation were annihilated, immortal radiance guided him, ascending to the spirit realm.

20834.event: Crying on a snowy night, a hunter carried him home, his eyes had a green light.

20835.event: Howling at the moon, he grew two tails; his foster father thought him a demon and banished him.

20836.event: An old fox saw his intelligence, took him as a disciple, taught the art of human form cultivation.

20837.event: She took a shape-shifting herb, became human on a stormy night with flowing black hair, and entered the royal city.

20838.event: Under peach blossoms, they vowed; tribulation killed the scholar; she wept blood, her Dao heart faltered.

20839.event: After ten years meditating at buried love's grave, the white fox turned into light and formed a demon core.

20840.event: The six-tailed celestial fox dharma image soared to the sky, tribulation lightning tempered the body, reborn from fire.

20841.event: Worshipped by ten thousand demons, she ruled the demon emperor hall and beat a human golden core in three moves.

20842.event: Mystic fire consumed him, burning all eight tails; obsession revived the ninth; Heaven's backlash shattered his Dao foundation, killing him.

20843.event: At sunset, she stroked her tail, sighed, stars dimmed, turned to stone guarding the demon vein.

20844.event: Dismantle the mechanism lock at home and reassemble it into an exquisite formation plate, astonishing onlookers.

20845.event: A jade slip from a cave revealed by a landslide causes a three-day sleep and awakening with basic array insight.

20846.event: Spending all family wealth, he carved three thousand flags and channeled spiritual vein to make Zhoutian Mountain-Protecting Formation, becoming famous.

20847.event: He enters an ancient battlefield, sees remnant patterns, and his mind expands like one.

20848.event: Observing stars, he activates the Star-Gathering Formation; star power floods his body, his dantian becoming the formation base.

20849.event: He alone stands at the formation eye, blood-sacrifices flags to protect humanity from a million demon beasts.

20850.event: Runes tear the void as he strides from Eastern Sea to Western Desert, shocking the world.

20851.event: Trying to trap powerful enemy, he mistakenly locked himself in formation heart. Chaotic void erodes divine consciousness; soul scatters.

20852.event: After long meditation, divine light cuts chaos; he laughs, steps out as nine heavens' thunder roars.

20853.event: Ten thousand formations clash with tribulation, sky cracks; he sacrifices his body to fill the gap, becoming a formation spirit.

20854.event: Stealing waste pills, he sleeps three days, then awakens able to identify a hundred herbs.

20855.event: He handwrites the Hundred Herbs Manual, identifies herbs instantly, and the master calls him divine.

20856.event: At peak furnace fire, he alters three ingredients, gaining 80% Foundation Pill success, shaking the Eastern Domain.

20857.event: Heavenly thunder strikes the alchemy furnace. He trades his eyes for the pill. His beloved awakens but leaves him.

20858.event: After losing his sight, his divine sense surges. He observes the fire with his heart, and the pill becomes nine-colored.

20859.event: Pill done, black clouds cover city. 3000 demon cultivators break formation, nearly destroy Danxia Sect; he alone escapes wounded.

20860.event: Content in a corner, he daily diagnoses and prescribes medicine for mortals, gradually restoring his dao heart.

20861.event: Pill scent spreads hundred li, draws Nine-Nine Tribulation. He uses pill formation to survive and form pill.

20862.event: He broadly accepts disciples, spreading the dao throughout the world, and is revered as the Ancestor of Alchemy.

20863.event: Upon completing the Ascension Pill, the immortal gate cracks open briefly, then purple thunder destroys him and the furnace.

20864.event: Born into a cultivation clan, a sword aura soared at birth; elders foresaw great talent and prosperity.

20865.event: Demonic cultivators annihilated your clan, found you in hiding, and you died resentful, your dao heart unformed.

20866.event: Joined Heavenly Sword Sect, showed amazing sword talent. Built foundation in 3 years, hailed as a once-in-millennium genius.

20867.event: After building the foundation, the sword heart formed; roaming the world, slaying demons, and becoming famous.

20868.event: East Sea secret realm: met demon sect sacred maiden, secret feelings grew, dao heart flawed, sword intent tainted by mundane.

20869.event: Core Formation tribulation struck; inner demons shattered his dao heart, causing failure, death, and loss.

20870.event: After forming a Nascent Soul, he found his beloved sacrificed, shattered his dao heart, turned demon, and massacred the sect.

20871.event: He mastered demonic arts as Seven Kills Demon Lord, went mad, and died laughing as his body exploded.

20872.event: Five righteous factions set Demon Suppression Array; you fought alone, then detonated Nascent Soul to die with enemy.

20873.event: Born crying, eyes full of spirit, calm and wise, midwives declared the child extraordinary.

20874.event: Each night dreamed of a white-clad swordsman, unmatched, waking in melancholy to breathe heaven and earth.

20875.event: Sensing heaven and earth, past life memories flooded in, sudden enlightenment broke through several realms, startling the county.

20876.event: Foundation building tribulation: sees past life's failure, dao heart shaken, inner demons cause chaos, thunder destroys body and spirit.

20877.event: During Core Formation, a past-life soul attacked; they fought, fused, and recalled most memories.

20878.event: Cultivated Nascent Soul, found immortal mansion from past memories, got Mahayana Heart Sutra and Wangchuan sword.

20879.event: You calmly crossed the Nascent Soul tribulation with past life experience, reaching that stage and overlooking all cultivators.

20880.event: Found past-life enemy, settled karmic ties, crippled cultivation, drifted away with a clear heart.

20881.event: Roaming the mortal world, met a woman identical to his past life's Dao partner, became partners for decades.

20882.event: The tribulation came; you smiled at your partner, gave up cultivation, grew old together, and died a century later.

20883.event: Heavenly demon tribulation made you lose your dao heart, fall to demonic path, kill disciples, then die.

20884.event: A reincarnated ancient being cultivates anew, using past wisdom to rally forces for his Dao lineage.

20885.event: Ancient beast blood awakens, beast cultivators rise, beasts gallop through immortal sects, rivaling humans.

20886.event: You risk a century of life to comprehend an ancient array map, dying in meditation.

20887.event: A peerless alchemist's heaven-defying pill triggers a universe-shaking tribulation that nourishes all life with pill qi.

20888.event: Spirit river from nine heavens inverts, multiplying qi, awakening even ordinary beasts.

20889.event: You contract a soul-devouring plague, draining spiritual power and lifespan; your soul returns to the nether, cultivation lost.

20890.event: Array master creates micro rune arrays for robes and artifacts, no spirit stones needed; even rogue cultivators can fly.

20891.event: Seize a relic in the War of Dao Lineages, get fatally wounded, give it to rogue cultivators, die smiling.

20892.event: Heavenly tribulation mutates; heart demon lightning shatters your Dao heart, dissipates cultivation, and scatters your soul.

20893.event: You entered the Nine Abyss, faced seven emotion mind demons, despite spirit damage, solved the mansion's secret, advancing your Dao.

20894.event: As large mines deplete and exchange rates soar, spirit stone inflation forces scattered cultivators into perilous lands for fortune.

20895.event: Riding the spiritual qi tide, you break through to Foundation Establishment overnight, advancing your Dao and forging your platform.

20896.event: A demon lord descends; corrupted by demonic qi, you become a murderous demon and die exhausted in the war.

20897.event: Infant born speaking mantras, revealed as reincarnated Immortal Venerable. News leaks, all sects rush to seize child.

20898.event: Supreme beast cultivator becomes Nascent Soul, commands ten thousand beasts to crush your city. You fight but are killed.

20899.event: Array master activates earth veins, turning landscape into grand array; you grasp cosmic mysteries and advance Dao.

20900.event: You happen upon a pill dao prodigy refining a Nine-Rotation Golden Elixir; taking advantage of the tribulation's chaos, you snatch.

20901.event: Two sects war over a secret realm; a Nascent Soul being destroys a city with one palm, fatally wounding you.

20902.event: A groundless heart demon tribulation covers all; meditating brings illusions, shatters your Dao heart, you die insane.

20903.event: The true immortal cave dwelling 'Immortal Ruins' breaks out of its realm; its entrance only accommodates cultivators under a hundred.

20904.event: Earth's spiritual veins dried, spirit stones became mundane, sect formations dimmed, cultivators despaired.

20905.event: The mortal Great Xia Immortal Dynasty was destroyed by a Nascent Soul cultivator's palm strike for insufficient offerings, causing chaos.

20906.event: A Spirit Transformation Patriarch's prophecy made heaven mourn as your life drained to ashes and your soul dispersed.

20907.event: At {age}, a {charm} youth traded three coins for 'immortal fate' from a beggar, who vanished, leaving a cloud-veined coin.

20908.event: In the village school's back hill, an old apricot tree.
20908.postEvent: A rogue cultivator's puppet trick teased a child, granting shallow immortal affinity.

20909.event: At {age}, {charm} played grass game by stream, saw stars inverted, grabbed a cold pebble that still hangs.

20910.event: An alchemist's furnace explosion sent slag into a {age}-year-old's mouth, causing three days without hunger but aversion to chives.

20911.event: At age {age}, {strength} youth buys a fox pouch from a blind woman; the fox teaches a mantra in dreams.
20911.postEvent: Word of mouth spread, and it actually coincided with the foundation cultivation method.

20912.event: A hunter's {age}-year-old son found a charred bone that chimed and made village dogs whimper.

20913.event: A well-off child's birthday peachwood sword flew up to chase moonlight until his grandmother doused it.
20913.postEvent: The next day, the peachwood sword lost all its spirituality, leaving only a crescent scar on the handle.

20914.event: A {age}-year-old revived a frozen crane; three feathers turned to smoke with a message to meet at Hundred Birds Forest.

20915.event: At {age}, a Taoist slapped a talisman into his palm, making it hot.
20915.postEvent: Years later, he learned that it was an incomplete formation pattern that could sense spiritual energy fluctuations within ten li.

20916.event: He fished a mirror from a well and saw his vanished playmate waving in clouds.

20917.event: At {age}, an {intelligence} child overheard cultivators fighting over a meal, destroying half an acre of melon field.
20917.postEvent: Afterwards, he received three golden leaves as compensation from the cultivators and secretly rejoiced for half a month.

20918.event: At {age}, a {strength} youth, dreaming of a giant kun swimming stars, woke drenched, a salty seaweed beside his pillow.

20919.event: A {age}-year-old found an inkstone in a kennel; the talking dog gave him a spirit bone.

20920.event: A {age}-year-old picked up a paper lantern; at night, paper figures emerged, circled the house, and left a paper coin.
20920.postEvent: From the next day, the youth could see wandering spirits and was often scared into crying at night.

20921.event: At {age}, a {charm} child's paper boat sank, revealing a lotus seed. He ate it and never had heat illness.

20922.event: A {intelligence} {age}-year-old youth touched lightning-struck wood, got knocked out, and woke with sharper senses, hearing insects.

20923.event: A {age}-year-old's lantern flowed upstream; he saw a white-clad person smile, and the world lost color.

20924.event: A poor {age}-year-old child saw two weasels fighting; they apologized and burrowed into a grave.

20925.event: A {strength} {age}-year-old youth sheltered in a ruined temple; he wiped a deity's tears and could gather water into beads.
20925.postEvent: Although this skill was weak, it repeatedly quenched his thirst in the wilderness.

20926.event: A {age}-year-old child found a jade cicada in a radish; a Taoist bought it for ten taels, bringing joy.

20927.event: A {charm} {age} youth dreamed of playing Go with a bride; he lost, ate candy, and woke with three wrappers.

20928.event: A tree spirit tripped a youth. He hung a cloth: 'Elder under tree trips descendants.' Spirit avoided him.

20929.event: Well voice asked about gold or silver. Boy said neither. Stone egg 'Dao' flew out, hatched into a sleeping turtle.
20929.postEvent: The stone turtle opens its eyes once every ten years, inhaling and exhaling spiritual energy with each breath.

20930.event: Child found a tattered book of sword drawings. His moves made the beam buzz. Father burned it, but half memorized.

20931.event: After a century alone, heard monkeys, found spirit monkeys' peach banquet, drank monkey king's wine, mind cleared, comprehension increased.
20931.postEvent: The spirit monkeys saw you awake, made noise, fled into the mountains, leaving peach pits.

20932.event: I ate a dyed wild berry mistaken for a spirit fruit, causing three days of diarrhea that expelled toxins and slightly improved my constitution.

20933.event: A thunderbolt split the soil during tribulation, revealing an ancient chamber pot whose fading runes blocked the last remnant lightning.
20933.postEvent: Afterwards, he washed the pot and found that it could warm spiritual tea, which was an unexpected bonus.

20934.event: His flying sword's qi accidentally turned a radish into a spirit that tended the garden daily.

20935.event: Two cultivators debated three days, fainted from hunger. Waking, they laughed—they could fast, so why hunger? Dao heart grew.

20936.event: Trapped in a colorful mushroom realm, he danced for three days; spores then cleared his mind.
20936.postEvent: After leaving the secret realm, he developed a habit: his legs would shake involuntarily when hearing drumbeats.

20937.event: A qi reversal dyed his skin indigo for a month, dubbed 'Blue-faced Immortal,' and left him immune to illusions afterward.

20938.event: You learned a spiritual hair manipulation technique, wore a topknot to the sect ceremony, and were dubbed "Versatile Hair Stylist" despite reprimands.

20939.event: A furnace explosion while making Foundation Pills turned a peak pink for a century, attracting female cultivators to take photos.

20940.event: Dealt with a mosquito that had gained intelligence for years, from flying swords to talismans, from formations to escape arts.

20941.event: Picked up a rusty round shield on an ancient battlefield.

20942.event: On a whim, participated in the 'Flying Sword Racing Championship' of the cultivation world.

20943.event: He drank thousand-year wine, slept thirty years, sleepwalked a thousand miles, awoke in a mine with amnesia but feeling unshackled.
20943.postEvent: From then on, he formed a habit of thinking three times before drinking, yet often missed that carefree stupor.

20944.event: During the Heart Demon Tribulation, you asked the demon if it could cook, so it vanished.

20945.event: Your dantian's heat turned into a loud fart, wrecking your room.
20945.postEvent: When the ten years ended, you became the best cleaner in the sect; even the latrines radiated spiritual energy.

20946.event: Your shadow moved independently, cultivated into a demon, and made a pact: day yours, night its, no interference.

20947.event: Falling asleep in a sacred spring, she woke, found it dry, gained Water Art absorbing moisture, never thirsting.

20948.event: After swallowing a demon core in battle, you understood animals, mediated spirit beast disputes, and gained fame.

20949.event: You overpaid for a fake immortal stone, got mocked, but turned shame into resolve.
20949.postEvent: You still keep that stone, placing it on your desk as a daily reminder.

20950.event: Struck by lightning, your spirit lodged in a tree for a day, gaining quiet insight.

20951.event: You found a 300-year-old letter, met a skeleton, took its ring, gained storage, and received a sorrowful late reply.

20952.event: An ancient mirror's spirit pulled you in, made you sing off-key, then refined your voice and immortal aura.

20953.event: While in seclusion refining a pill, a cricket jumped into the furnace, producing a 'Cricket Pill.
20953.postEvent: Every time the Daoist later mentioned this, he would laugh and say, 'That shout of yours forged our ten-thousand-year friendship.'

20954.event: Mistaking sword intent for culinary intent, you now cut ingredients, not enemies, finding freedom in cooking.

20955.event: You had a whim to use your divine sense to communicate with your flying sword and make it dance.

20956.event: At the age of {age}, while strolling through the sea of clouds, you suddenly saw a koi carp leap out.
20956.postEvent: Afterwards, whenever your fortune fluctuated, the pattern of a copper coin would faintly appear on your palm.

20957.event: A sentient peach tree at your cave insisted on discipleship, leaving a peach daily.

20958.event: While passing through a mortal town, a fortune-teller laughed and grabbed you, claiming a master-disciple fate with you.

20959.event: After eating a half-ripe vermilion fruit, you had three days of pain, then your shadow could detach and dance uselessly.

20960.event: A crow spouted sect secrets; after feeding it spirit grain, you learned it was an elder's divine thought.

20961.event: While meditating by the lake, a carp spirit leaped out seeking enlightenment.

20962.event: You found a wordless celestial book; it laughed and burned itself to trick you.

20963.event: Your life-bound flying sword hiccups, each wisp of sword qi cutting cave floor tiles.

20964.event: On a full moon night, your shadow plays chess with itself, making exquisite, unfathomable moves.

20965.event: You bought a Beauty Pill at the market, became a day younger, but grew a cat tail for three months.

20966.event: A baby's cry from your dantian startled you; your Nascent Soul babbled a rhyme, amusing and annoying.

20967.event: Passing by an ancient battlefield, a ghostly warhorse galloped toward you on will-o'-the-wisps, insisting on recognizing you as its master.

20968.event: During cultivation, your hair moved windlessly, forming a nest or sword array, then returned to normal.

20969.event: Void merchant offered a celestial artifact for five years of life. You refused; he pouted and vanished.

20970.event: A colorful butterfly landed on your brow during meditation, slightly improving your cultivation as if taking something.

20971.event: A singing lingzhi mushroom grew in your cave; its song stalled cultivation; you transplanted it to a mountain.

20972.event: Your dharma robe danced away; your hand seals fail—a heavenly demon remnant clings to it.

20973.event: A letter with only a circled dot cleared your divine sense and instantly burned.

20974.event: An unknown egg in your pouch hatched a chicken; its crow warmed your meridians, then it wandered off.

20975.event: Your golden lotus steps seemed perfect merit, but were phosphorus refracted by ice.

20976.event: You dreamed of being a fish among stars; your robe woke with water stains and starlight.

20977.event: An old friend's prank of swapping wine for vinegar taught you a powerful sword technique.

20978.event: Playing flute by cliff, a green snake shed skin into a dharma robe tight at your waist.
20978.postEvent: Later, you learned this was the snake repaying a kindness; it had already transformed into a dragon and left.

20979.event: While exploring a ruin, you triggered a forbidden spell, trapping your soul in an ancient painting as an immortal.
20979.postEvent: That painting still hangs in a secret realm somewhere, the figure in it lifelike.

20980.event: Mistaking dried spirit beast dung for fruit, you ate it; though foul, it improved your bones.
20980.postEvent: From then on, you felt nauseous whenever you saw vermilion fruits.

20981.event: You dreamed of turning into a green toad, then woke with a greenish tongue for days.
20981.postEvent: The spirit frogs in the pond leaped especially joyfully when they saw you.

20982.event: A spilled liquid grew chattering three-colored mushrooms on your arm, which withered in three days, leaving faint scars.
20982.postEvent: An elder said the liquid was discarded 'Mushroom Speech Powder.'

20983.event: You mimicked a white crane's call; it argued, then sprayed energy, causing three days of hiccups.
20983.postEvent: Later, you learned the crane was a guardian spirit bird of the mountain.

20984.event: Your iron sword flew off, returned three days later with 'Visited a friend but missed him' carved.
20984.postEvent: Afterward, the sword spirit seemed somewhat reluctant to engage with you.

20985.event: While bathing in the Spirit Spring, ancient runes appeared and vanished. Now meditation leaves you with elusive insight.
20985.postEvent: An uncle master said it was just the spring spirit playing a joke.

20986.event: Lost a shoe, tracked a demon rabbit wearing it, whose owner gave me Cloud-Treading Boots.
20986.postEvent: That rabbit still holds a grudge and occasionally sneaks in to steal your radishes.

20987.event: You noticed your shadow had two heads; danced with sword to drive it away; half day later it was normal.
20987.postEvent: Since then, on overcast days, your shadow slightly trembles as if secretly laughing.

20988.event: You found a wordless book; upon opening, heard a sinister cackle; closed it forever; now hear whispers at night.
20988.postEvent: A senior brother said it was a 'Laughing Book' that specially scares newcomers.

20989.event: Flawed qi path reversed dantian energy, causing three days of thunderous farts that cracked stone table and scattered disciples.
20989.postEvent: Later, you invented the 'Thunderous Fart Technique' but dared not use it often.

20990.event: The bronze coin you picked up was a Metal-Eating Worm larva that devoured your spirit stones.
20990.postEvent: You had no choice but to sell it for a small sum.

20991.event: You stumbled upon skeletons playing chess, lost narrowly, then woke at the cliff's edge with improved skills.
20991.postEvent: The chessboard and pieces were all illusions, only the stone dust remained on your fingertips.

20992.event: The spirit rice sang in the kitchen, inspiring the song Fragrance of Rice, but it never sang again.
20992.postEvent: The kitchen elder said it was a once-in-a-century 'Rice Spirit Manifestation'.

20993.event: Meditating on cliff, a cloud-human asked for fire. You gave a striker; it turned colorful and gave you pure qi.
20993.postEvent: Since then, during breathing exercises, a trace of colorful clouds always surrounds you.

20994.event: You crawled into a cave for herbs, fled from staring crystal eyes, then saw star arrays aiding deduction.
20994.postEvent: An elder array cultivator said they were 'Star Pupil Stones' that could open spiritual sight.

20995.event: Red Lips Orchid complained 'Too much water!', uprooted and ran away, leaving a note: 'Going to find somewhere dry.'
20995.postEvent: Later, you saw it in the dry land of the back mountain, already wild and unrecognizable.

20996.event: You bought a fan that always said rain, so you carried an umbrella until it molded.
20996.postEvent: The stall owner adamantly refused to admit fault, saying it only measured mold rain.

20997.event: You watched ants fight for rice, mimicked their pincer attack, created funny boxing style that amused junior female disciples.
20997.postEvent: You named it 'Ant Antler Collapse', and it spread among the servants.

20998.event: Mistook senior sister's Evergreen Pill for candy; hair grew wildly. She used antidote; after days you recovered, wearing veil.
20998.postEvent: After that, your senior sister guarded the pills extremely strictly.

20999.event: After choking on mountain stream water, your voice echoed three days; a senior brother used it to relay messages.
20999.postEvent: On the fourth day, the echo gradually faded, and you felt somewhat reluctant to let it go.

21000.event: Freed paper crane from vine; it circled thrice, became talisman in your brow, warding off ghosts for a month.
21000.postEvent: When the talisman light faded, you occasionally saw a thin thread of spiritual light guiding the way.

21001.event: You were sect master for a day, heard reports, then the decree burned at sunset.
21001.postEvent: Your fellow disciples all said: 'When you were sect master, you really looked the part.'

21002.event: Found a stranger's brocade sock with floral scent; it vanished in three days, leaving a silver fox hair.
21002.postEvent: You guessed it might be a prank from some senior fox cultivator.

21003.event: Spirit cat Snowball missing; you punished to find it. Found on beam hugging pill bottle. Confined together three days.
21003.postEvent: Afterward, Snowball became close to you and often brought dried fish as thanks.

21004.event: Bought fake sword manual, studied 30 years, found it was a food guide, but recipes accidentally unblocked my meridians.
21004.postEvent: That food supplement recipe was later revered as the 'Sword Diet Canon' and spread widely.

21005.event: A heavenly thunderbolt scattered your white hair; it took root as a sword-shaped spirit herb when a barrier opened.
21005.postEvent: A passing sword cultivator took the herb, rumored to temper sword intent; hair loss aged you.

21006.event: After decades, you left seclusion; found new dynasties. As a former imperial bloodline, your keepsake sold at an antique shop.
21006.postEvent: You smiled wryly, took spirit stones, and bought mortal wine from the shopkeeper claiming a celestial relic.

21007.event: Your spirit crane warned of misfortune, then turned to light and vanished.
21007.postEvent: Thereafter, you turned misfortune into fortune, always feeling that the crane silently averted disasters for you.

21008.event: Got an ancient elixir recipe. After decades, you made a seven-colored pill. It was just sweet candy.
21008.postEvent: But this candy could alleviate all worries. You shared it with disciples, becoming the most popular elder in the sect.

21009.event: Playing chess under a pine tree, a three-day draw ended; immortal touched pieces, stabilizing earth veins.
21009.postEvent: You exchanged a smile with your opponent, life without regrets.

21010.event: A sentient furnace claimed nine-turn pills but only roasted sweet potatoes; you accepted and your cave smelled of them.
21010.postEvent: Roasting sweet potatoes in this furnace slightly boosts spiritual power, earning you many spirit stones.

21011.event: Picked up a broken array stone from ruin, used as doorstep. It glowed, revealing formation truth; you had an epiphany.
21011.postEvent: Though you only grasped a fraction, your understanding of formations far surpassed peers.

21012.event: On your 100th birthday, your young apprentice presents your century-lost beginner flying sword, bought from the black market, leaving you speechless.
21012.postEvent: You gently touched the rust, as if returning to your early days of cultivation, your Dao heart clear.

21013.event: A divine thought fragment from your youth ran a baozi shop, later returning with worldly energy and distractions.
21013.postEvent: After ten years cleansing thoughts, your Dao heart toughened, yet you missed baozi.

21014.event: Failed tribulation shattered your body; your soul clung to spirit wood, becoming a walking tree spirit befriending herbs and birds.
21014.postEvent: Though grotesque, you accidentally comprehended the truth of plants. No immortal elegance, but free and at ease.

21015.event: You found a wordless book; bleeding on it triggers a centuries-old prank.
21015.postEvent: You laughed helplessly, noted it down, and prepared to trick future generations in turn.

21016.event: After half a lifetime collecting recipes, lightning from alchemy tribulation turned your immortal brew into vinegar.
21016.postEvent: Forced to sell vinegar, cultivators flocked to buy it, praising its endless aftertaste and enlightenment benefits.

21017.event: A farmer's words caused a great awakening. You infused mana into a field, yielding spirit grain.
21017.postEvent: Thereafter you titled yourself 'Daoist Farmer, True Man,' and the sect added a Farming Hall.

21018.event: You embedded a sword fragment from an ancient tomb into your arm. It hummed with roosters, perfecting your cultivation.
21018.postEvent: Sect disciples often relied on your 'Sword Bell' to rise, making you a living alarm clock.

21019.event: Two Foundation Establishment juniors argued over a stone; you mediated, got hit, they compensated, making you top mediator.
21019.postEvent: Your reputation soared unexpectedly, even Core Formation cultivators sought your judgment.

21020.event: During seclusion, a demon took a seductive form, but your boring chat made it dissipate.
21020.postEvent: Thereafter, you were immune to inner demons, even extraterrestrial devils went around you.

21021.event: On a whim you deduced the celestial mechanism, followed a breakfast reminder, and dodged a meteorite, saving your cave.
21021.postEvent: Your life was extended, and you continued your cultivation journey.

21022.event: Your spirit rat molts into a metal-devourer, devours your spirit stones, but its droppings are pure metal materials.
21022.postEvent: You've become richer than ever by selling rat droppings.

21023.event: Your flying sword broke. You fell into mud, and a child netted you, calling you a talking big-headed fish.
21023.postEvent: Though muddy and disheveled, you thus felt a long-lost mortal pleasure.

21024.event: Your tribulation failed, Dao body destroyed, but undigested medicine rekindled vitality, making you a walking dead.
21024.postEvent: Although your body is stiff and your immortal grace is gone, your lifespan is extended instead. Continue cultivating immortality.

21025.event: You got a challenge letter and flew to meet a nine-tailed fox. She wants you as her Dao companion.
21025.postEvent: You were dumbfounded, but secretly sighed that this fox immortal's luck was indeed solid.

21026.event: You spent all on a 'Fairyland Fragment' that was glazed tile but had True Immortal's tear, renewing Dao heart.
21026.postEvent: From then on, you became indifferent to desires and lived carefree.

21027.event: On tribulation transcendence day, you stepped barefoot onto golden light and became the Barefoot Immortal.
21027.postEvent: Although somewhat indecorous, you couldn't care less and lived the most unrestrained life.

21028.event: As a swaddled infant, you grasped a wisp of moonlight that glimmered and vanished.
21028.postEvent: The wet nurse was astounded, but only dismissed it as a trick of the eye.

21029.event: While toddling, you chased a dragonfly into the back mountain. An ancient vine wrapped your ankle then released.
21029.postEvent: From then on, you felt close to plants and trees, and your aura became clear and ethereal.

21030.event: When first learning human language, you spoke ancient words, stunning a servant, but never again.

21031.event: A white-bearded Daoist taught you a saying in a dream; you recalled it but forgot after two weeks.

21032.event: A small red fish leaped into your palm, its scales briefly showing a fading rune pattern.
21032.postEvent: You uttered 'Eh?' and the small fish had already disappeared.

21033.event: One autumn night you wished for candy on a star; next day a sweet stone made you salivate.

21034.event: While picking osmanthus flowers, you slipped but a breeze gently lowered you onto hay, unharmed.
21034.postEvent: After this, you became much braver.

21035.event: At birth, a Daoist gave a jade token. It heated, sending your spirit to a palace with cranes and music.
21035.postEvent: When you woke, you felt relaxed and happy. After that, you often had this dream.

21036.event: While playing hide-and-seek in an ancestral hall, you touched your great-grandfather's tablet, heard 'Unfilial descendant,' cried, and got three-day fever.
21036.postEvent: After recovering, you would go out of your way to avoid the memorial tablets.

21037.event: I saw a fire-breather at market, stole an oil lamp to mimic, puffed smoke, startling Mother into dropping her bowl.

21038.event: By the pond on a hot day, your reflection winked while you didn't blink, then returned to normal.

21039.event: You built a snowman on a snowy day; it spoke, then collapsed after you added a carrot nose.
21039.postEvent: After that, you told everyone, but no one believed you.

21040.event: An injured white rabbit in the back mountain bites you, oozing green blood, leaving a cyan vein scar.
21040.postEvent: After that, you were extremely resistant to cold, and didn't feel cold even when walking barefoot in winter.

21041.event: You found a pitch-black pill in an abandoned alchemy room, swallowed it, burned, slept, woke light and warm.
21041.postEvent: After that, you never wore a cotton-padded jacket in winter again.

21042.event: On a cloudless afternoon, you hear thunder and faint banners and drums above, as if heavenly troops march.

21043.event: An old cultivator touched your head, sighed 'Mixed roots, good temperament,' and gave a wooden kite circling the house thrice.

21044.event: During a nap, I floated and saw my sleeping body, then wind blew me back.
21044.postEvent: After waking up, my spiritual awareness became keen, and I could often sense unusual movements around me.

21045.event: While hiding in a dry well, blue moss turned to light that seeped into my hand, boosting strength and appetite.

21046.event: I found a rusty coin that floated, led me to strange places, then my mother threw it away.

21047.event: At my first academy lesson, my brush moved on its own, writing Dao then snapped.
21047.postEvent: The master shook his head and sighed, 'He has revealed his spiritual talent too early.'

21048.event: The cat's new kitten purred against my cheek, sending warm energy through my meridians.

21049.event: By the river I found a palm-sized golden scale; my father enshrined it for its ocean tide sounds.

21050.event: One winter night, a candle flame became a tiny dancer who bowed when I clapped, then returned.
21050.postEvent: My family all said I was seeing things.

21051.event: I predicted a flying sword would break; it shattered in a duel, stunning the clan.

21052.event: Crane egg caused rosy light; the crane fairy demanded three spirit pills and said my fortune was reversed.
21052.postEvent: The fairy often came for pills, and you forged a slight bond of kindness.

21053.event: At {age}, you sleepwalked sword-fighting, leaving three-foot-deep cuts before a sword monument; elders called it 'masterful clumsiness'.

21054.event: Spiritual light birthed a baby who called me mother for three days. Then found a note: refine with caution.

21055.event: Dead iron tree bloomed, tiny figure chanted. I listened three days, perception sharpened. Tree turned to dust, I felt loss.

21056.event: Insulted a spiritual parrot for three days, forgot my mantra, damaged my Dao heart, and now dislike birds.

21057.event: In a hot spring, I grasped a palm technique. I struck, sending water three zhang high, scalding passing disciples.

21058.event: I attempted an ancient fragmentary scroll and accidentally reversed my meridians, causing my whole body to itch for three days.

21059.event: At {age}, I cracked a rock, drank wine, was drunk seven days, cultivation loosened and {spirit} Dao heart relaxed.

21060.event: Full moon night, my shadow left. Demon impersonated me. Retrieved and refined into shadow escape, gaining {intelligence} comprehension.

21061.event: At {age}, I planted willow branch. It became guardian spirit, played chess with me, improving my {spirit} Dao heart.

21062.event: Found chess game on cave wall. Played three days, broke it. Soul left manual, boosted {intelligence} comprehension.

21063.event: Sucked into an ancient upside-down painting, I used my spirit Dao heart to overcome the painter's heart demon and advance.

21064.event: During tribulation, lightning struck your brush. It charred but gained spirit, making talismans easier and elevating {intelligence} perception.

21065.event: Rejuvenation technique backfired. Hair turned black, voice childish, causing laughter. {charm} demeanor damaged, took a hundred years to recover.

21066.event: At {age}, you found a green stone, nurtured it; a monkey emerged, gave you spiritual liquid, aiding your {spirit} Dao.

21067.event: Spiritual rain soaked you; golden characters said go to Luoxia Peak. You received a ganoderma, boosting your {strength} physique.

21069.event: Alchemy explosion left a poem with a lost recipe. Re-refined pill was mediocre. Poem: 'Haste and patience both are Dao.'

21070.event: A fluorescent mushroom in your cave debated Dao with you for three days, then withered into an emerald spore.
21070.postEvent: The spore was a Dao Heart Mushroom that resists inner demons but needs daily talk after planting.

21071.event: You bought a cheap cooking manual; food had spiritual energy but tasted awful, lightning shattered the stove.
21071.postEvent: Your cooking improved, and lightning tribulations temper and enhance your physique.

21072.event: A white crane crashed into you, gave a feather that later guided you to a treasure entrance.

21073.event: You mistook a beauty pill for a fasting pill, regained youth, shrank, and were dragged into a trial.
