21073.postEvent: You passed the trial with mixed feelings, gained small followers, but revealed old secrets.

21074.event: Qi deviation made your soul listen to a Nascent Soul elder; chaotic Dao resonance improved your comprehension.

21075.event: You got byes in the competition; opponent forfeited. Won without a fight. Mocked as 'Forsaken Son of Heaven.'
21075.postEvent: The next year, your luck ran out. While walking, a Foundation Establishment cultivator's flying sword scratched you.

21076.event: A stone tablet said turn left 300 li. An old farmer gave you a wind boost, increasing your speed.

21077.event: Your spirit mouse ate a pill, spoke, urged you to give up. You persisted; it ran away.
21077.postEvent: The spirit mouse returned after three days with a Marrow Cleansing Fruit, revealing it tested your Dao heart.

21078.event: Your tribulation's stray bolt wounded a demon king; you stole his scales, fled to a herb field, and died by an ancient trap.

21079.event: Testing formations, you fell into a spatial crack to a brothel.

21080.event: After eating a roadside Vermilion Fruit, your month-long flatulence reeked but fueled spirit herb growth, sparking envy.
21080.postEvent: The Alchemy Hall elder offered three Foundation Establishment Pills for you to tend his garden three days monthly.

21081.event: You dreamed of being a koi, woke with gills that vanished after three days, but your swimming improved greatly.

21082.event: An alchemy cauldron explosion awakened your fire spiritual root, but left you fearing alchemy fire.

21083.event: A rusty sword's spirit insulted you, stabbed you fatally, and swaggered off.

21084.event: An ancient mirror spawned a clone accusing you, then merged after battle; cultivation rose but memories blurred past and present.

21085.event: Trying dual cultivation with your Dao partner, qi reversed and souls swapped, deepening understanding but scrambling memory.

21086.event: A crane blocked the door, holding a ledger, claiming you owed it three spirit fruits.

21087.event: A future letter warned you to avoid water and a blue-clad man, saving you.
21087.postEvent: But there was a line at the end of the letter that was illegible, leaving you uneasy.

21088.event: Snoring at a Dao conference resonated with Heavenly Dao; you woke up as head of Dharma Hall.
21088.postEvent: You blankly took office, only to find you just had to sit and sleep while the Dao sound taught.

21089.event: Sleepwalking during fasting, you stole spirit meals; copying the Heart Purifying Mantra condensed your divine sense.

21090.event: Your flying sword spirit struck, demanding qin music. You learned it, mastering both in three years for greater power.

21091.event: At a mortal wedding, the bride revealed her demon form and gave you a demon pill as compensation.

21092.event: While bathing, spring water turned into a spirit claiming you as master, requiring a daily story for water.
21092.postEvent: You had to collect strange tales from all around, which indirectly broadened your knowledge.

21093.event: Watching red ants carry dew, you missed your sword duel with Perfected Lingxu.
21093.postEvent: Lingxu sent a crane, saw you dazed at ants, sighed smiling, and sat to watch.

21094.event: You invented 'Sword Dance in Nine Heavens,' a flying sword move that entertains at banquets but does no damage.

21095.event: A sneeze made the furnace explode with rainbow light, creating a permanent rainbow in your alchemy room during rain.

21096.event: You traded a low-grade spirit stone for hawthorns; their sweetness surpassed spirit fruits.
21096.postEvent: The old man realized the stone could buy a hundred acres, exclaiming he met an immortal.

21097.event: After ten years of meditation, you woke with tangled white hair, cut it, and made a unique broom.
21097.postEvent: Your disciples watched from afar, thinking you were practicing some secret art of using hair to form a formation.

21098.event: After ten years, the crane learned only to curse, insulting a revered visitor who left.

21099.event: In a white hair you found ant cultivators farming a realm; you pacted with their queen for stardust honey.

21100.event: Mortal feelings drove you to take the exam, become top scholar, reveal your true form, and flee.

21101.event: Your qi deviated, turning you into a bluestone for three days; in joyful silence you gained petrification insight.
21101.postEvent: The disciples passing by all said that the stone naturally possessed Dao rhythm.

21102.event: You accidentally released infant soul true fire with turbid qi, blasting opponent and treasure away, winning without a fight.
21102.postEvent: Afterward, you covered your face, your opponent covered his nose, and the onlookers laughed heartily.

21103.event: You secretly tried a flawed shape-shifting pill, became a celestial beauty for a month, then gained unique insight.

21104.event: Your divine sense enters a jade, falling into a food realm; you emerge rounder after ten years.

21105.event: Dreaming of a butterfly, you couldn't tell reality from dream. Disciples thought you enlightened, but you were daydreaming.

21106.event: A spirit herb you nurtured became a child calling you Father; you took him as a disciple.

21107.event: Your water art goes wrong, causing a flood that kills ancient herbs. The hall master weeps and demands payment.

21108.event: You prepared for heavenly tribulation, but it was your neighbor's, wasting days and losing a pill to the thunder.

21109.event: Found a barbecue manual in the Sutra Pavilion; you mastered it and impressed elders with grilled meat.

21110.event: After three days as a frog, you joyfully caught flies; the enlightened frog now awaits your teaching by the lake.

21111.event: Swallowing a half-ripe Illusory Transformation Pear reverses spiritual energy, forcing backward walking; disciples see it as new divine power.

21112.event: Painstakingly learning a useless laundry spell, you're mocked but later earn spirit stones from orders.

21113.event: At a Dao discussion, your impassioned speech becomes a long bird chirp, stunning everyone; you had triggered an ancient curse.

21114.event: After decades in seclusion, no one recognized you. A disciple gave you a broom; you smiled and swept the gate.
21114.postEvent: Six months later, the sect leader finds the sweeper is the Supreme Elder and is terrified.

21115.event: Meditating on a stone for three days, it cracks and yields Stone Marrow Spirit Milk, extending your life.

21116.event: A lightning strike during tribulation opened a meridian in your foot, letting you walk very fast but not fly.

21117.event: You buy an egg-shaped stone claiming to be divine, knowing it's a fluorescent trick, for fun.

21118.event: A celestial crane steals your robe from a branch; you later find it in its nest with chicks.

21119.event: You realized eating qi is cultivation; you feasted three days and felt refreshed.
21119.postEvent: At each meal you loudly recite 'A grain of rice contains a world,' making your fellow disciples look askance.

21120.event: You open a wordless heavenly book, ink sprays from its spine onto your face, taking half a month to clean.

21121.event: Buy a truth-telling pill, then pass rainbow gas for seven days, drawing spirit butterflies.
21121.postEvent: All peers praise "immortal aura, natural fragrance," but truly it's too awkward to speak.

21122.event: A talking squirrel scams you for spirit stones by promising treasure, then repeats the trick on others.

21123.event: A giant mushroom suddenly sprouts from under your cushion, its cap spreading like an umbrella for stable cultivation.

21124.event: My life-bound flying sword suddenly claimed to be a hoe for clouds and rain, making my swings smell of earth.

21125.event: Waking from a dream, butterflies fluttered outside, mimicking my dream wings — a hint of Zhuang Zhou.

21126.event: A flying sword message told me to eat extra rice, but I just burped all day.

21127.event: I offered incense to a stone lion; it yawned, shedding moss, and now I feel its gaze.

21128.event: Stumbled into weeping bamboos chattering about an elder's embarrassing incident from five hundred years ago.

21129.event: You collided with a solid cloud while wind riding; your robe was covered in cloud fluff for three days.

21130.event: Runaway furnace brewed a pot of stew, luring all village dogs to circle, bark, and devour it.

21131.event: Startled, I saw my shadow mimic others' gaits, slithering and bowing endlessly.

21132.event: A beggar gave you a poem demanding spirit stones: 'Go out when clear; watch mountains when clouds come.

21133.event: While cultivating, I heard a voice: your takeout arrived. An empty box with warm leftovers lay nearby.

21134.event: Each morning ants formed a morning symbol at my cave entrance, always returning when wiped.

21135.event: Obtained an ever-burning firelighter from a secret realm, but it only lights tobacco leaves.

21136.event: Mistaken for a fellow crane by a white crane, forcibly taken to a crane gathering.

21137.event: My leaked Qi turned a weed into a demon that sings off-key outside my window nightly.

21138.event: Bought a magic robe that repels evil, but demons came to see it.

21139.event: My life-bound magic tool grew short legs, clattered around, and stole half a jar of spirit rice.

21140.event: I accepted a challenge, but my opponent apologized for mistaken identity and offered spirit tea.

21141.event: A koi fish leaped, spat water in my face, laughed, flicked its tail, and dove back.

21142.event: One night, I left seclusion and understood ants planning to steal my Fasting Pills.

21143.event: I saw an old turtle speaking to a green stone on a barren hill; the stone split open and grew.

21144.event: A mortal troupe borrowed my Taoist title for a clown, spreading it; even disciples laughed.

21145.event: I accidentally ate a strange fruit, my skin changed color with emotions for a month, becoming a joke.

21146.event: On a cliff, a man named Breath of Wind pranked me with heavy breathing that nearly made me faint.

21147.event: My spirit beast brought a mortal hen home as his Dao companion; they are inseparable.

21148.event: After practicing lightning magic, my hair stood up for weeks; I was dubbed Raging Hair Celestial, funny and annoying.

21149.event: I bought tribulation insurance at the market; a helper deflected lightning, destroying my alchemy room.

21150.event: My life-bound treasure snored at night, disturbing my meditation, but healed itself days later.

21151.event: I dug up the cave from the treasure map, found aged vinegar, and its smell withered plants when spilled.

21152.event: My cultivation dropped a realm from a beast's hiccups, then recovered on its own.

21153.event: In an ancient ruin, I triggered a mechanism spraying fragrant powder, attracting butterflies and repelling insects for a year.

21154.event: During a duel, our magic weapons flew out, collided mid-air, and argued, shocking the audience.

21155.event: As a celestial judge in a beauty contest, my presence overwhelmed; losers splashed water and drove me away.

21156.event: My furnace exploded, smoke formed 'Idiot' that lingered, and everyone laughed.

21157.event: Spirit bees built a hive in my cave; their honey fragrance cleared my mind during cultivation.

21158.event: In a sea of clouds, a crane-riding old man lost at chess, vanished into smoke, leaving 'See you again.'

21159.event: After three breaths of sour-sweet energy, I hiccupped pure energy, drawing disciples to inhale.

21160.event: Mistaken for Earth God, people built a shrine; incense made me sneeze, I used magic to block smoke.

21161.event: A strange flower’s scent altered my spirit, letting me hear plants complain about hard soil and bugs.

21162.event: I awoke from meditation to find beasts draping cloth and fruit on me, mistaking me for a tree.

21163.event: Bathing in a spiritual spring turned water milky; my white skin lured a green-ox demon bellowing for a mate.

21164.event: You receive a thank-you letter from the future with messy handwriting, signed the fish you once set free.

21165.event: Each night a faint flute comes from the scabbard, ceasing when drawn, returning when sheathed, until one day it hums a lullaby and fades.

21166.event: Strayed into an alley selling regret pills, bought one with a spirit stone, felt regret briefly, then yelled scammed.

21167.event: Struck by lightning, now sees spiritual energy flows but cannot interact—useless.

21168.event: Met a talking dry well; drinking its water brought three days of nagging about household affairs.

21169.event: The spirit beast learned mahjong, gambled with neighbors, lost your stones, and returned with an IOU.

21170.event: The flying sword flung you into a river, speeding up for a date with a female sword.

21171.event: Spent a fortune on a dragon egg that hatched into a lizard calling you mom and begging for food.

21172.event: During a realm breakthrough, a heart-voice asked: 'Are you happy?' 'Not bad' stabilized it.

21173.event: Upon stepping onto the descending rainbow bridge, you are sent to its empty end, dazed, before flying back disappointed.

21174.event: On a full moon, your shadow lifts, pours tea, turns pages, then returns at dawn.

21175.event: Found a pouch of paper cranes; each unfolded read 'I want to eat' in childish script, origin unknown.

21176.event: During tribulation, clouds formed a smiling face; thunder mocked you, bittering your Dao mind.

21177.event: He was born in Qingzhou with defects, died before one month, unable to defy fate.

21178.event: A wandering Daoist at your house taught you fragments of Heavenly Origin Calculation and strange gates.

21179.event: Orphaned by illness, family fell; he started a divination stall using numerology to predict fortunes and gained fame.

21180.event: Set up a Steal Heaven Array to refine body with stolen spiritual energy, surviving thunder tribulation for extended life.

21181.event: Tasked by a cultivator, used a mortal formation to kill a beast. Refused pill rewards, saying his path was different.

21182.event: He exhausted efforts refining the Fate-Reversing Plate, challenged tribulation as a mortal, died, but his teachings benefited later generations.

21183.event: Born into the Tianxuan Ye clan with celestial signs, but tested as low-grade waste vein.

21184.event: Ambushed and pushed off a cliff during training, a hunter saved me.

21185.event: He found broken sword in cave; demon soul whispered, lured him to feed it blood and reshape bones.

21186.event: Wandered to Youzhou, fell into Demon Abyss, obtained Soul Devouring Art, then devoured others' cultivation to advance rapidly.

21187.event: Golden Core tribulation heart demon backlash shattered sword and cultivation; he became a mortal, sold wine, died on snowy night.

21188.event: Enemies sought revenge; rogue cultivator fought to protect, realized letting go, smiled, died. Wildflower guided soul.

21189.event: Child of tenant farmers at Cloud Mist Sect, parents cultivated spiritual fields; naturally strong and sturdy.

21190.event: A lowly disciple sweeps steps diligently, secretly yearning for lessons overheard.

21191.event: Found ancient ring in dry well; at night a soul appeared, claiming to be alchemy saint, took him as apprentice.

21192.event: Guided by a remnant soul, secretly refined marrow pills, improved spiritual root, and broke through to Qi Refining.

21193.event: Signed up as menial for sect competition; dark horse, won first in alchemy, combat, shocked sect, promoted to true disciple.

21194.event: Found Nascent Soul in ancient ruins, cultivated for a century, but mortal ties delayed ascension.

21195.event: Returned to Cloud Mist Sect as a Nascent Soul, swept steps, severed ties, ascended to Spirit Realm in radiant light.

21196.event: Born on East Sea to rogue cultivator parents; at dawn a baby's cry broke waves. They named him Sea-Born.

21197.event: Stumbled into an ancient hermit's cave, found Carefree Wander art, gained insight, cultivation soared.

21198.event: Found true love during Golden Core, roamed seas, sword and qin harmonized, known as Dual Immortals.

21199.event: Dao partner shielded him from Nascent Soul tribulation, soul scattered, heart died, dispersed cultivation, hid in Cloud Dream Mountain.

21200.event: Adopted alias Fortune Teller, divined for Cloud Dream Mountain villagers with cryptic hints of heavenly truths, gaining renown.

21201.event: Demon Abyss stirred; evil cultivator attempted blood sacrifice; rogue with Nascent Soul quelled demons with one sword, then vanished.

21202.event: His life ended meditating on a peak, became a peach orchard; touching petals brought freedom; called Peach Garden Rogue.

21203.event: Born in a sword forge to smith parents, a humming sword foretold sword bone and fated slavery.

21204.event: The sect chose a sword servant; only he could draw Frost Moon, which never left him as he cultivated.

21205.event: Following his master to subdue demon cultivators, he slew a Golden Core demon head with his sword, but his own.

21206.event: The master's family declined; the sword servant drifted, feeding blood to deepen their bond, hearing it weep.

21207.event: Guided by the sword spirit, I forged Frostmoon with my body, becoming its spirit and leaving only its cry.

21208.event: The demon sword rebelled, and the sword servant became a half-human, half-sword being.

21209.event: Born to apothecaries, an infancy test showed mortal bones, disappointing clan elders.

21210.event: He found half a volume of 'The Secret Art of Mysteries' and studied it hard under the lamp.

21211.event: He left his family, roamed all nine provinces, and refined countless herbs in his alchemy furnace.

21212.event: His first Foundation Building Pill attempt: cauldron exploded, poison burned his meridians, he died meditating, divine light lingered.

21213.event: He exchanged with a rogue cultivator from the East Sea for the 'Turtle Breath Life-Extending Formula'.

21214.event: His beard and hair turned completely white. Using a drop of heart blood as a guide, he refined the Five.

21215.event: He was ambushed by a demon cultivator wielding a black banner in a desolate valley.

21216.event: Before nirvana, with his left hand he carved the "Mortal Path" mark on the stone chamber, leaving glowing, weatherproof characters.

21217.event: Born with a faint spiritual light, the Xuanyuan patriarch named him Abandoned.

21218.event: I broke clan rules defending mother, was stripped and pushed off the Immortal Stairs, blood staining snow on my forehead.

21219.event: On the verge of death, he bit through a demon wolf's throat.

21220.event: He hid his name, joined Cangwu Sect, formed Golden Core in three years, and his wolf howl shattered the peak's.

21221.event: During the Xuanyuan trial, the elder who had abandoned him before invited him to return to the clan.

21222.event: In an ancient realm, he obtained the Illusion-Breaking Mirror, piercing thirty-three inner demons, merging with the wolf shadow.

21223.event: Nascent Soul tribulation brought visions of his clan's death; he fell into demonic hindrance and his soul was shattered.

21224.event: On the eve of godhood, the Xuanyuan clan faced annihilation. He sat on clouds, chains of fate breaking.

21225.event: Guided by heavenly light, he stepped through the void and carved the final "I" in the mortal world.

21226.event: Born at Qingyun Sect gate in snow, a servant gave him a bamboo broom to pray for long life.

21227.event: Every day, using the broom as a sword, he traced the first wisp of breeze sword intent amidst falling leaves.

21228.event: Caught stealing sword techniques, he was whipped to the bone, died in the woodshed, leaving only a broom.

21229.event: Touching the dusty jade statue in the ancestral hall, I absorbed the Green Lotus Sword Song and a soul's whisper.

21230.event: During quiet bamboo grove cultivation, a cyan sword aura from his fingertip first severed a stone lantern three zhang away.

21231.event: He ascended the stage in coarse clothes; a green lotus bloomed, shattering the disciples' swords.

21232.event: Entering the Sword Tomb, ten thousand swords mourned; Dust-Cutter sprang from stone, its hilt warm as a friend's hand.

21233.event: Nine purple thunderbolts struck; his sword failed, core shattered, body turned to ash, soul dissipated.

21234.event: He resigned as Sword Leader after seven days, cast aside his cloak, and flew into clouds on his sword, vanishing.

21235.event: A cyan light meditated on a mortal snow mountain; sword qi lingered within a three-chi snow-free zone.

21236.event: A child with impure spiritual roots born in a southern tribe; ink fragrance, elders said fated to write.

21237.event: I join the ox-riding Taoist, read Nature's Book, and often sit by the creek listening to stone whispers.

21238.event: Built a thatched hut in the Valley of Mist and Clouds. Elk brought lingzhi, white cranes guarded the furnace.

21239.event: To save a village at the foot of the mountain, he used his golden core to trigger earthly fire, burning.

21240.event: The Nascent Soul tribulation came; he turned landscapes into a mindscape as thunder formed an amber figure in his dantian.

21241.event: After demon cultivators soul-refined his friend's family, he slew three Nascent Soul masters, stained his robe, and died exhausted.

21242.event: After three years in seclusion, he wrote twelve chapters, emerging with a serene face and still Dao heart.

21243.event: During his Deity Transformation tribulation, an unresolved obsession turned clouds to red lotus fire, shattering his Dao foundation and killing.

21244.event: He lived in an old hermitage, died smiling amid wild vegetation, flower buds held Dao patterns.

21245.event: She died smiling, recalling the massacre and the elder's "Sword Maiden's bone" that took her in, gratitude still fresh.

21246.event: He entered the sword furnace, cut his wrist, drained his blood, and died smiling when the sword was finished.

21247.event: The 'Blazing Prairie' sword emerged from the furnace, heavenly fire fell; he embraced the furnace for three days and nights.

21248.event: A sword master fell in a secret realm, shattered his sword, retrieved the pieces, broke three ribs, and died holding.

21249.event: He cut off his left arm to recast fragments, forging 'Remnant Sun'; blood clouds hid the sun, his soul ascended.

21250.event: He drove the Remnant Sun sword into his foe, but its spirit shattered his meridians and brain, killing him.

21251.event: He died cross-legged before the sword; his soul absorbed by 'Remnant Sun', lighting its spirit patterns layer by layer.

21252.event: Born into a declining sorcerer family, the talisman papers in the delivery room moved without wind, as if an omen.

21253.event: He could draw third-rank talismans alone, a village prodigy, but his mixed spiritual roots doomed his immortal path.

21254.event: Leaving home, he subdued a century-old zombie with mortal arts; a shrine gave him incense wish power.

21255.event: At an ancient site, he found the Heavenly Craft Derivation Art and became a grandmaster.

21256.event: Using the fortune of a nation as a foundation, he set up a heaven-defying array, forcibly establishing his foundation.

21257.event: Based on his techniques, he refined a mechanical puppet that could fight golden core cultivators, shocking the region; he was.

21258.event: The false spiritual root collapsed, his physical body aged rapidly.

21259.event: On his deathbed, on the Starry Field Platform, he engraved his life's insights onto a jade slip, titled 'Mortal Cultivation.

21260.event: Born into a celestial sword family, a phantom phoenix appeared, but his mortal mother disgraced them, so they were abandoned.

21261.event: He wandered with his mother to a desolate village, where his mother died of illness.

21262.event: After death, the slovenly Daoist instructed joining Lingyun Sect's trial, broke an illusion array with an iron sword, and was.

21263.event: He used sword intent to invoke an ancestral sword soul, defeated a golden core senior in one strike, and entered.

21264.event: At Golden Core, I went for revenge but found the clan annihilated, only a broken sword with a weeping spirit.

21265.event: Chased demon cultivators to Nethersea, fought Demon Lord clone, gravely wounded, saved by mysterious power, injured for years.

21266.event: During Nascent Soul Tribulation, heart demons nearly led him astray, but broom wave cleared illusions and he attained Nascent Soul.

21267.event: Triggered Immortal Ascension Tribulation, used Severing Dust Sword Intent, celestial gate opened, rosy clouds guided, then scattered swords and ascended.

21268.event: Abandoned at a Taoist temple gate with a wooden sword, the master adopted him and named him Chenxin.

21269.event: He swept three thousand temple steps daily, unknowingly carving subtle Dao-aligned traces.

21270.event: A collapsed cave revealed skeletal remains, a cultivation manual, and pills. Chenxin inherited them and began cultivation.

21271.event: Unknown Chenxin used Hunyuan Force to beat inner disciples, won the sect tournament, and became the master's personal disciple.

21272.event: As demon sect besieged, Chenxin broke through cultivation level and used Hunyuan One Qi Formation to save sect.

21273.event: He became sect master, recruited widely, made Hunyuan Art supreme, and quickly elevated the sect.

21274.event: He overcame the Heart Demon Tribulation, severed attachments, attained Deity Transformation, became youngest Sword Paragon, founded Severing Dust.

21275.event: After perfecting Deity Transformation, he comprehended Heavenly Dao at Ascension Platform, then ascended in nine-colored radiance, leaving Chenxin Collection.

21276.event: Born poor with blocked meridians, he refused to accept his fate, his spirit undimmed.

21277.event: Found a tattered scroll of Celestial Inference Art in mountains, treasured it, and deduced its meaning day and night.

21278.event: He used a subtle Qimen array; rats bound themselves overnight, earning him reward and fame.

21279.event: He trapped rogue cultivators with an illusion array and took their elixirs and techniques, his first cultivation resources.

21280.event: Repairing a minor clan's formation, a cultivator mocked him, wounding his spirit and Dao heart.

21281.event: He mastered spatial techniques from an old map, built a teleportation array, and shocked the sect, becoming an elder's disciple.

21282.event: Demon horde attacks, barrier fails; I sacrifice heart blood to kill the Nascent Soul leader, but heavenly backlash leaves me crippled and powerless.

21283.event: He foresaw his death, spent three years writing the Mortal Bone Art Canon in blood and tears for future generations.

21284.event: Guixu Array turned body to dust, soul returned, only talisman and array dao eternal. Light lingered three days like stars.

21285.event: Born into Hidden Sword Clan, his cry brought thunder, swords sang, sword bones amazed the hall.

21286.event: Winning the clan competition earned a Sword Washing Pool reward but sparked elder brother's jealousy.

21287.event: Framed by his brother for forbidden arts, his spirit root destroyed, expelled in rain, hatred overwhelming.

21288.event: From begging, saved a demon, got Soul Devouring Art, refined beast cores, rebuilt fake root, fell to demonic path.

21289.event: After winning ten demon path matches, the Blood Fiend Sword planted a heart demon; each swing draws blood.

21290.event: In war, he slaughtered many righteous, then heart demon rebounded, destroying dao heart, meridians, and soul, scattering in Nine Nether.

21291.event: At Sword Grave, awakened to 'break then establish', dispersed demonic power, became mortal swordsman, slew heart demon, gained freedom.

21292.event: After crossing Nascent Soul tribulation, he became Sword Immortal but abandoned the sect and went into seclusion.

21293.event: Demon beasts destroyed my village and killed my parents; I was taken as a servant by an Azure Cloud disciple.

21294.event: Assigned to sweep the library, I watched sword cuts on stone walls as distractions faded and sword heart awakened.

21295.event: An inner disciple humiliated him, kicking his broom away. He bowed, retrieved it, and left silently, his sword intent sharpened.

21296.event: On a full moon night, he mastered 'Hidden Edge' against his shadow as sword qi surged.

21297.event: Taunted by outer disciples at the tournament, he swept; an elder, sensing his qi, gave him a worn sword manual.

21298.event: Demon attacked, formation broke, elders trapped. He killed the demon lord with one broom strike.

21299.event: Promoted to Sutra Library elder and granted Azure Cloud Sword Canon, he declined, kept sweeping, strengthening his dao heart.

21300.event: After ascending by crossing tribulation, a broom left at the gate became a towering stone sword with eternal sword qi.

21301.event: His rogue cultivator parents left an ancient wine recipe; he lives alone in Peach Blossom Valley, indifferent to nature.

21302.event: Peach Blossom Wine, which enlightens minor arts, gained fame among rogue cultivators, livening the valley.

21303.event: Mistakenly added millennial ice marrow to wine, brewed 'Drunk Moon'. Drinking reshaped dao foundation and triggered a minor tribulation.

21304.event: Transcended tribulation to Golden Core, refused sects, nourished a peachwood tree, set a maze, lived peacefully in the valley.

21305.event: A Nascent Soul master undergoing tribulation used wine fruits to save lives but depleted cultivation and died in Peach Valley.

21306.event: Drunken Moon's name reached the Heavenly Sword Sect; an elder demanded wine but was repelled, sowing enmity and danger.

21307.event: He set a vast wine formation and turned drunkenness into swords, defeating invaders and earning fame across the Nine Provinces.

21308.event: Weary of conflict, he sealed his cultivation and opened Drunken Moon tavern in Chang'an. Mortals forgot worries; cultivators gained enlightenment.

21309.event: Spiritual energy became chaotic, tides swept the Nine Provinces. He perished, leaving only a pot of Drunken Moon.

21310.event: Taixu Ancient Realm opened on the East Sea coast, its treasures sparking deadly battles among cultivators.

21311.event: The Nine Abyss Rift's demonic qi made you a demon puppet, killing you; the east became forbidden.

21312.event: The Heavenly Dao lost balance, calamity thunder fell. You missed celestial opportunity and died in agony.

21313.event: An ancient sect lifted the Sword Slave Decree; sword bearers could enter the Sword Tomb for enlightenment and recognition.

21314.event: Hidden mountain cultivators formed the Loose Cultivator Alliance, spreading Dao and giving humble cultivators hope.

21315.event: A Xuanhuang Merit Stele fell from heaven, awakening mortal sorcerers with spiritual roots, sparking a cultivation frenzy.

21316.event: During the Langya Sacrifice, your bloodline reverted to an ancestral state, awakening the Cangwu Dao Body, shaking the Central Province.

21317.event: While cleaning Tiangong Sect ruins, you found a worn bronze furnace, an ancient divine artifact, and rose rapidly.

21318.event: Spiritual veins dried, immortal mountains collapsed; you lost all power and fell.

21319.event: Heart demon tribulation clouds descended; you lost to inner demons, shattering your Dao heart, ending your life.

21320.event: Heavenly music from the Nine Heavens made listeners ascend or fall into illusions; fate ruled all.

21321.event: The tide of spiritual energy illuminates peaks and valleys, nourishing all beings' bodies and souls.

21322.event: The decade's sect tournament began; winners gained fame across Nine Provinces, losers retreated to seclusion.

21323.event: A demon rift tore the sky; a tide of demons slew you as an infant.
21323.postEvent: No one survives the calamity. Your story ends here.

21324.event: A reclusive immortal recruits disciples everywhere, saying fate trumps talent, giving commoners a chance to defy destiny.

21325.event: A sudden heavenly tribulation mutation multiplies lightning power, killing you despite your Nascent Soul cultivation.

21326.event: Ancient sword tomb erupts, swords sing. Sword slave wins sword spirit after a century. You receive baptism and advance.

21327.event: Internal strife erupts in a cultivation clan as a returned abandoned child triggers bloody power struggles, leading to your death.

21328.event: The celestial elixir, forged by thunder and fire, grants a century of life and regenerates flesh.

21329.event: A menial sweeper, listening to scriptures daily, had an epiphany. His Dao heart cleared, triggering anomalies, and he entered cultivation.

21330.event: As earth veins shift and spiritual veins dry, energy thins, cultivation fails, and you die in your cave.

21331.event: A void secret realm opens by the East Sea; you suffer backlash and your soul scatters.

21332.event: A century-long war between righteous and demonic paths erupts, drawing all into a deadly fight.

21333.event: A blue bird drops a jade slip by your swaddling pillow, engraved with a single sloppy 'Eh'.

21334.event: Light rain falls, but only a three-foot area stays dry. A fox steals your shoe from under your umbrella.

21335.event: A white-bearded Taoist predicts the child's fate, miscalculates, then vanishes in green smoke.

21336.event: As a toddler, you ate waste pills from an alchemy furnace, then hiccupped colorful clouds for three days.

21337.event: You cry at night. A sword light circles the house, turns into a silver bell, and your crying stops.

21338.event: During your first birthday, you grab a passing tortoise's foot, ignoring gifts. It splashes pond water on your face.

21339.event: Moonlight shines in the well; you retrieve a jade pendant inscribed 'Later,' then the well dries.

21340.event: At age three, mountain goblins mistook you for kin, danced all night, then left your face muddy at dawn.

21341.event: Your first word was "The Dao can be Dao-ed," not Mama or Baba; lightning struck a tree, you giggled.

21342.event: At full moon you howl like a puppy; a neighbor cultivator suspects you're possessed by a sky dog, but his talismans fall.

21343.event: A peddler gives you a paper windmill that roars like a dragon, scaring chickens for three days. It burns.

21344.event: A six-legged toad spat a water bead; you swallowed it. Now each month, hiccupping sprays a small rainbow.

21345.event: You heard a voice underground call your name, dug ant hole, found bone with ant writing that crumbled.

21346.event: Bathing water freezes into a mirror reflecting an upside-down mountain. Break it; water becomes nine fish that swim into crack.

21347.event: You chased firefly into mass grave. Ghosts whispered 'not yet' then dragged you into a tomb. You became master.

21348.event: At the thunder of Jingzhe, a green snake slithered into your bedding. You held it and slept together.

21349.event: You casually drew a crooked sword formation with a branch; a passing sword slave stared blankly.

21350.event: At solar eclipse, golden halo surrounds you for three breaths, then pebble turns to relic, later traded by wandering monk.

21351.event: When learning to walk, you accidentally stepped on a pile of spiritual beast dung.

21352.event: Each lie grows a flower on your tongue; after three in one day, your mouth blooms with fragrance for three.

21353.event: A gray dove carried a copper coin and flew into your mouth. You held the coin and fell asleep.

21354.event: During a village sacrifice, you were chosen as the 'child to send away misfortune.

21355.event: At age four, you sleepwalked into the forbidden area behind the mountain and brought back a glowing stone egg.

21356.event: Firefly melted on your brow; you see spiritual plants but get lost when peaches ripen.

21357.event: While meditating, your dantian stirred; a green vine burst from your qi sea into a swaying flower.

21358.event: You refined Forgetting Dust Pills in seclusion; the scent filled the room, but taking one only made you forget lunch.

21359.event: Sword flight: crooked wind blew you into melon patch; farmer chased you as thief for three miles.

21360.event: During the heart demon tribulation, the demon, as your first love, complains of its romantic woes and asks for cash.
21360.postEvent: You inexplicably gave a few spirit stones, and the mental demon departed satisfied.

21361.event: Your shadow walks at midnight and reports useless marketplace gossip the next afternoon.

21362.event: While practicing a breath-concealing technique, you messed up, causing gong and drum sounds for half a month.

21363.event: You found an ancient manual; its last page said do thirty sit-ups nightly for the golden core.

21364.event: Bought a so-called immortal treasure at a high price, only to find it was a decorated chamber pot.

21365.event: A nascent soul left its body at night, got trapped in an old cat for three days, competing for food.
21365.postEvent: Later met an old Daoist who showed the way, and returned to the body in a sorry state.

21366.event: Cultivation caused a celestial light show, but only lured bees to build a hive; the honey was sweet.

21367.event: An intense itch revealed a reversed scale; pulling it caused thunder, then it played music in rain.

21368.event: While arguing about the Dao, two cultivators suddenly achieved enlightenment—discovering how to steam fragrant spiritual rice.

21369.event: Ate a seven-colored fruit in a secret realm, mooed for three days, then recovered in seven.

21370.event: Slipped gathering herbs on a cliff, hung in a crevice for three days as spirit monkeys threw fruit.
21370.postEvent: Upon escaping, found a millennium Polygonatum growing in the crevice; consuming it unexpectedly increased several years of cultivation.

21371.event: While watching flowing water, legs turned into a fish tail, then reverted, leaving a scale in the palm.
21371.postEvent: After that, every full moon, you uncontrollably feel like swimming in the water.

21372.event: On birthday, received a gift from future grandson: old wine. Tipsy, dreamt of a century ago.

21373.event: After years of seclusion, his floor-length hair and beard became a town's fashion, copied by mortals.

21374.event: He pierced a bluestone with his finger while understanding sword Dao, creating a spiritual spring only for tea.

21375.event: A sudden impulse made him shout "scatter" at the sky, clearing it forever—but only once.

21376.event: You found an egg in ruins; after 30 years hatching it cracked, then a wooden bird emerged chanting 'safe, safe'.

21377.event: Mastering the "Indestructible Body" only prevents mosquito bites, earning me the nickname "human mugwort" from friends.

21378.event: During tribulation, lightning struck a locust tree, revealing aged wine with fragrance for miles.

21379.event: Put a spirit herb in the furnace; seven-colored smoke caused half-hour laughter, earning you 'Laughing Immortal'.

21380.event: Rabbit leads to cave; life story on walls, ending erased, says 'Cultivate 100 years'.

21381.event: While cultivating, an off-key ape chanting scripture stirred your Dao heart with insight on simplicity.

21382.event: Bought Bigu Pills; no hunger for three days. Alchemist mixed longevity grass, turning medicine into energy.
21382.postEvent: After that, mundane meals became hard to swallow, which also saved worldly affairs.

21383.event: A crooked lightning bolt hits an outhouse, blasting golden manure that boosts spirit herb potency by 30% when applied.
21383.postEvent: The entire sect scrambled to imitate, but unfortunately no one could attract such precise tribulation lightning again.

21384.event: During dual cultivation, a meteorite-wrapped jade slip crashes through the roof, etched with ancient erotic poses subtly embodying yin-yang principles.
21384.postEvent: After enlightenment, your bond with your Dao partner deepened, and dual cultivation efficiency greatly increased.

21385.event: Watching stars, Big Dipper briefly smiled. Next day, roosters and dogs swapped calls, noisy for half a month.
21385.postEvent: Disciples found it nothing strange, after all, oddities are common in the cultivation world.

21386.event: Meditating, stepped on a spirit ant. Colony scolded for three days. Apologized and gave three spirit rice grains.

21387.event: Sneezing while refining a magical artifact, you accidentally created a singing spatula that disturbs neighbors.
21387.postEvent: You tossed the spatula into the warehouse. A hundred years later, it had become a sect treasure.

21388.event: In a secret realm, you found a book of obscure questions, answered a hundred, and your divine sense condensed.
21388.postEvent: Later you learned it was a fragment of an ancient sect's disciple selection exam, and you inadvertently awakened your wisdom.

21389.event: Old beggar said you owed three coins from past life. You paid, later found a sword intent seed.

21390.event: Your inner demon became a pink cotton candy blob; you licked it and your Dao heart became firm.
21390.postEvent: The inner demon was devoured and became part of you, leaving no ripples.

21391.event: Villagers asked to exorcise a mushroom demon with athlete's foot. Its spores made your feet itch for months, incurable.
21391.postEvent: You cured your feet with seven days of furnace fire; Dao partners mocked the incident.

21392.event: In immortal sect cooking contest, you made forget-me-not stew. Judges forgot scoring, you tied first, got spirit recipe book.

21393.event: A future message says "Don't eat." You hesitate, then see a demon bird die after eating the fruit.

21394.event: Bought a tacky drum at a mortal market that summoned cat demons, covering your cave with lingering shadows.
21394.postEvent: You ended up keeping the most intelligent one as a guardian, and it daily brought you leftover medicine pills.

21395.event: While meditating on a cliff, wind blew your clothes. Feeling one with everything, you realized the Unbound Wandering Art.
21395.postEvent: Later generations called you the 'Naked-Clad True Person,' and your Dharma image never wore a stitch.

21396.event: While training, your sword's arc revealed a future fall into a spirit beast manure pit, startling your mana.

21397.event: Your green luan swallowed true fire, then spat fragrant rainbows that repelled insects, ending bug troubles.

21398.event: During an inner demon trial, a nagging hag recounted your embarrassments for three days until shame dispelled it.
21398.postEvent: Because of this, your heart became clear and untainted.

21399.event: Got a wordless book. Water, fire, mind probes failed. Spilled tea: 'This page blank, next also.' Ironic.

21400.event: Drank tea made from foot-washing water, got diarrhea, physique purified.

21401.event: Divine sense latched onto a doomed pig; awoke hungrier, Dao heart harmonious.

21402.event: In tournament, a monkey threw lime powder; you lost, became sect joke.
21402.postEvent: Later, you subdued the monkey and together they cultivated into the 'Monkey-Sword Dual Excellence.'

21403.event: In a tomb, a comfortable skeleton slept forever, too lazy to ascend; you admired its carefree spirit.

21404.event: Collecting lightning calamity liquid, it became a dancing three-inch figure, then vanished with celestial music, enlightening your Dao heart.

21405.event: On Inversion Day, walking upside down, you saw ants practicing sword formation.
21405.postEvent: Thereafter, on every Inversion Day, you would subconsciously study the ant colony, but never again saw that mysterious formation.

21406.event: During meditation, your spirit entered a cicada; after seven days of singing, your voice still trembles.
21406.postEvent: Your Dao companion joked you learned the Cicada Chirp Divine Power, so every summer night you sing along with cicadas.

21407.event: You used the Bone Reflector to see your past life: a stubborn stone rained on for 500 years.

21408.event: Mushroom required tap dance; transformed into a shy white-robed girl.

21409.event: Under silky moonlight, you carved your beloved's name on a rock; glowing letters drew fireflies into her face.
21409.postEvent: A firefly swarm now dwells outside your cave, forming different words each night as if sentient.

21410.event: Tofu pudding debate led to seclusion; emerged laughing, grudge gone.

21411.event: Alchemy furnace produced a crying pill with a face; a Nascent Soul traded heavy treasure for it.
21411.postEvent: Before being taken away, that pill looked back at you, as if with tears in its eyes.

21412.event: After thirty years, your cactus becomes a spiky fat baby, scolds you for overwatering, and storms off.
21412.postEvent: It returned with a flower, said it failed the Dao, came for more spiritual energy.

21413.event: In the sect's wall-piercing contest, you focus and see a couple arguing miles away, their words echoing yours from yesterday.

21414.event: An old woman on a broom overtook your sword, gave a thumbs-up, and disappeared into the clouds.
21414.postEvent: You learned the old woman was a reclusive Rogue Cultivator Alliance elder who disguised herself to enlighten cultivators.

21415.event: Saw 'Don't want to cultivate' on wall; added 'Me neither'; wall became a tree hole.

21416.event: A white hair becomes a bearded spirit advising rest, then returns with a slight itch.

21417.event: Master's projection on cloud wrote a couplet in thunderclouds before tribulation.
21417.postEvent: Lightning missed by three inches; your master scolded you in a dream for a weak Dao heart wasting his ink.

21418.event: Ancient ring letter: Sword Venerable will retrieve in 500 years; today is that day.

21419.event: Fasting for decades, you ate a hawthorn stick; true qi made it tasteless, you cried.
21419.postEvent: That day, you sat alone at the mountain gate, watching mortal children squabble over sugar sticks until dusk.

21420.event: Your shadow moves alone, tickles you, fakes death. In a dream, it says it's a retired ancient shadow demon.

21421.event: Child made clay figurines of sect elders. He said grandpa taught him; grandpa was a former cultivator.

21422.event: You lost to a flying kitchen knife, then enjoyed a free spiritual meal.
21422.postEvent: Afterwards, you often visited his culinary cultivation building, trading sword techniques for dishes, and your swordsmanship unexpectedly improved.

21423.event: While meditating, your pounding heartbeat was the neighbor's new pet thunder drum frog croaking at midnight.

21424.event: You enter a bamboo forest carved with 'See deer.' A deer gnawing bamboo says, 'Stop carving, it hurts.'

21425.event: Forged with a wisp of consciousness, the sword rings each dawn, refusing to sheathe until it finishes Guangling San.

21426.event: A stone egg in your pouch, warmed by spiritual energy, hatches into a stone lion calling you Mother.

21427.event: Playing Go with divine sense, the board becomes a star field; you watch three days without moving.
21427.postEvent: At game's end, the star field collapses; you both exhaust magic, fall laughing, and never mention Go again.

21428.event: Bathing, your reflection becomes an old woman, smiles, vanishes. Later, you learn the spring reflected an ancient female immortal.

21429.event: While cultivating, your golden core spins and plays a broken lullaby, unsettling your focus.
21429.postEvent: You find ancient texts revealing it was a rogue cultivator's joke to test future cultivators' focus.

21430.event: Each full moon, your cave's peach tree grows peaches with faces; biting them reveals trivial chatter.
21430.postEvent: You eat and listen, but instead feel a clarity in your mind and a sense of carefree freedom.

21431.event: You find a jade slip detailing a Nascent Soul cultivator's 30,000-word study on tea temperature and enlightenment.
21431.postEvent: Upon careful reading, you unexpectedly gain some insight into the principle of mutual completion of water and fire.

21432.event: Spiritual cranes drag you into their centennial group bath, thoroughly drenching you.
21432.postEvent: Afterward, you find your bones and muscles have become more solid, and your physique has slightly improved.

21433.event: You buy a magical love-letter artifact, but the letter to your Dao partner is nonsense.
21433.postEvent: Your Dao partner bursts into laughter upon seeing it, and you two look at each other, sharing a joyful moment.

21434.event: A delicate mechanical rat steals your hairpin daily during seclusion, returning it after 100 days covered in tiny sword techniques.
21434.postEvent: Upon careful study, your sword intent improves.

21435.event: You stumble into a bizarre space where alternate yous argue about which finger to raise while sitting cross-legged.
21435.postEvent: With a sharp shout from you, the illusions all dissipate, leaving only a slight fatigue in your mind.

21436.event: Heavy rain forms "Dao" characters on the ground. You watch for three days until exhausted and your cave floods.
21436.postEvent: You scramble out, annoyed at yourself for being captivated by illusions and damaging your spiritual sense.

21437.event: An eccentric old man shows a miniature world from his sleeve, but a fat loach leaps out, causing a spectacle.
21437.postEvent: Amid everyone's shock, you smile without a word, carrying yourself with grace.

21438.event: An ancient sword flies with a letter reminding you to feed a spiritual crane that already ascended.
21438.postEvent: You laugh lightly and shake your head, feeling a sense of openness and a strengthened Dao heart.

21439.event: While cultivating, your qi goes awry, but you feel clear-headed and only want to trim weeds.
21439.postEvent: Seven days of non-stop weeding; when the weeds are gone, your Dao heart is as clear as a mirror.

21440.event: You give a beggar a mortal pill; he ascends in a rainbow, bowl says thanks for the treat.
21440.postEvent: You faintly feel a subtle opportunity descending upon you.

21441.event: Cave floor tiles form an ingenious Go problem; after three days they shatter, revealing an ancient ring.
21441.postEvent: The ring contains a true interpretation of Go, and your comprehension improves.

21442.event: White-haired cultivators drag you into the Nine Heavens Fishing Club, boasting of dragon fishing; you cannot escape for days.
21442.postEvent: You feel your ears turning numb and your Dao heart tarnished.

21443.event: Opening the furnace, pill qi forms a tiny man who bows, then fades, ruining the batch.
21443.postEvent: Only faint laughter lingers, and many resources are wasted.

21444.event: A cloud face claiming to be the Rain Master gives absurd predictions and asks for travel fee.
21444.postEvent: You find it both amusing and exasperating, yet you become entangled in a thread of karmic destiny.

21445.event: At dawn, your flying sword is missing, found stuck with another's at the waterfall, leaves on hilts.
21445.postEvent: You laugh silently, not wanting to disturb them, but a trace of carefree delight adds to your heart.

21446.event: Eating a rainbow mushroom causes three days of amnesia; memory returns on the fourth morning.
21446.postEvent: Yet you gain insight into the principle of returning to simplicity, and your spiritual perception becomes clearer.

21447.event: A transparent deer enters; its hooves make epiphyllum bloom and wither, leaving a tear.
21447.postEvent: A ripple of compassion stirs in your heart lake, and your demeanor gains a touch of mercy.

21448.event: The ghost of a dead cultivator nags for three spirit stones; burning them makes it laugh and vanish.
21448.postEvent: Although it costs a small fortune, it settles the karmic debt.

21449.event: Soaking the secret realm's wordless celestial book in heart demon water reveals it as a spirit beast barbecue guide.
21449.postEvent: Following its method to roast and consume meat, your physique unexpectedly improves.

21450.event: Seeking to create a heaven-defying technique, he reversed his meridians; his true qi ignited, instantly shattering his body and cave.
21450.postEvent: Only scorch marks remain; others all sigh at the mercilessness of the Great Dao.

21451.event: During heart demon tribulation, a demon takes an old friend's form, but a wind blows it away.
21451.postEvent: It turns out you inadvertently yawned; your Dao heart's stability has reached such a level.

21452.event: Deep in the spirit vein, you find a warm round stone claiming to be a mountain god but only gurgling.
21452.postEvent: Using it as a pillow, months later your soul condenses and lifespan increases slightly.

21453.event: A fish leaps, blows a bubble with a celestial palace that shatters; you feel a brief coolness.
21453.postEvent: Later you learn that it might have been a residual trace of a water-type spell.

21454.event: At {age}, pine tree asks about moon; you say yes, it gives needle that becomes evil ward.
21454.postEvent: You treasure it carefully, and years later you indeed use it to fend off a minor calamity.

21455.event: A broken jade pendant inscribed 'Supreme goodness is like water' warms you when sad.

21456.event: While playing Flying Sword into Pot, your pebble hits a Daoist's gourd; he laughs and gives you a fasting pill.
21456.postEvent: You treasured that pill for many years, never bearing to consume it.

21457.event: On your birthday, you wish to see an immortal, dream of one, then wake to find a cold crane feather.
21457.postEvent: Later you learn that this feather can clear the mind and brighten the eyes, and slightly nourish the root bone.

21458.event: Playfully falling into an abandoned spirit den, you raise newborn chicks as kin; your mother releases them, you cry.

21459.event: You buy a fake regret medicine from a Daoist, yet you have no regrets.
21459.postEvent: The Daoist laughs and says, 'Not regretting is the best medicine.'

21460.event: Sweeping the mountain gate, you see stone veins like 'Dao'; daily observation leads to meditation, leaving you refreshed.

21461.event: You build a snowman with black stone eyes; next day they become obsidian with yin energy.

21462.event: Eating a glowing mushroom causes diarrhea, ghost sightings, then coughing blood and death; your parents grieve.

21463.event: Hide in a dry well, find a poem about a banished celestial, recite it, and feel your body become light.

21464.event: Lost in the mountains, a woman in white gave you a hair that prevented drowning once.

21465.event: During cultivation meditation, you felt a qi vortex; your master dismissed it as an undigested sweet potato.

21466.event: You chased a ginseng baby with your senior brother, failed, but gained running speed.

21467.event: You used a broken wooden sword from your neighbor to split a demon mosquito, then believed yourself a sword genius.

21468.event: Your mother's Jade Rabbit story sparked a dream of osmanthus cakes, awakening your moonlight sensitivity.

21469.event: You count and name each hair; all fall out, new hair grows, letting you sense subtle ripples everywhere.

21470.event: Bought a blank spirit beast book, threw it, then a golden page congratulated your sincerity.
21470.postEvent: Ever since, every full moon you hear distant beasts lowing in harmony.

21471.event: You taste a delicious fungus, lose your sense of taste for ten years, then regain it sharper.
21471.postEvent: From then on, you lost interest in all delicacies of the world, only longing for those ten years of purity.

21472.event: Tribulation lightning splits a mountain, revealing a cave; you are immobilized for three days, then pick up rubble.

21473.event: You read a captivating book, seclude for a hundred years for updates; the author ascends and leaves the ending.

21474.event: You fall asleep refining; the furnace makes a snoring instrument that surges spiritual energy, so neighbors complain.

21475.event: After centuries discussing Dao with your companion, you realized it in daily life, sold buns, and earned praise.

21476.event: Children argue about the sun; you impart Dao rhyme, they become immortals, and you receive divine feedback.

21477.event: You find a mummy with a note 'borrow a light'; light it, it vanishes, leaving an iron token.
21477.postEvent: On the iron token was engraved one ancient seal script character, resembling 'fate.'

21478.event: My spirit strayed far, swapped with a tortoise; after seven days eating mud and being stoned, I mastered earth escape.

21479.event: In drinking contest with masked cultivator, you learn he's alliance leader; he praises you and bestows three scriptures.

21480.event: You made auto-answer jade talismans that only said 'good' or 'very good,' earning the nickname 'Great Good True Man.'
21480.postEvent: Though the talismans were crude, many sought them, saying that getting one 'good' sufficed for a lifetime.

21481.event: A sea turtle blocked your way, gave you a shell inscribed 'Don't eat green dates for 60 years,' then vanished.

21482.event: You realize the technique is backwards; standing on your head boosts progress, but your disciple thinks you're possessed.

21483.event: Dao partner smiled, handed me a book, and told me she had put it there and to stop counting.
21483.postEvent: On the fragment was written: 'Less desire, few thoughts; the Dao follows nature.'

21484.event: You see a farmer singing while plowing; stand still seven days, he gives grain.

21485.event: Bored at ceremony, you mentally draw dragons; dotting eyes makes one real. Few believe; disciples secretly seek it.

21486.event: At Sword Graveyard, a sword spirit insists on chess; after 100 losses, it furiously teaches you a close combat move.

21487.event: You stumble into an illusion of your childhood math test, break it after three retakes, and gain faster heavenly deduction.

21488.event: After a century, a missing tortoise returns bearing the long-lost Turtle Breath Technique in ancient script.
21488.postEvent: The tortoise blinks, seemingly showing a hint of pride.

21489.event: You play a tree in an opera, stand still 3 days; applause moves you, then you stand like a stump.

21490.event: You painstakingly make youth pills. Vapor reveals a goddess who scoffs 'Too ugly.' Pills shatter; you stare for days.

21491.event: You boast a 100-year seclusion, sleep for 50, then find most peers dead and yourself the eldest.

21492.event: Trying to fuse celestial fires, you become a torch, leaving a shadow that becomes a century-long warning.
21492.postEvent: The scorched shadow's face is blurred, only the corner of its mouth seems to carry a hint of a smile.

21493.event: You watch ants move their nest for a day, and cultivators see you as a madman.
21493.postEvent: Afterwards, whenever you see ants marching, you feel the cycle of heaven's way is no more than this.

21494.event: A green sprout breaks from your golden core; pulling it loses cultivation but gives youthful clarity.
21494.postEvent: You plant grass by your cave window, and it becomes your daily companion.

21495.event: A talking parrot at the immortal market tricks you into buying overpriced candy instead of a pill.

21496.event: In seclusion, you hear tapping from next room. After three years, you find a woodpecker pecking the array's foundation.
21496.postEvent: The bird sees someone coming, flaps its wings and flies away, leaving deep and shallow pits on the array foundation.

21497.event: On a whim, you make bitter pills without honey, dump them, and monkeys squabble for weeks.

21498.event: Your soul enters a painter's dream; he paints an immortal with Dao resonance, seen as a heavenly gift.

21499.event: On your 400th birthday, your fungus asks 'Are you lonely?' You pour brew; it gets drunk, becomes a tufted child.
21499.postEvent: Since then, the cave has been filled with a child's laughter, making it lively.

21500.event: You obtain a wordless book. After decades unable to read it, you sleep on it, and your heart demon fades.

21501.event: A wandering Taoist sells regret pills; you take one, relive a past shame, and wake dazed.
21501.postEvent: Afterwards, you become less cautious in your dealings with others.

21502.event: Your spirit crane leads wild cranes to dance. Their calls disturb your meditation, but you cherish this earthly joy.

21503.event: You find a weather-predicting stone: green for rain, red for sun. It's usually wrong, but you still glance at it.

21504.event: An old friend played Go for three years; pieces enlightened by sun and moon became warring armies.

21505.event: While refining my lifebound treasure, I sneezed spittle on it, making it self-polishing and dust-averse.

21506.event: Found a scroll on eating ants, but a venomous ant bit my tongue; I couldn't speak for three months.

21507.event: During my tribulation, clouds vanished; a turtle took three lightning bolts for me and then passed its tribulation first.

21508.event: My young soul was mistaken for a kite by children, tied and pulled, nearly scattering, leaving me unstable for months.

21509.event: I paid dearly for fake immortal iron; the seller ascended, leaving a note: see you in heaven.

21510.event: In a mountain temple, I prayed; a god taught tea brewing in a dream, spring filled my room.

21511.event: Practicing divine ability, qi went wrong; became snow hare. Chased three years, recovered, but fear hawks and wolves.

21512.event: Got a hexagram warning against travel, stayed in. Cave collapsed; buried 49 days, died. Realized fate is unavoidable.

21513.event: In a sect duel, I held a sneeze; spiritual power somersaulted me, dodging a killing blow for a draw.

21514.event: I rescued an injured fox; it left fruit daily, then became a girl seeking to be my disciple.

21515.event: I argued with my partner, went seclusion for years. Emerged to find 'You win' note; partner had died.

21516.event: I refined the elixir, died bleeding from orifices, saw fine print calling it a joke, then exploded—body and dao destroyed.

21517.event: Chasing a squirrel for my belt, I found a cave with a pill, missing the sect competition.
21517.postEvent: Afterward, that squirrel still came to beg for food from time to time, evidently considering itself my benefactor.

21518.event: My sword aura cut off a lock of hair that became a doppelganger pestering me daily for new clothes.
21518.postEvent: My doppelganger and I argued over robe styles, making it seem like I talked to myself.

21519.event: A yellowed list fell from a cultivation scripture; I could only crave the candied hawthorn.
21519.postEvent: I forgot about realm breakthroughs, rushed to the mortal market, and was punished with a hundred Heart Sutra copies.

21520.event: I bought a fake elixir, spewed rainbows for three days, attracting butterflies; it was expired candy.
21520.postEvent: Though useless, the rainbow breath could actually stun low-level demon beasts, which was an unexpected bonus.

21521.event: A stray lightning bolt gave me a fluffy perm; disciples copied it the next day.
21521.postEvent: Some even paid high prices for the fallen strands of my hair, as a lightning tribulation catalyst.

21522.event: I lived three days as a crane, then woke to see insects as old friends.
21522.postEvent: After that, I often used crane cries to distract enemies, with excellent effect.

21523.event: My sword spirit fell for a rusty cleaver at Sword Tomb's blind date, wanting to break our contract.
21523.postEvent: I coaxed it back with ten jars of spiritual wine; now it gets drunk on alcohol.

21524.event: Fleeing a demon, I crashed a river god's wedding; he gave me a Water-Repelling Pearl as the destined witness.
21524.postEvent: After that, every rainy season, shrimp soldiers and crab generals would secretly deliver river delicacies to my door.

21525.event: I caused a power reversal upgrading an array, draining ten li, ruining fields, and owing 10k stones, near bankrupt.
21525.postEvent: I realized the Spirit-Devouring Array prototype from the Forbidden Technique Pavilion; merits and faults cancel out.

21526.event: Napping in a cave, my soul traveled to a world where machines communicate and capture light; surrounded, I fled.
21526.postEvent: Returning to reality, my mind was filled with bizarre sights, and my Dao heart nearly collapsed.

21527.event: I tripped over my own feet and fell, but disciples thought it was a sacred technique and copied me.
21527.postEvent: I was pushed to become the founding patriarch of the 'Prostration Sect', not knowing whether to laugh or cry.

21528.event: A flying sword message said I won immortality elixir, but it was spring water; the gourd holds three rivers.
21528.postEvent: Later, that gourd was refined into a storage magic tool. Not a loss after all.

21529.event: While bathing, I swallowed a glowing dirt pellet, strengthening my bones, so I began making pills from bath dirt.
21529.postEvent: I was nicknamed 'True Man Mud Pill' by fellow disciples. I just smiled and said nothing.

21530.event: I picked up a coin promising wealth, then found spirit stones in my sleeve the next day.

21531.event: Meditating, I dreamed of being a butterfly; shoulder blades tingled, saw wing-shaped imprints moving without wind.
21531.postEvent: Although no real divine power, all disciples praised my ethereal immortal bearing.

21532.event: A talking black crow argued with me; it was a mynah spirit beast punished to sweep the alchemy room.
21532.postEvent: After that, whenever I saw a crow, I would chat with it, and my comprehension inexplicably increased.

21533.event: On a whim, I watered the garden like mortals, turning spirit fields into common soil, and was chased by a servant with a broom.
21533.postEvent: The sect punished me to carry water for a month, and my arm strength increased.

21534.event: Ants drilled and boxed in my cave crevice, then triggered a spiritual tide and ascended after two weeks.
21534.postEvent: I stood stunned, my Dao heart shaken, deeply feeling that all things have spirit.

21535.event: A strange wind blew me skyward; landing, my bun reversed, making me look like an upside-down scallion.
21535.postEvent: It took three days to comb it back to normal. Everyone who saw me during that time covered their mouths.

21536.event: I accidentally ate an unripe Vermilion Fruit. My stomach ached terribly, and the excrement solidified into crystal stones, attracting little.
21536.postEvent: After that, I became reverent of wild fruits.

21537.event: A Dao debate on sweet versus salty tofu pudding got my junior and me three months of latrine duty.
21537.postEvent: The latrines were swept spotlessly clean, and my comprehension increased instead.

21538.event: At a market, a fortune teller predicted my early death. Decades later, his stall had changed three times.
21538.postEvent: The impermanence of worldly affairs stirred my Dao heart slightly.

21539.event: A broom spirit nagged me nightly; I preached three days, then we both meditated.
21539.postEvent: The broom transformed into a spiritual tool and recognized me as its master.

21540.event: While cultivating, I grew obsessed with three; all actions required triple repetition.
21540.postEvent: Fellow disciples thought I had realized the mysterious method of the Three Pillars. I just smiled and said nothing.

21541.event: You found a talking stone, claimed ancient sword master, sang nursery rhymes, so you dumped it in a valley after tinnitus.
21541.postEvent: The nursery rhyme tune lingered in my mind. I occasionally comprehended rhythm from my swordsmanship.

21542.event: Stained by strange flower powder, a demon butterfly chased me 800 li, honing my movement technique.
21542.postEvent: After the butterfly swarm dispersed, I sat collapsed for three days.

21543.event: While meditating under a waterfall, a golden carp begged me to help it become a dragon.
21543.postEvent: The golden carp left a golden scale and swam away resentfully.

21544.event: Drank too much spirit wine, hugged the mountain gate stone lion and called it brother, the next day the stone.
21544.postEvent: Guilty, you offered incense for three days.

21545.event: During the Golden Core tribulation, a crooked thunderbolt charred the old cliff pine but spared you; now the dead tree.
21545.postEvent: Every time you pass by, your hair stands on end.

21546.event: The cauldron absorbed spirit fire, gained sentience, burst open, fled; you chased three days, lured it back with a pill.
21546.postEvent: After that, when refining pills, the furnace fire controlled itself, and you had leisure to drink tea.

21547.event: Opening a flying sword message reveals a 300-year-old rent overdue note from Breeze Cave Landlord, place name lost.
21547.postEvent: You were stunned for a long moment, then bowed from afar toward the old address.

21548.event: A weeping herb claimed to be your past-life companion; you gave it to an elder and now avoid that spot.
21548.postEvent: The elder later praised the herb to everyone for its excellent alchemical properties.

21549.event: Accidentally dug up a box of mortal copper coins in the forbidden area, with a note saying 'Ancestor Master's secret.
21549.postEvent: You confiscated the coins, and the sect exchanged them for three spirit stones at market price.

21550.event: A mad daoist grabbed you, called you his grandson, and forced a book on eating spirit grains into your hands.
21550.postEvent: After reading it thoroughly, your eating posture subtly aligned with dao rhythms, and your aura increased slightly.

21551.event: Your sword's glow hurt a spirit crane; unable to pay, you kept it for three months and learned its telepathy.
21551.postEvent: After the crane returned, you often chatted with birds.

21552.event: Reading 'Sunny, skip cultivation, go play' on a diary in an ancient cave, you skip meditation and your Dao heart stirs.
21552.postEvent: Feeling sympathetic, you slacked off that night instead of meditating, and your dao heart relaxed.

21553.event: Duel stopped when opponent spotted a rare spirit insect on your hair; you caught it together, becoming friends.
21553.postEvent: Afterward, you gained a friend, and often discussed insects together.

21554.event: While bathing in the spirit spring, the water turned multicolored as rainbow carp spawned, staining you for three days, and everyone laughed.
21554.postEvent: You stayed indoors, learning the tortoise breath evasion technique.

21555.event: While walking, the ground split open, and you fell into an ant queen's palace.
21555.postEvent: In summer, carrying it against your chest felt like bringing a cold spring.

21556.event: Recalling an unknown mantra, flowers bloomed; disciples called you Flower Immortal, but you left disdainfully.
21556.postEvent: The spell has no practical use, but since then, during bloom season, you are always dragged to liven things up.

21557.event: A strange wind stole your shoe; a year later, it was sold far away as a low-grade magic artifact.
21557.postEvent: You didn't buy it back, but told everyone, 'That shoe once was mine'.

21558.event: Your opponent was too drunk to fight, so you won dishonorably and fed the prize pill to a watchdog.
21558.postEvent: The dog actually gained intelligence, wagged its tail at you three times, and then left.

21559.event: You carried an old woman who became a dragon and gave a scale that crumbled to dust.
21559.postEvent: You were left speechless, staring at the scale powder.

21560.event: You saw a demon tiger handwalking in the spirit beast garden, imitated it, found qi accelerated, and created the handstand.
21560.postEvent: This method was included in the 'Record of Unorthodox Cultivation'.

21561.event: After accidentally eating a poem fruit, you spoke in verse for a week, but disciples thought you were enlightened.
21561.postEvent: After the seven days, you regained plain speech, as if freed from shackles.

21562.event: You attended the Cultivator's Rant Convention, full of complaints about spiritual energy and lightning, and nearly fell asleep.
21562.postEvent: After returning, you grew tired of gatherings, and your dao heart became slightly weary.

21563.event: You suddenly smell others' spiritual roots—fire like meat, water like fish—and can't meet their eyes.
21563.postEvent: The way you walked with your nose covered drew sidelong glances from everyone.

21564.event: Flying artifact exhausted midair, fell into pigsty, pigs nuzzled you for half a day.
21564.postEvent: You became a laughingstock and did not step out for three months.

21565.event: You accidentally forged a celestial iron pot; its nagging spirit made you sell it.
21565.postEvent: The buyer later reported: The pot is good, but too noisy.

21566.event: After years of meditation, you found cultivation boring, farmed for three years, then returned to cultivate as in a dream.
21566.postEvent: Your Dao heart experienced waxing and waning and returned to calm.

21567.event: Spotted-legged mosquito bit you, formed core, transformed, insisted being your disciple. You accepted the smallest disciple ever.
21567.postEvent: It often buzzes discussing the Dao; you need to communicate with divine sense.

21568.event: Met your double in secret realm, chatted, learned it was mirror spirit that vanished when mirror broke.
21568.postEvent: You comprehended the distinction between reality and illusion, and your divine sense became clear.

21569.event: A square sun stunned the sect for half an hour, later revealed as an East Sea mirage.
21569.postEvent: You painted a picture on this theme and surprisingly earned praise from the elder.

21570.event: You find the Spirit Chef recipe, cook and eat, glow for three days, amazing all who think it's an elixir.
21570.postEvent: You clarified repeatedly, but no one believed it was just greens and tofu.

21571.event: You emerged from seclusion to find spirit bee hives, had to move, but collect honey yearly.
21571.postEvent: You planted many exotic flowers near the new cave dwelling, attracting the bees to come on their own.

21572.event: A spirit was born in the sword furnace, innocent, emerging with the blade's tempering.

21573.event: The completed sword recognized its master, fought with the Heavenly Sword Sect across realms, and gained sentience.

21574.event: The master perished in a demonic siege, shattering the sword and silencing its spirit.

21575.event: The remnant spirit revived in the sword graveyard, absorbing sun and moon essence to learn transformation.

21576.event: He becomes a white-robed youth, exits sword tomb into mortal world, innocent of human hearts but pure in sword heart.

21577.event: Met a wandering doctor who taught it worldly wisdom; after ten years of travel, its Dao heart steadied.

21578.event: Caught in immortal sects' treasure feud, it awakened 'Ten Thousand Swords Return to Origin', sword intent soaring.

21579.event: Remnant soul asked to destroy enemy; spirit with broken sword killed Nascent Soul cultivator, sword heart clear.

21580.event: After heavenly tribulation, it merged sword and human forms into a fearsome Sword Man body, alarming sects.

21581.event: During heavenly tribulation, it glimpsed the Great Dao, sacrificed itself into a sword domain, forever suppressing the Demon Abyss.

21582.event: As an infant near the sword graveyard, he laughed at a sword's hum, puzzling villagers.

21583.event: Demon caused trouble in village. Youth entered sword graveyard, protected by broken sword, awakened spirit-attracting physique.

21584.event: Taken as disciple by old tomb guardian, given Sword Classic fragment, began sword cultivation.

21585.event: The old guardian died meditating; the youth pacted with sword spirits to guard the tomb.

21586.event: Demon cultivators attacked. Youth used tomb's sword array, wounded enemy, died exhausted. Remnant soul entered ancient sword, gaining fame.

21587.event: In the sword tomb, the Sword Ancestor's will taught him Burial Sword Art, advancing his path.

21588.event: An ancient sword spirit transformed, returned, and debated swords with a tomb guardian for three months, each verifying their path.

21589.event: A demonic calamity descended, the sword tomb was assaulted by myriad demons; the tomb guardian burned much of his lifespan.

21590.event: After the battle, severely wounded, yet unexpectedly shattered and rebuilt, stepping into the Nascent Soul realm, his lifespan instead increased.

21591.event: As his life ended, he used Burial Sword Art to entomb himself, becoming a stele suppressing sword intent forever.

21592.event: Born into a family of herbalists; even in swaddling clothes, he could recognize the scents of hundreds of herbs.

21593.event: He followed his father practicing medicine during a plague, witnessing life and death, vowing to heal the world.

21594.event: He saved an injured cultivator, got a pill canon fragment, and glimpsed immortality.

21595.event: He traveled widely, dabbling in alchemy, causing furnace explosions until one killed him, ending his quest in regret.

21596.event: Stumbling into a secret realm, he obtained an 'Medicine Cauldron' left by an ancient immortal, completing his initial alchemy path.

21597.event: Refined the 'Life-Extending Pill', saved a city from plague, the people built a living shrine for him, gaining merit.

21598.event: Unwilling to attach to a sect, he was suppressed by the Alchemy Cauldron Sect, exiled to the wilderness, disheartened.

21599.event: He found a dying demonic beast on a desolate mountain, healed it, and they became dao companions.

21600.event: He exhausted his life to create a pill extending life by 300 years, attracting widespread envy.

21601.event: He, feigned, compliance, when, captured, laced, the, pill, with, mind, trap, to, backfire, on, the, demon, lord, but, died, from, wounds, after, escape.

21602.event: After recovering, he secluded himself, taught alchemy, died peacefully in his cave, and was honored as 'Medicine Immortal'.

21603.event: Born in the demon realm, his parents were outer members of the demon sect; tainted with ferocity from childhood.

21604.event: Selected for the Demon Sect due to excellent bone root, entered the Blood Fiend Hall, practiced demonic arts.

21605.event: Ordered to destroy a minor sect, I secretly freed a weeping young female cultivator out of pity.

21606.event: Felt lost in slaughter, read forbidden books, saw demonic path as false, resolved to defect.

21607.event: Exposed for defection, attacked by disciples, fell off a cliff, rescued by rogue cultivator, but died days later.

21608.event: Living as 'Xiao Wang', a menial in a remote town, secretly used Buddhist heart methods to purify demonic qi.

21609.event: Demonic cultivators attacked a market town; he revealed his cultivation, died fighting, and his identity was exposed.

21610.event: Taken in by the righteous sect 'Heavenly Sound Pavilion', but was highly suspected, cultivated while bearing the guilt of sin.

21611.event: The Demon Sect launched a large-scale attack, to save the Heavenly Sound Pavilion, self-detonated his demon core to perish together.

21612.event: After reshaping, his cultivation recovered, demonic qi faded, he formed a Nascent Soul, titled Forget the Dust True Man.

21613.event: Crossed the Heart Demon Tribulation, saw through good and evil, ascended in broad daylight, attained sainthood through the physical body.

21614.event: Born into a rogue cultivator family, coinciding with the family's decline, drifted to a market town as an infant.
